name: American Update
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684081%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zkXzh6dUqd8JdKZ7AxdlAg&sysid=1). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684082%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8a9LV%2fLnvuhuRM5KcbiMag&sysid=1) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c684083%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b6KhcMf6xIF2HDMtIEJ05g&sysid=1) on these survival food kits while you can.

If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z80erc95me1h0r13s7046atb8a5d571m2smq7gc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj1cjh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqhtjllgas4gdm939h1bkd76e0p7li84a9ljeuog_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj1cjh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmofhhlrg73e5lmbohhnfomk6jf012l9fnuf8b78_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj1cjh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhhr80ff0d380jol1q8evr9j9kk79nqor7cvpol0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj1cjh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Nothing will work unless you do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it.

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvpl7a44lnghs0fgagdt11ou1h12dit7j1kfmop0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

My mom was a schoolteacher growing up. Every single day she got up and went to educate the next generation of leaders... and she always told me, _**"Nothing will work unless you do".**_

And it is exactly what I’ve been doing since I was 17 when I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also earned my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it.

**Well, Fellow American, I took those same ideals I learned as a Waffle House waitress to Congress. I refuse to waiver to what anyone wants other than the constituents I was elected by,_even if it means pissing off some party members along the way._**

[** ****SEND A HARD-WORKING WOMAN TO CONGRESS » **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdlt399tnevmmss7p7spj9rh99l22ehe5ias6t10_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs)

[**Congress needs more people like me**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7gu2j16p6dk552u29mruqkv6guqgm7umd888ud0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs) - someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

I desperately need the help of grassroots supporters just like you to keep this campaign running. In return, I promise to always vote for you, not the hoity-toity, Washington elite who try and buy my votes. [**Will you make a donation to my campaign to send a hard-working, everyday American back to Washington?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu1la84u1k528u2he418c08rnuvqmpv7mj0h4o7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs)

[** ****DONATE $100 » **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3qhggt1vtrvc2ludoe7e474migbvi5e94fbg17g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs)

[** **** DONATE $75 » **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4eb6i7m68j5s0g5nebheqdtfbck5v8hfvf3mon8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6cdh2bs)

clean_body: Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also worked to earn my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. | Fellow American, My mom was a schoolteacher growing up. Every single day she got up and went to educate the next generation of leaders... and she always told me, "Nothing will work unless you do". And it is exactly what I’ve been doing since I was 17 when I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck as I also earned my high school diploma by taking classes at a technical college. I got by without government handouts or radical socialist policies – and I am a better woman because of it. Well, Fellow American, I took those same ideals I learned as a Waffle House waitress to Congress. I refuse to waiver to what anyone wants other than the constituents I was elected by,even if it means pissing off some party members along the way. - someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices. I desperately need the help of grassroots supporters just like you to keep this campaign running. In return, I promise to always vote for you, not the hoity-toity, Washington elite who try and buy my votes. name: A New Direction
subject: Salem’s shameless property tax grab
body:
A full-scale assault on our wallets
[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,We are facing a dire threat to our hard-earned income and property rights. **Governor Kotek has unveiled a new property tax proposal, HJR 201, that directly contradicts her promises of relief for hardworking Oregonians.** This proposed property tax hike will burden homeowners and landlords alike, stifling economic growth and pushing already strained budgets to the breaking point. **It is nothing short of a betrayal of the very principles Governor Kotek claimed to uphold.** [CONTACT GOV. KOTEK - NO MORE TAX HIKES](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-y/) [CONTACT REP. EVANS - SAY NO TO HJR 201](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-j/) We cannot let this hypocrisy stand unchallenged. **[We must hold Governor Kotek and her allies, like Representative Evans, accountable](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-t/)** for their reckless disregard for the financial well-being of Oregonians.I urge you to take action now. **[Contact Governor Kotek](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-i/)** and **[Representative Evans](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-d/)** immediately and demand that they stop this egregious property tax proposal. **Let them know that you will not tolerate such hypocrisy and that you expect them to honor their promises to the people of Oregon.** [CONTACT GOV. KOTEK - NO MORE TAX HIKES](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-h/) [CONTACT REP. EVANS - SAY NO TO HJR 201](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-o/) Together, we can stop this assault on our wallets and ensure a brighter future for all Oregonians.Thank you,A New Direction [](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-b/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-n/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-p/)[](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-x/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xddtddd-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-m) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-xddtddd-dihkkhuuli-c/)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39346%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AbhLFeHuZ%2fthRO95OE07UQ&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39347%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dOHJPUEX29KcVU9%2fcKGa5g&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39348%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D0JnSbQjZyPNXE4OV2gJCA&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c39349%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yq7Tmth8fD6kmjfkygivnA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Your America News
---

ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Your America News Your America News • PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My son was wrongly convicted
body:
But I’m praying that you’ll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

Dear Friend,

I know you and I have never met. But I'm praying that you'll help me save my son, Officer Terence Sutton.

This is a picture of Terence and me at a dinner celebrating his graduation from the Police Academy.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ni4e792mibug61fnfurc1rq8a6r9dmnomo1po8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)
I was so proud that night. But I was also terrified.

Terence was going to be patrolling the streets of Washington, DC, where crime is sky-high and politicians side with criminals over cops. But never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **- murder of a criminal my son didn't even touch.**

The story is so shocking that if it didn't happen to my son, _I wouldn 't even believe it._ **[And I'm praying you will help me save my son](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsvdubviiauo9rbl07jsp043ro0r6aisb9mp08u8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)** - **but first, let me explain what happened.**

Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang's territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long - including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he had been seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

So when Terence saw him illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull Karon over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

And then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here's where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd's death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon's death.

The pressure campaign worked, and prosecutors charged my son with _**Second-Degree Murder.**_

When Terence called to tell me about the charges, I was in disbelief. Any sane person could see that Karon's death, while tragic, was no one's fault but his own.

_He_ chose to run from the cops.

_He_ chose to not wear a helmet.

_He_ chose to speed through that alley without looking where he was going.

So, when I learned that Terence could be sentenced to **_sixty_ _years_** in prison for Karon's death, my head started spinning. And it only got worse when the trial began.

You see, the judge refused to allow Terence's legal team to present all of the facts in his defense.

The jury never got to hear that Karon was a known member of a violent gang...

They never got to hear that he was wearing an ankle monitor because of a violent assault he had committed just weeks before...

They never got to hear that he had drugs and thousands of dollars in cash strapped to his leg...

And they never got to hear about the drugs in Karon's system at the time of the crash.

Sitting in the courtroom, I couldn't believe my ears when the jury filed out and declared Terence _**" guilty."**_

He's currently awaiting sentencing.

Now you understand why I'm so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them.

He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

And at the same time the bleeding-heart DC politicians are letting shoplifters, carjackers, and drug dealers walk away scot-free...

...they're trying to put my son - a decorated officer who has received 60 awards and commendations - away for 60 years for something he _didn 't_ _do._

I had almost lost hope, but then we learned about the **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** -or LELDF for short.

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops - and their families - at their lowest moments. And when I got the call from their president, Jason Johnson, I was at my lowest moment.

Not only did LELDF decide to help my son get the legal defense he deserves. They're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys and expert witnesses for Terence.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone:

**[Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnvl3q5k74dgi7haugg6itjf8q55vvnqn8p7rn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)**

To fund his defense, Terence had to sell his home, his car, his beloved motorcycle, and most of his personal belongings. Everything he owns now fits in just nine small boxes. He has almost nothing left.

If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. And it makes me cry when I think of how he would feel about what Terence is being put through right now.

I simply can't bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

**[So if you are at all able, would you consider following this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zategai6n3lcrrb7tj8fpduhblrfgai808n8b8j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)**

**Any amount - $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more - will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Terence's team is currently looking at every available option to keep his case alive.

**[And you and your $35 contribution could make the difference in Terence being acquitted or spending the next 60 years behind bars.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j5g3oobvuh26r7hcbgf00dm6sg2rujnoc633p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)**

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you - in advance - for doing what you can to help all the wrongly-accused officers LELDF is working with. Like Terence.

Sincerely,

Patti Reilly

P.S. I know a few kind words from someone like you will help lift Terence's spirits. This guilty verdict has been so devastating for him. **[So if you choose to make a $35 gift to LELDF, would you also please include a little note-maybe a prayer?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk3snfkocu9be8iruvo062c193mc3ud99ug3pmqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)** There's a field on the page for you to do this. Thank you -from the bottom of my heart.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06q8p3taqrcn12p5dsn28hm6e9mam4sk54aumr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8b9bk2sha7dmd1os2829olrgfm5pitttrdfnra8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64ob4clhm9oh1k8gn48n24hjm0o74cti64pj2c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcqq7ubv9omqhh238tn2a60p6dv1k27drrvkcks0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm8oj6c9h2bs)_

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Friend, It’s no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ →](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zott9pdjndqacjtbkpibfiq53hj41ve5qb8pplc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30shjm2o77chh2bs)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.
---

---

That’s why one of the first things I did after being elected was visit our southern border. Look - no matter what Joe Biden and Kamala Harris say, there is a real CRISIS at the border. I spent time visiting with our brave border patrol officers and hearing about the challenges they face. Yet the Democrats in Washington refuse to do anything about it. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=e1f13ffe650dc4d520c58959d1afbf63d91355f74b81994980a060160c25a4acb8becfe15b491acc8481c20d45d420e1a82e77327afd6dff Border security is an American issue. But that starts with signing your name to our petition and standing up for border security. body:
Support her daily newsletter to bring you the latest in the Senate of Virginia
| | |
---
| Support Amanda Chase Donate Today THANK YOU
---
|
Dear Friends & Supporters, Are you enjoying my thorough daily newsletter and weekly summary?
Please make a donation today to support my efforts to keep you informed.
While I'm no longer in the Senate of Virginia, I'm putting my 8 years of service and experience to work for you.
While the General Assembly is meeting through Saturday, March 9, and is introducing legislation that will effect your quality of life, it's critical that you know what to do to support or oppose certain bills that I've highlighted for you.
Would you be willing to pitch in to cover my costs?
It's about $400 a month just to cover my email service, just for starters. Thanks in advance to those who have already given so generously. I want to be able to continue to provide this service to you.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.
---
|
---
| GET REGULAR UPDATES
---
| After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.

name: Griffin
subject: **48 Hour Deadline Deadline**
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Friend, **THERE ARE 48 HOURS LEFT TO REGISTER FOR CONGRESS OF COUNTIES IN 2024. ** **We still have a few spaces left, claim them now!**
---
[**REGISTER NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/83eba4e3f5a46cc03947229f28c3afba/ea0c7b1e7912093bc3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
**Remember, the deadline is Monday February 19th at 5 PM** . Congress of Counties will take place in downtown Indianapolis from February 23rd-24th. And it’s your chance to connect with Republicans from across Indiana and gain insight and key knowledge about strategy and tactics to make sure Republicans win at all levels of government in November. We encourage all Republicans to join us for Congress of Counties. The only way we can ensure victory in November is to be prepared. ** ****If you are on the ballot in May and/or November, this event is a MUST. ** **[Please lock in your spot right now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/83eba4e3f5a46cc03947229f28c3afba/d540c189d06903a1c3d6b838967d376c/40313)** If you have already registered, you can disregard this email. Looking forward to seeing you there! -Griffin
---

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e72b4d81a6542bc831338e16349f377&_e=D-OHFkUeJAeT7KemYyxMfXscWGyLRkHdZREC4HJkVb0miSyJtNrtdsesrkdyCQ9PO4JthkxyMblLhYzFnkYJeK5iZ4V3S1ABFJBp-WEd-Q_0si6EP1FbukROvCOOUnDf2hsaCHDmgq34FhRDKrfpweLleqDZ3Fg1q48g_shO_8bOJj3CQjyQUtSeRbKmkSG2Mlk0MWO4lHTlwG-8Gz2p47SYUiv2O45eE9TpnVQ-P0S6QbKXtCRsMzGFiMfO8Z8_brJQgGaDV2q6oBBFt0EORuAAugXHODUJFmAqzyrL3yhaBeH_bLrQ3VuSI60G_0FRHhiSJA4RRNbyiURxaVCLqR-RAj0nA6FVxFwwugoN58GIhCIGEVUvuPCa85Jqi9DcALs-AptZizvSyCsW4lu9xA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e72b4d81a6542bc831338e16349f377&_e=D-OHFkUeJAeT7KemYyxMfXscWGyLRkHdZREC4HJkVb0miSyJtNrtdsesrkdyCQ9PO4JthkxyMblLhYzFnkYJeK5iZ4V3S1ABFJBp-WEd-Q_0si6EP1FbukROvCOOUnDf2hsaCHDmgq34FhRDKrfpweLleqDZ3Fg1q48g_shO_8bOJj3CQjyQUtSeRbKmkSG2Mlk0MWO4lHTlwG-8Gz2p47SYUiv2O45eE9TpnVQ-P0S6QbKXtCRsMzGFiMfO8Z8_sY_yo0VKDwuP-dtI0qRnYTHWhM-WNzKotYi_5Mv2z3bJWQOCDqLxobbkQApc_nd-ID_IXUMbvHNdGLbxGtT6Qqb3SyKRokWHVTHqAvVMvppLNcP8OUETaxZqvH0s3QqkcnIQEGNczwUNPGrk-UWNLQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3e72b4d81a6542bc831338e16349f377&_e=D-OHFkUeJAeT7KemYyxMfXscWGyLRkHdZREC4HJkVb0miSyJtNrtdsesrkdyCQ9PO4JthkxyMblLhYzFnkYJeK5iZ4V3S1ABFJBp-WEd-Q_0si6EP1FbukROvCOOUnDf2hsaCHDmgq34FhRDKrfpweLleqDZ3Fg1q48g_shO_8bOJj3CQjyQUtSeRbKmkSG2Mlk0MWO4lHTlwG-8Gz2p47SYUiv2O45eE9TpnVQ-P0S6QbKXtCRsMzGFiMfO8Z8_xgUzAHvJLWffS6iTiejY-ZlL__c9yT3CAjj7mqtM_n8X6g1O_2AXAI84uM0HM9wkge5YstbN1DToc354QXLdNA9JTqatAd-6fiAYAQqdnGbzN3tMKii2oKqQgGon7-Ob69KIhLI3M_4O406oCjwAQw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
conservative voices are being suppressed

| | | [](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0LGK6zAQheGnkbqEmbGQ7EJFILi4kFtss6UYyXKiRbKNJbPk7RfDPsC2f_EdOJ8P9-CU0_L8zyXavbi9Oo7Oe1fD2o564ZLCUR0BqQvQhZQjOVk9kOlRRosGetQ9DSBf1gCgniYzI7OGfg4eedbUzwP3czewTPZ0gNAgKI3milNQyOwDavIDz0LBHrfD5xR4Kfy17qm9r0tsMttXa1sV3U3QKGj07N95XXyM17AWQeOWeamiG49WXIlTOoro7rFwyoL0Get67CGK7s7xtwQuG6fnIrr7x-P2T2kNIHc7bd8p51S1EQqep3BOyPbHe34CAAD__xEFbOg)
---
|
---
[](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0LGK6zAQheGnkbqEmbGQ7EJFILi4kFtss6UYyXKiRbKNJbPk7RfDPsC2f_EdOJ8P9-CU0_L8zyXavbi9Oo7Oe1fD2o564ZLCUR0BqQvQhZQjOVk9kOlRRosGetQ9DSBf1gCgniYzI7OGfg4eedbUzwP3czewTPZ0gNAgKI3milNQyOwDavIDz0LBHrfD5xR4Kfy17qm9r0tsMttXa1sV3U3QKGj07N95XXyM17AWQeOWeamiG49WXIlTOoro7rFwyoL0Get67CGK7s7xtwQuG6fnIrr7x-P2T2kNIHc7bd8p51S1EQqep3BOyPbHe34CAAD__xEFbOg)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0LGK6zAQheGnkbqEmbGQ7EJFILi4kFtss6UYyXKiRbKNJbPk7RfDPsC2f_EdOJ8P9-CU0_L8zyXavbi9Oo7Oe1fD2o564ZLCUR0BqQvQhZQjOVk9kOlRRosGetQ9DSBf1gCgniYzI7OGfg4eedbUzwP3czewTPZ0gNAgKI3milNQyOwDavIDz0LBHrfD5xR4Kfy17qm9r0tsMttXa1sV3U3QKGj07N95XXyM17AWQeOWeamiG49WXIlTOoro7rFwyoL0Get67CGK7s7xtwQuG6fnIrr7x-P2T2kNIHc7bd8p51S1EQqep3BOyPbHe34CAAD__xEFbOg)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyM0LGK6zAQheGnkbqEmbGQ7EJFILi4kFtss6UYyXKiRbKNJbPk7RfDPsC2f_EdOJ8P9-CU0_L8zyXavbi9Oo7Oe1fD2o564ZLCUR0BqQvQhZQjOVk9kOlRRosGetQ9DSBf1gCgniYzI7OGfg4eedbUzwP3czewTPZ0gNAgKI3milNQyOwDavIDz0LBHrfD5xR4Kfy17qm9r0tsMttXa1sV3U3QKGj07N95XXyM17AWQeOWeamiG49WXIlTOoro7rFwyoL0Get67CGK7s7xtwQuG6fnIrr7x-P2T2kNIHc7bd8p51S1EQqep3BOyPbHe34CAAD__xEFbOg)**

name: Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SxYvwe9Aye8tuViKCQmN9A~~/AARclAA~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SxYvwe9Aye8tuViKCQmN9A~~/AARclAA~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/SxYvwe9Aye8tuViKCQmN9A~~/AARclAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | ~ | | ~ Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. ~ Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

name: Jerry Evans
subject: America First
body:
| | |

| Friend,
Earlier this week, I participated in a candidate forum with the other candidates. I highlighted my conservative vision for how to get our country back on track. I laid out a pathway forward for America: closing the southern border, fighting Bidenflation, and pursuing policies that strengthen the family, not tear it down.
There were certainly differences among the candidates, specifically on foreign policy and how the U.S. should lead on the world stage. My view is that we need new leadership. Joe Biden has not led with strength and the world is less safe because of his actions.
But, the bottom line is that unless we beat the Democrats and win this seat in November, Bill Foster and Qasim Rashid will continue to support the same failed policies that got us into this mess. [With your support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CBx-Mn5_ViI-SthAuagkxhd38vtAlf41znn-1ef6rZT3P9BSGgTCI5CwLRKDbnQrXNURHGnzMahCC59J9VzXSQBAp1nvH0xjYyocBDTfStezDHFflPndbbEz92yZBjbiCXil9_JpKlqx3smG4N6tcghlNRn8h05i8NE1axFXI4O6tWLTqWWkT0tIUdqTqVdu2rbzjjpjZXQ=&c=gm4ZeRU71QbbfF0lM-t8QwQ1F-Z3dI_bKQY3szdRBDAA-4mSwxNsIA==&ch=Sqa2XbXFZ0Nu1EUvSP6HMQcYqV_OzY067q9qbrlMIGgQFyPAxgX2mw==) we can continue to build towards the March primary and winning the Republican nomination. We know that many patriots like you have supported us, but we cannot win without you. [Please donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CBx-Mn5_ViI-SthAuagkxhd38vtAlf41znn-1ef6rZT3P9BSGgTCI5CwLRKDbnQrXNURHGnzMahCC59J9VzXSQBAp1nvH0xjYyocBDTfStezDHFflPndbbEz92yZBjbiCXil9_JpKlqx3smG4N6tcghlNRn8h05i8NE1axFXI4O6tWLTqWWkT0tIUdqTqVdu2rbzjjpjZXQ=&c=gm4ZeRU71QbbfF0lM-t8QwQ1F-Z3dI_bKQY3szdRBDAA-4mSwxNsIA==&ch=Sqa2XbXFZ0Nu1EUvSP6HMQcYqV_OzY067q9qbrlMIGgQFyPAxgX2mw==) to our campaign.

For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. We know that running a campaign is a team effort and that no candidate can win on their own. Therefore, we ask you to share this message with your friends, family, and neighbors who wish to join the campaign. A donation of just [$40](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CBx-Mn5_ViI-SthAuagkxhd38vtAlf41znn-1ef6rZT3P9BSGgTCI5CwLRKDbnQrXNURHGnzMahCC59J9VzXSQBAp1nvH0xjYyocBDTfStezDHFflPndbbEz92yZBjbiCXil9_JpKlqx3smG4N6tcghlNRn8h05i8NE1axFXI4O6tWLTqWWkT0tIUdqTqVdu2rbzjjpjZXQ=&c=gm4ZeRU71QbbfF0lM-t8QwQ1F-Z3dI_bKQY3szdRBDAA-4mSwxNsIA==&ch=Sqa2XbXFZ0Nu1EUvSP6HMQcYqV_OzY067q9qbrlMIGgQFyPAxgX2mw==) can make a difference and help us reach more voters. Also, please visit our website at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CBx-Mn5_ViI-SthAuagkxhd38vtAlf41znn-1ef6rZT3P9BSGgTCI0z-Gq5rwD6lXbMH1J10Oxs4VYSCo_HTd187LexudWrmCXUNGZEEbvCy8FMd6RPpL5MnsxlnrCbA8Q2b4BBn1-bh0-0kQBe0wwMdb_xIgJgq&c=gm4ZeRU71QbbfF0lM-t8QwQ1F-Z3dI_bKQY3szdRBDAA-4mSwxNsIA==&ch=Sqa2XbXFZ0Nu1EUvSP6HMQcYqV_OzY067q9qbrlMIGgQFyPAxgX2mw==) to find out how you can help our movement here at home!

body:
In Washington, D.C., the Trump legal team missed a [Thursday deadline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0WrMGQwsU17nLtlRbG62QjMAhwrLz9Kded9LfzSaPR_Lkvd0eBjsdvF3Fqe1qcb_TGBbg0HNSium3aEQGHDidphJVW6BG65-St0XqXqN1mt9HYb77BTa-7FX7dZEcTCFACpJFCj0r3fh-MGZS0Wq4rDIopgRu1VPpXoqM9cQ-f9MbS-xS7MD1by5UNvxjMDObruvpj9Qde9esM5pwCNfKVwVzPXDAi9-ksjcHcyhkzT7lV_h9xlzO6wCnG86D24T44ivzb5JG_3MFHHtxVT2qVF384OVg73roybfmiEKiOhinxiI7Cv5Xtx8_-BgAA__9vnnAv) to file a petition with the Supreme Court to challenge an appeals court decision that rejected his immunity arguments. The lawsuit holding Trump accountable for the January 6th riot is expected to move forward.

# Saturday, February 17, 2024
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this day in 1864, the Confederate Navy submarine _H.L. Hunley_ sunk the Union Navy's USS _Housatonic_ by planting a torpedo in its hull. It was the first recorded sinking of a ship by a submarine. ([See more here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFv8yAQgOFfgzdbcMbYGRi-xVu-taNF8BGuxRDBJVb-fdXO3V_plZ6P63Z1lCjf_7sDLYeyOc_0wg16NfegN93tNiACjh1aNctFLXIy0EUrF3_ZLw7BTGY00lwQw6IDer-HSeq9IwsStAQ1KzkZPQ0-jPM8arVM6naDUQstcScudfgslDliSO_ywjr4cnTJRuZHE-M_AauA9TzP4XQ1UuNS3yUnyvgTClgpN3aZe1eZfMImYH221sfybI5LJt83yl-U70PkI3XV7o-TUqJmZqHl_XCUfpf8J8B3AAAA__8kEF8S)) _A note from Cole, today's Editor:_ Our old enemy, _Influenza B_ , really knocked me out this week, but I'm feeling a lot better now. Thanks for sending all the notes! I appreciate the support from _The Flyover_ community. Also, this [get-well card](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQRb_GdCB7PNhOQfEkRJfXbomMGRNvMCBjgvL3q2RTbnt0Zq7u_br2VxvmsEz_baQm-7W3LocH9VAKXQL2WIyNJwKSBTVCcyMMrxUUt0YA1GDImIuqYbgoR4g1eCP5ICzgUIQGOCAHoQWvFdaV81JricLUYhhAIkNOY8hrqr7XsOQb-fm5PihVbo3F3Nxy3nYm_zHoGHTneVY2UgrOLlMiymGZ9pfJoNuCux8bk11KTLZPBioy2TJQeb3TwmSbvBmFNpZK60cqcQBVGo-qFAOgRqURrGOgjhz7SGM4Xvefr790X4_kiMmWog3zBzobNxumdwI5Cg9KRWrG7QzzHHalGfLppb8L5T_n_QkAAP__Zwh5FA) was very impressive. Thanks, Bryan Reese! Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu8yAQAOCngS3WcWBwBoZfijz97trRInDY12ITOTRV376qOjb7N32v0zwFLrwvL2Ej33KdQ2z8oBlPyp3QzEYmn4mQtCSvHAxqgN6iXD2Bygly0GiDOw9go0VIAMGlMxIEyR4BDaByCnpr-i5m7Zw2aujV9YraCAOUuNWje6u8t5Vy-aoPOrpYN1n82trtLvQ_gaPA8S8ROE5h4fif9_cfo0cS-pJun1wK360TBpYtcPm19qNtQl8MyMM_N7I9DfgOAAD__5AdWoY). [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ9m6UD2rmF9hYtfQnT3VyelRDZeH464A4FzUd4-IkqZZkajmeLTvF3Hq89Lft7_-4e4ktbRTyW_ZMRac41mNFV0SQSFKnGaldVWtR1Ws6Oo2Qoq64MJ7APb1GqOojoSy_5SZYcKjULNWrWdaZspETMZbVsdApIBoyTmsu7N-5qfZZa0fK0v2ZtpfVSLm0vZDqB_gAPgkELz9Cfa5st8LgCHPZ7SbPMGNBw5AvVakwXsto8A1KNRLRNgN-kz_dLUtyHl_Sj1RamzQ6D-dALqb0O1u7h95mXJR8dg1P3h8_JDVP785zsAAP__KcNe1Q) is paying the bills for us today. Give them a look!
|
---
## Trump's Legal Woes
This week saw a lot of movement in former President Trump's legal cases. In Washington, D.C., the Trump legal team skipped a [Thursday deadline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0WrMGQwsU17nLtlRbG62QjMAhwrLz9Kded9LfzSaPR_Lkvd0eBjsdvF3Fqe1qcb_TGBbg0HNSium3aEQGHDidphJVW6BG65-St0XqXqN1mt9HYb77BTa-7FX7dZEcTCFACpJFCj0r3fh-MGZS0Wq4rDIopgRu1VPpXoqM9cQ-f9MbS-xS7MD1by5UNvxjMDObruvpj9Qde9esM5pwCNfKVwVzPXDAi9-ksjcHcyhkzT7lV_h9xlzO6wCnG86D24T44ivzb5JG_3MFHHtxVT2qVF384OVg73roybfmiEKiOhinxiI7Cv5Xtx8_-BgAA__9vnnAv) to file a petition with the Supreme Court to challenge an appeals court decision that rejected his immunity arguments. The lawsuit holding Trump accountable for the events of January 6th is expected to move forward. [A New York judge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1iXy18yMHRhS9eOFsGXhAobC5NYffvKnbt--qRzdL5u0y3kktfHZ1jI9VSnEHt-04RcWI5qUsPsEhGSHMgJCxdxAW1weLpwBy3RBmkMGkrXFCmASDHoiAABh-wQUAEKK0AbpceYpLVSiYsW9ztKxRTQnHtt43fNa39SKj_1TW2MdRmKe_a-7Ux-MPQM_XEc41ZL7jnW88DQr3TsDP1JYegBGXphGPreXsvGUwuvmcewE39Tm3PsXGrgSy4l15UDCCWuVxiam7fjHHdjmYLHEnL5M-j_9vgNAAD__7NhXkY) ruled Friday that Trump and his companies did commit financial fraud and ordered the former President to pay a $355 million fine, plus $98.6 million in "pre-judgment interest." The judge also barred Trump from serving as an officer or director of any New York corporation for three years. Finally, the hearing in Atlanta, Georgia to determine whether or not[ Fani Willis](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdEb2YBhe4eI1dJs2JfLi8e4kBiPbC9m_jzZpU15d6ejovF_mi-PI2-3NrWRrSLNbKh80g9Qowcym8TYQAXUNWY1q1KPqB2ju1oRuMPjPQO-XoHF0iEh9ACQcdPC6YQsKjAKNWvWD6dsldIid0WOvr1fojDCKPNeU24_EW71TiM90UG6XtDbR3mvdi-j-C5gETOd5tiF9bXSW1y9ginyQfG0Bk3cyuI3lyTFykdV9UpGlus3LQkvavPTuKXndc9opSxeC4yxrfqy73HMqtDxqyk22fv9FDCiMuq2O449N_bPNdwAAAP__yeBn2A) will remain on the Trump election fraud case concluded. Willis did not testify on the second day, and the judge has yet to render a decision.
## Putin Rival Dies in Prison
[Alexei Navalny](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL_G3oi4OzDOwNAlW7p2tLA5kquIsQx1lL-v0rnj01ue3td1ugbJst4-w4N9S2UKS5ODJ1TgFJrJ9NEnZmTq2YPTI4zaDtjfvZmjTQSO0zgPc1gW0JSIIiUCc2bbi0eNRiM40HYw9rQkco4MjBbmGcl0RnOUVvbTd5G13TnlVzl4Py3l0Wd_b22rHX10eOnwEraVn_Wt3rA3WTJ3eNl_apWg1nCEvL5U5BBV2bZSpUlZVeYQeVcYAQZjkgtsidCObqYzWJ0gRXA09ruP21Nyljq4zujbI0j-y2j_TvkNAAD__33pYWs), a leading voice of opposition and anti-corruption in Russia, died Friday while serving a 19-year sentence in an Artic penal colony. He was 47. Russian authorities have not released the cause of the political prisoner's death, only that Navalny felt sick and collapsed after a walk. [President Biden](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PnDAQQH-N6Qb5C8wWFLmCKpeUKZHBw3oiYyM8LNp_H13qq17xmqf353P-9JQoP3_5HUfeyuxXphfOGpQDbWfbhHFD1GgaHJWTgxpk1-smjmv_kPJhgg7K-G1xDgf1MN06qM4Z12NDo5baSq2ckl1vu3bdjHPGqqFTy6KNFVZiIC5n-7dQ5ohbepcXnu1a9iaNkfmowvwQehJ6uu-73Wv-ckJPmOGqQk8Z7y_c5UxB6GmhgBn8xnhC9i-f8hsqBPQcofp3hVwglGth4OgZjospg88BIlXgeD0r3HgiLBgpByAWevInfHwoOtTP3805huOmlKj2Tlj53D2l_7X87bt_AQAA__9tZnCa) believes Navalny's death was the work of Russian President Vladimir Putin. "_The answer is, we don't know exactly what happened_ ," Biden said. "_But there is no doubt that the death of Navalny was a consequence of something that Putin and his thugs did_." While there was no immediate response, the Biden administration is reportedly exploring[ new sanctions and trade restrictions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsWXCB4YWgGT03XdrOwucRUGCygQXn7Kp27nm85-j9vy82GGNL9wx5oms-L3Vp44AKUawpykYMzHhFQDGi4ZhOfmLrAsBvtFWoPTk1uXd22CqfQC7FxEA6RuyEYYCAZcM2Zukg1bl5oLSSfFF9XEJJIhi60XMbvHFLb0cdnfmAZt3wM0eytnZWINwIzgbn3Ph41vYzAjIlulsCcsNcX5hIdgfmn0o7hvldasJ45VaQt02QfNqYnfa1nLg0ddWjbTmC2hV6vPOQv-z4U484eYgz1oolk98OG-Hel_RvmNwAA__8iGmXC) on Russia.
## Weekend Viewing Options
Need something to watch this weekend? After a lengthy delay due to last summer's entertainment industry strike, several shows are returning with new seasons. "Ghosts," "So Help Me Todd," "Young Sheldon," and "Blue Bloods" all had [new episodes released](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D1vwyAQxvFPg7eL4MDYHRi6eEvXjhaYI74Wm8gmcdNPX_Vl7PxIPz36v57Hs-fM6-XFL-RqKqOfKt9pRFAdoBlNE10iQtINOdXJXvWytdjMLiYKWhN525kgkyLbqzgp-6SjngzJhh1KNBJVp2RrTXuaku46bVTfqhBQG2EkRa5lO70VXutMKT_KnbbTVJYmu7nW6y70s8BB4BBp4vi7CRy-ZYGDRIGDsgKHQHuFlQ5Yyp1ph30uxw4H0TutEVaqKfMHzLd8A7_4z7LCdeOFYA4FEoXt5rcHKAt_cLO5eD04Z95tJ4y8LJ7zz6_6b6WvAAAA___oTWeB) on Paramount+. clean_body: In Washington, D.C., the Trump legal team missed a to file a petition with the Supreme Court to challenge an appeals court decision that rejected his immunity arguments. The lawsuit holding Trump accountable for the January 6th riot is expected to move forward. | | | | | | Saturday, February 17, 2024 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1864, the Confederate Navy submarine H.L. Hunley sunk the Union Navy's USS Housatonic by planting a torpedo in its hull. It was the first recorded sinking of a ship by a submarine. () A note from Cole, today's Editor: Our old enemy, Influenza B , really knocked me out this week, but I'm feeling a lot better now. Thanks for sending all the notes! I appreciate the support from The Flyover community. Also, this was very impressive. Thanks, Bryan Reese! Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . is paying the bills for us today. Give them a look! | Trump's Legal Woes This week saw a lot of movement in former President Trump's legal cases. In Washington, D.C., the Trump legal team skipped a to file a petition with the Supreme Court to challenge an appeals court decision that rejected his immunity arguments. The lawsuit holding Trump accountable for the events of January 6th is expected to move forward. ruled Friday that Trump and his companies did commit financial fraud and ordered the former President to pay a $355 million fine, plus $98.6 million in "pre-judgment interest." The judge also barred Trump from serving as an officer or director of any New York corporation for three years. Finally, the hearing in Atlanta, Georgia to determine whether or not will remain on the Trump election fraud case concluded. Willis did not testify on the second day, and the judge has yet to render a decision. Putin Rival Dies in Prison , a leading voice of opposition and anti-corruption in Russia, died Friday while serving a 19-year sentence in an Artic penal colony. He was 47. Russian authorities have not released the cause of the political prisoner's death, only that Navalny felt sick and collapsed after a walk. believes Navalny's death was the work of Russian President Vladimir Putin. "The answer is, we don't know exactly what happened ," Biden said. "But there is no doubt that the death of Navalny was a consequence of something that Putin and his thugs did." While there was no immediate response, the Biden administration is reportedly exploring on Russia. Weekend Viewing Options Need something to watch this weekend? After a lengthy delay due to last summer's entertainment industry strike, several shows are returning with new seasons. "Ghosts," "So Help Me Todd," "Young Sheldon," and "Blue Bloods" all had on Paramount+. not interested in Sunday's Daytona 500 can relive Tom Brady's time in the AFC with "The Dynasty: New England Patriots" on Apple TV+. Old-school wrestling fans also have an option; "The Iron Claw," the story of the Von Erich family, is available for rent or purchase. Finally, Peacock now features "," the Oscar favorite that stood toe-to-toe with "Barbie" at the box office last year. name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c32b74a0d1442c8a663bb660607a5c5&_e=HhbUzB6DLiHzUuBNhBFqDe4NpWfUf-Mrmv1oWprQuRFEiUFcwBR6S3m1fnREsGjEZRqETUipok1zm0gcJn3Ae_aUhpTIESdGNuLoaNMLiP6mn-OqFccDLsB7cFaKLJV2RgVnmcbeZ_r9IssZaYpyu4OQr85mRS1npfZDAsSOCS05zrFDT7TWgwlDAU_p9wc43NpGmPpHFQZgnrDTyDk-XirkkBBby9hNR56CtesWv1gphYgrZcGEEwKUCNhlrAtSYNLIh56Z3JVc3BYQGK4hM7NAp4ETGLeyDoVG-4pMe1J1rkhX8xvNsmeM6rcXL2nP89orfUEmPqdv67k04DT4as9n0JdZ_l36yqs-raUMP0Fk3EgViBaEijax5xtP0n0s7HJR-om0hEef7j8lIyu19Q%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c32b74a0d1442c8a663bb660607a5c5&_e=HhbUzB6DLiHzUuBNhBFqDe4NpWfUf-Mrmv1oWprQuRFEiUFcwBR6S3m1fnREsGjEZRqETUipok1zm0gcJn3Ae_aUhpTIESdGNuLoaNMLiP6mn-OqFccDLsB7cFaKLJV2RgVnmcbeZ_r9IssZaYpyu4OQr85mRS1npfZDAsSOCS05zrFDT7TWgwlDAU_p9wc43NpGmPpHFQZgnrDTyDk-XirkkBBby9hNR56CtesWv1gphYgrZcGEEwKUCNhlrAtSOBlySthDTGTxVQ_w41CSfPM6CGCZc_NVRFa1Q3MAKJfRyKlsn7Qw5oQNkb_0AFALGz_8K_x9BhJv8xmRo9nWXKXv6ULW62Eh3TGc0MAm8YzWYQGVtoYDqAht5khBlDFB2hU9yhF0QRCqUTxJAyExwA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8c32b74a0d1442c8a663bb660607a5c5&_e=HhbUzB6DLiHzUuBNhBFqDe4NpWfUf-Mrmv1oWprQuRFEiUFcwBR6S3m1fnREsGjEZRqETUipok1zm0gcJn3Ae_aUhpTIESdGNuLoaNMLiP6mn-OqFccDLsB7cFaKLJV2RgVnmcbeZ_r9IssZaYpyu4OQr85mRS1npfZDAsSOCS05zrFDT7TWgwlDAU_p9wc43NpGmPpHFQZgnrDTyDk-XirkkBBby9hNR56CtesWv1gphYgrZcGEEwKUCNhlrAtSVB8t1HTpV30_BM1fr0J0g8nlQkR5g_aeRxs5UvRw7dmTLwTalLSpLrT-7R82ZrukFmnMTf3ER1-ZzBy5uWIxictYDQcKELEughsPaqanqF_FzBVgSODbRBg58AsT6YMgB8necwDZAFKiWyJuubeXKg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: you're invited – but please keep it quiet
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

If I invited you to an exclusive digital event about how we can win this November at the polls, _could I count on you to tune in?_
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-y/)
You see, I need all _Students for Life Action_ supporters to join me **THIS SUNDAY, February 18th** at **8:00 PM EST,** for an exclusive _(and confidential)_ supporter webcast that I’ll be hosting with one of our star student leaders from Montana, Kaitlyn Ruch, as well as other _Students for Life_ team members.

The purpose of our **"Turning out the Pro-Life Youth Vote" Webcast** is so that I can personally share with you our confidential plans to engage our student army to help out vote the most pro-abortion administration in our nation's history this November.

I would be honored to have you join, Pro-Life Friend!

**RSVP NOW FOR THE WEBCAST:** **[https://act.studentsforlifeaction.com/webcast/](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-j/)**

_If you can’t tune into the webcast, don’t worry!_

You can still help our critical election year programs by **[making your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $25 to _Students for Life Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-i/)!**

If you can agree to a contribution of $50 or more, I’ll mail you a _Make America Pro-Life Again_ Hat as a thank you for taking time out of your schedule to hear from me!

Pro-Life Friend, state-by-state analytics show total pregnancies protected by the lifesaving laws in place since the fall of _Roe_ are up to an estimated 170,000 per year.

**That’s tens of thousands of babies saved!**

But we can’t call ourselves pro-lifers if we think that’s simply “good enough.”

You and I have a responsibility to throw our full weight into helping vote pro-abortion lawmakers **_OUT_** of office and vote **_IN_** the most pro-life ones, so **_ALL_** babies are freed from the violence of abortion!

That's why I'm personally asking you to carve out time to hear our battleplan this **Sunday evening - 8:00 PM Eastern Time, February 18th.**
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-d/)
**Webcast Sign Up Link:****[https://act.studentsforlifeaction.com/webcast/](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-h/)**

I appreciate your support for our students and am incredibly excited to share with you the necessary work we must do to protect lifesaving laws and introduce new ones.

**[Or, if you’d like, you can support our work with a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-k/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life!

I look forward to seeing you soon!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

**Webcast Sign Up Link:****[https://act.studentsforlifeaction.com/webcast/](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-u/)**

[**DONATE TO _STUDENTS FOR LIFE ACTION_**](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-shijltt-duchtdja-o/)

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-shijltt-026154D2-duchtdja-b) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-u-shijltt-duchtdja-n/)
**

name: Amanda Chase
subject: What happened in the Virginia Senate This Week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Bills That Passed Out of the Senate & Heading to the House
| | | | VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY WEEKLY RECAP SENATE
WEEK ENDING 2/16/24
---
---
| Friends, House bills have now crossed over to the Virginia Senate and Senate bills are now being debated and voted on in the Virginia House. "Cross over," as we call it, took place Tuesday at midnight.
House bills are now in Senate subcommittees and committees and any bills that made it out of committee will be debated and discussed on the Senate floor beginning Monday. It takes awhile for the bills to make it from committee to the floor, but once it does, you will see the volume of the bills debated on the Senate floor increase.
Below is a comprehensive list of bills that have failed and bills that passed out of the Senate. Most of the bills listed are Senate bills but there are a few House bills listed as they've come out of committee.
If you desire to get more information on one of the bills listed below just click the button below for each committee and the bill history and summary is listed.
---
|
---
Please also consider following me on [Facebook at Amanda Chase Virginia Senator](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEAOucYoNJcNZ6ndC2s-vHE5HF7uFSxlHVlNMkR7uUqgJECVu0WTOVIchy5RGTpcDZ8vOhXRtI67rsiVK8isIMzlxFhtT1nob9k6azEyppe18g-5bqiQO7IYfCN0u3KrJK81j9NvtbJtXVmbOzexLX3dzI5iNmnGYWdDcblTQZu3g_cSOqTEgEDiXTLgcmjd&c=zVRCsZAd7Ubogd_1yDThS7peEiXJv8AOi_BKgXciU_hwezCRGDYq1g==&ch=MC9dVzpV4IsKfOEL0QY056XetwepJCZhG35j3LP8A3aWkDVQJoV6iw==) for my real time daily posts regarding votes on controversial and significant impact bills.
Hope you find my daily and weekly newsletter along with my Facebook posts helpful in following the General Assembly.
---
|
# Senator Louise Lucas Shuts Down Governor Youngkin's Economic Development Proposal Arena
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jEAOucYoNJcNZ6ndC2s-vHE5HF7uFSxlHVlNMkR7uUqgJECVu0WTOVQ52iJFbRMDHF7IB6f0n6_Auj5gZtQFTMSly4G-CrmcRPvVbHKcJulM2SR9uwChSTeWSt4bSQQF2DO3Me43PlU93oXjn-VuHQ8m3txTkNkayu-v54QDiKzwQu7bR62mdQ==&c=zVRCsZAd7Ubogd_1yDThS7peEiXJv8AOi_BKgXciU_hwezCRGDYq1g==&ch=MC9dVzpV4IsKfOEL0QY056XetwepJCZhG35j3LP8A3aWkDVQJoV6iw==)
---
WATCH THIS
Democrat Senator Louise Lucas should allow every bill to be heard in the Senate. It's the custom of the Senate. However, she took it upon herself as the chair to "pocket veto" the bill, meaning the bill was not docketed or heard.
Senators on the Senate Finance Committee should be able to hear the merits of the Governor's economic development proposal . Instead, she alone made the decision for the Commonwealth .

I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.

clean_body: Bills That Passed Out of the Senate & Heading to the House | | | | VIRGINIA GENERAL ASSEMBLY WEEKLY RECAP SENATE WEEK ENDING 2/16/24 | Friends, House bills have now crossed over to the Virginia Senate and Senate bills are now being debated and voted on in the Virginia House. "Cross over," as we call it, took place Tuesday at midnight. House bills are now in Senate subcommittees and committees and any bills that made it out of committee will be debated and discussed on the Senate floor beginning Monday. It takes awhile for the bills to make it from committee to the floor, but once it does, you will see the volume of the bills debated on the Senate floor increase. Below is a comprehensive list of bills that have failed and bills that passed out of the Senate. Most of the bills listed are Senate bills but there are a few House bills listed as they've come out of committee. If you desire to get more information on one of the bills listed below just click the button below for each committee and the bill history and summary is listed. | Please also consider following me on == for my real time daily posts regarding votes on controversial and significant impact bills. Hope you find my daily and weekly newsletter along with my Facebook posts helpful in following the General Assembly. | Senator Louise Lucas Shuts Down Governor Youngkin's Economic Development Proposal Arena | == WATCH THIS Democrat Senator Louise Lucas should allow every bill to be heard in the Senate. It's the custom of the Senate. However, she took it upon herself as the chair to "pocket veto" the bill, meaning the bill was not docketed or heard. Senators on the Senate Finance Committee should be able to hear the merits of the Governor's economic development proposal . Instead, she alone made the decision for the Commonwealth . | | | BILLS THAT PASSED OUT OF SENATE COMMITTEES HIGHLIGHTS | Here's a list of Senate bills that have passed out of the various Senate committees and are moving forward either to the Senate Floor for a vote, to the Senate Finance Committee to be funded or rereferred to another committee, if the committee believes the bill subject should be heard in another committee. | STATUS OF BILLS IN PRIVILEGES & ELECTIONS HIGHLIGHTS | | == | == | Failed legislation: == == == == == == == == == == | | == | Legislation reported out: == == == name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b9f7d5112a34f1a939bc7318fedb2f4&_e=pDl0hCsbl0XWVyMPE-qprADYEqWG1yTv95MIyHrkyOHzbJ1JdICqxkMCI-7Xb9nW1GmOx7PGIpnKbB1UyKuf4cqgPG2CMluIapmAbfVNZxVPTVcU0zWTWbG-coxJh69-rxG789eUXMSGtlLEck6gzZEn__3g8BQ8cvdDpoJ9cEDhOAHsXLLVBDtDUunKJplSgwkPDWhjfDWwrO6Iab3r1P8NS2uPlU8ufuLTPWrFvUqA4RFAUYCORpekaaz7O-x9tFeGBY7spiHHZFqkw4bSOdbuUgvnOvHPdBymAweo-V7Sb8R3-ArVEySwT-4q0mCz). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. clean_body: This might be your only warning. The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis This might be your only warning. According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: " Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling . When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0763ce5febed4cf9a119dfb87b25e17c&_e=4xZ0P0A4mW-R-X4F7eI3QKb7bTAqAoLeN7qWdPUFl5hKbZ_XjZEjPJDX7YaUzAT3IKAHqh44zcEU5DsEu5AhTPQ4AAzzuLiiZMxbs3ZDtCfuRZxm0YZI0xnwgBDAoV2_byS5oXIBMR2vqGowzvMP4ZGGhpq4gfzf4qYp6aktIa1nX-aSqaOAuvZObRqsY3yMcHWH2umYNZd-NL0Y6sJ0ieBxmwINT2fUNxbK5el4hwEjmH2FGBBgjRdfsQbw1CxGXOBYgM4mbLixXkkNuSWfMD3hpZKeGEZQEJLuxAjf6XWl-Md64mDYAqNchcgYo3qSbWTjKu8G3OrVt581qnlSkkz87Kf4uElu1JNojmU0knNEfdYX0lA5BqBEPrTK03S8ysHVrGuD6OYN_CmYx6Sbjg%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0763ce5febed4cf9a119dfb87b25e17c&_e=4xZ0P0A4mW-R-X4F7eI3QKb7bTAqAoLeN7qWdPUFl5hKbZ_XjZEjPJDX7YaUzAT3IKAHqh44zcEU5DsEu5AhTPQ4AAzzuLiiZMxbs3ZDtCfuRZxm0YZI0xnwgBDAoV2_byS5oXIBMR2vqGowzvMP4ZGGhpq4gfzf4qYp6aktIa1nX-aSqaOAuvZObRqsY3yMcHWH2umYNZd-NL0Y6sJ0ieBxmwINT2fUNxbK5el4hwGVg_sGDdlKD4s3QtCUK9LCrGu_-ZsziMtdcs5j8fUPAzWQGFiZJq3VhlwwOqFhqMXmPD3z9TNbrMolGAfWdbFJF8gDRHgWfXlf_-jhAwm_uYhrBdtH5JR3j9lHfykUyiZv1-L5qhMmmztLkTb00IsRSbQP3ARVFEBdoQomTqcmmw%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0763ce5febed4cf9a119dfb87b25e17c&_e=4xZ0P0A4mW-R-X4F7eI3QKb7bTAqAoLeN7qWdPUFl5hKbZ_XjZEjPJDX7YaUzAT3IKAHqh44zcEU5DsEu5AhTPQ4AAzzuLiiZMxbs3ZDtCfuRZxm0YZI0xnwgBDAoV2_byS5oXIBMR2vqGowzvMP4ZGGhpq4gfzf4qYp6aktIa1nX-aSqaOAuvZObRqsY3yMcHWH2umYNZd-NL0Y6sJ0ieBxmwINT2fUNxbK5el4hwFIlN0uFiVh9cyuVhDv888q4851nOnub7ZR0GVlmGi0rEFf_cw2aZGG_42dtPrTW1tPNyacihP1THkNLoIBbZIXOhg8BObNT6LeuLWrrPwdjuUKSzoTQ7PgX_gqtv0oVYBJoREcPcc3K30qH5zAoIf3Uh0U_F0WskV6zPvut9FcJw%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0763ce5febed4cf9a119dfb87b25e17c&_e=4xZ0P0A4mW-R-X4F7eI3QKb7bTAqAoLeN7qWdPUFl5hKbZ_XjZEjPJDX7YaUzAT3IKAHqh44zcEU5DsEu5AhTPQ4AAzzuLiiZMxbs3ZDtCfuRZxm0YZI0xnwgBDAoV2_byS5oXIBMR2vqGowzvMP4ZGGhpq4gfzf4qYp6aktIa1nX-aSqaOAuvZObRqsY3yMcHWH2umYNZd-NL0Y6sJ0ieBxmwINT2fUNxbK5el4hwG2nhY3Dko8JLK3DqPHDR4viazo2RFaNDAC8UHniTzts6B1-1rS0-AdDNMPTh7_xipO2dX-eG08LQOFdCGKlGrcF_LZFjqzbFuyDQ-Nwf6oKcze-MsyJMA3nCvVzXbvKsVNfOU58e2amHYNYTRjZXPdIxboQ4whPqLIO5RJuipcDg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
