| Dear Friends and Supporters, I wanted to reach out and invite you to an upcoming fundraiser for my friends Daralyn Heywood and Michael Arnold, who are running for the Republican State Committee to represent the Cape and Islands. It will be TONIGHT at 6 PM. The event will be at Cape Gun Works in Hyannis. Below is an invitation.
I hope you can attend. Please consider donating in advance online, and checks will also be accepted at the door.
Daralyn and Michael really need your support. They are running against Will and Judy Crocker, who are self-described "Charlie Baker Republicans" and have pledged in the past to not support President Trump.
Even if you cannot attend, please consider donating to support Daralyn and Michael. Below are links to donate.
Below is an invitation. Please share it with your friends. Here is a link to the Facebook event: [https://fb.me/e/ctdr81ICp](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j44j6ROnhZwijDzDZMwT5GZb1w4zSugV0RAl6gIpUj8NiKI_C5mxzXMq2BQu2wEL2zvARYqThWvY6n3VAmfx5Sb8Glx9bZQ9K_QMeMu1YwmJFU2iBpIV-XwFyMNGfpOVcOly2uNoEG-gmYHE8qs4Pw==&c=BXs73jNRioyBQZ4y5XLD5fW3hfuiwsvPY6lsu12QVTNu9w6unOropA==&ch=H_qNsBQAlknKSGAAIwUnJcu9Kc1ZKka-yTh8PQTnQLij_Y_Iq5uBBw==)

name: Christian
subject: It's GO TIME.
body:
I'll make this quick. Early voting is here. Can you believe it?

There's still time to help us fund the last leg of this campaign - TV, radio, and digital. They're all expensive, but necessary ways to reach voters with Castelli's America First message.

Secure the Border Now. Peace through American strength. American energy independence. We don't have much time to turn this country around. We MUST move voters to the polls.

Will you help today?

**_Would you please consider a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, or what you can give TODAY._**
[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

[Volunteer at a poll for Castelli.](https://castellifornc.com/volunteer-news/)

We continue to be hard at work in the 6th District. Here are some photos from Castelli's A-Team at the polls.

_I 'm asking for your support. I'm asking you to get behind the most qualified candidate in this race. And I am asking you to join the team of the most experienced and proven conservative in this race._

**_Would you please consider a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250 or what you can give TODAY._**
[](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=5f84dedf-1bbb-4104-9f3c-ad0f56adc2c8).

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: The battle for free speech is going to the Supreme Court
body:
conservative voices are being suppressed

| | | [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyEkMFqxCAURb_G7GbQp9Fx4aJ0yKZM6a5LeZo3GRlNgiaU_n1J6b7bc-FwOZ83f8OU0zy9YyH3jNXX5pF8CB5LinvzwEGdOJyE8dCNbrRRo-7ICcMvwvTK8u7hFMqo8R4Nt_dAdlSkob9beZFIgfrQJXd4OAgjhNKCn0FCMEYLOyoJgQemOGaq2_lJtMZlniq1VmndQ04R53NcSpfdY9vWxuQLg4HBEDB852UORMfMYFgzzo3JYd-KLzSmvTB5pYIpM9AHbMteIzF5RfojEcuKaZqZvL69fijdW9NVN65fKefUtGGKT4fg98D2b6GfAAAA__-wYGu2)
---
|
---
[](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyEkMFqxCAURb_G7GbQp9Fx4aJ0yKZM6a5LeZo3GRlNgiaU_n1J6b7bc-FwOZ83f8OU0zy9YyH3jNXX5pF8CB5LinvzwEGdOJyE8dCNbrRRo-7ICcMvwvTK8u7hFMqo8R4Nt_dAdlSkob9beZFIgfrQJXd4OAgjhNKCn0FCMEYLOyoJgQemOGaq2_lJtMZlniq1VmndQ04R53NcSpfdY9vWxuQLg4HBEDB852UORMfMYFgzzo3JYd-KLzSmvTB5pYIpM9AHbMteIzF5RfojEcuKaZqZvL69fijdW9NVN65fKefUtGGKT4fg98D2b6GfAAAA__-wYGu2)
---
**One of the most important free speech cases of our time is going before the Supreme Court, and you probably haven’t heard about it.** Right now, both Texas and Florida are battling to uphold their common-sense bills that prohibit viewpoint discrimination on social media. These bills were passed for a reason — conservative voices are being suppressed. Disfavored opinions (and even jokes) that are out of step with the progressive narrative have resulted in countless violations and suspensions. And that’s not an exaggeration; we’ve experienced many cases of discriminatory censorship firsthand. In fact, we were locked out of Twitter for 8 months just because we told a joke that referred to a male person (“Admiral” Rachel Levine) as a man. It’s gotten completely out of hand. Thankfully, Texas and Florida decided to do something about it. They drafted and passed legislation that would make it unlawful for big social media companies to engage in viewpoint discrimination. But, as expected, the social media companies challenged these laws, leading to an upcoming showdown at the Supreme Court. What the highest Court decides here will have far-reaching implications not just for us, but for everyone who uses social media to share their views and defend their values. **_That’s why Babylon Bee has filed an amicus brief in support of the Florida and Texas laws._**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyEkMFqxCAURb_G7GbQp9Fx4aJ0yKZM6a5LeZo3GRlNgiaU_n1J6b7bc-FwOZ83f8OU0zy9YyH3jNXX5pF8CB5LinvzwEGdOJyE8dCNbrRRo-7ICcMvwvTK8u7hFMqo8R4Nt_dAdlSkob9beZFIgfrQJXd4OAgjhNKCn0FCMEYLOyoJgQemOGaq2_lJtMZlniq1VmndQ04R53NcSpfdY9vWxuQLg4HBEDB852UORMfMYFgzzo3JYd-KLzSmvTB5pYIpM9AHbMteIzF5RfojEcuKaZqZvL69fijdW9NVN65fKefUtGGKT4fg98D2b6GfAAAA__-wYGu2)
---
This is nothing new for us. We’ve long been committed to defending free speech in the public square. Here are some of the free speech battles we’ve taken on over the years:
* We filed an amicus brief with the U.S. Supreme Court in support of a humorist who was actually jailed because of a parody Facebook page.
* We sued the Attorney General's Office in the state of California to block the enforcement of a law requiring social media companies to regularly report "misinformation, disinformation, extremism, radicalization, and hate speech."
* We sued the New York Attorney General too, for the same censorship debauchery.
* We refused to delete a tweet that resulted in the suspension of our Twitter account with over 1 million followers
* We told Mark Zuckerberg he sucks

Fighting on the front lines for free speech in the public square isn’t easy or inexpensive, but it’s the right thing to do. And it’s making a difference. But we can’t do it without you. **[**Will you become a paid subscriber to The Babylon Bee to help us stay in the fight?**](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyEkMFqxCAURb_G7GbQp9Fx4aJ0yKZM6a5LeZo3GRlNgiaU_n1J6b7bc-FwOZ83f8OU0zy9YyH3jNXX5pF8CB5LinvzwEGdOJyE8dCNbrRRo-7ICcMvwvTK8u7hFMqo8R4Nt_dAdlSkob9beZFIgfrQJXd4OAgjhNKCn0FCMEYLOyoJgQemOGaq2_lJtMZlniq1VmndQ04R53NcSpfdY9vWxuQLg4HBEDB852UORMfMYFgzzo3JYd-KLzSmvTB5pYIpM9AHbMteIzF5RfojEcuKaZqZvL69fijdW9NVN65fKefUtGGKT4fg98D2b6GfAAAA__-wYGu2)**
---
[Join The Fight - Subscribe to The Babylon Bee ](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyEkMFqxCAURb_G7GbQp9Fx4aJ0yKZM6a5LeZo3GRlNgiaU_n1J6b7bc-FwOZ83f8OU0zy9YyH3jNXX5pF8CB5LinvzwEGdOJyE8dCNbrRRo-7ICcMvwvTK8u7hFMqo8R4Nt_dAdlSkob9beZFIgfrQJXd4OAgjhNKCn0FCMEYLOyoJgQemOGaq2_lJtMZlniq1VmndQ04R53NcSpfdY9vWxuQLg4HBEDB852UORMfMYFgzzo3JYd-KLzSmvTB5pYIpM9AHbMteIzF5RfojEcuKaZqZvL69fijdW9NVN65fKefUtGGKT4fg98D2b6GfAAAA__-wYGu2)
---

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Not. One. More.
body:
The left can’t win again.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| Our country is experiencing unimaginable chaos and turmoil thanks to the self-serving policies of the left. You know it because you've lived it.In the last 3 years, you've watched the Biden administration open our border to illegal immigrants, inflation take over every paycheck, and the unrelenting legal witch hunt of President Donald Trump.
[**It needs to stop.**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946a691002/1edb97946a41a5ae "It needs to stop.")__
America has become the laughingstock of the world thanks to sleepy Joe and it is not in the country 's best interest to elect another liberal to office - any office.
I need your help: We can't let the left win one more city council, one more board of education seat, or one more local, state, or national office.
So, what can you do? First, we must SECURE our elections by becoming a country full of citizens that participate in the election process and we must WIN elections by becoming active participants and turning up at the polls in great force.
To SECURE & WIN in 2024 we will secure by recruiting and training Americans to work the election and we will win by electing America First patriots into office.**_ We can only do this work with YOU involved in the process._****_
_**Be part of this mission with us as we forge ahead to November by** _[chipping in $25, $50, $100, or whatever amount you can give](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946a691002/1edb97946a41a5b0 "chipping in $25, $50, $100, or whatever amount you can give")_.** I know it's been exhausting but we must fight for our freedom, for our country.
Thank you for holding on and let's take back America together!
Thankful for you,
In liberty,
Jenny Beth **_[](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb97946a691002/1edb97946a41a5b2 "Step up today to fuel our fight to PROTECT OUR HOMELAND >>>")_****__**

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Food shortages are coming
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=069d7306da714569bb251908dfe84095&_e=0sicLKsAJntfbqF1cjXQrvbgDAcD_VyLL-yVugGEu6VvgkO3BGz0qydUsOcyGfa30sLUUGBr3g6aPqCoRG465YLu6pW6KfTpqaJjKI29y1beialOHiEC4ZeiJr-V8mm2_4z3cGzBgTvtuKVBoa4Zgn-A9yLP3WyJjeHi7AX2IV1v-i_Dap6xcvZGzow5qLgeHWhls9IhD9RH8wTDBiLvJHawtiAO1a8ZMQNfp9hFuJ9lWKJrYCfuwble0ZO3cOB_avXMFIikNDDWSYVmvYp5zFgrnxymDsrUXDl_C9kzZcYJdrsZKLmXNanYVyRD9941). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=069d7306da714569bb251908dfe84095&_e=0sicLKsAJntfbqF1cjXQrvbgDAcD_VyLL-yVugGEu6VvgkO3BGz0qydUsOcyGfa30sLUUGBr3g6aPqCoRG465YLu6pW6KfTpqaJjKI29y1beialOHiEC4ZeiJr-V8mm2_4z3cGzBgTvtuKVBoa4ZgjEkWzCYCOrf1sNu7wFF-8S8wi8vqGNO7J2v6Rb_3owpsBS4D82TAxCOBY4D5srWg1OdWXIVbUwIT5z9y14bJTkMEvd4EjN4HCVfYqhVb9l2xgyMu_yiXKpWA040C6VWkEmexd-5LMh1cLY9XBR4BO665zYUooMF_Avina0f_SFp) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=069d7306da714569bb251908dfe84095&_e=0sicLKsAJntfbqF1cjXQrvbgDAcD_VyLL-yVugGEu6VvgkO3BGz0qydUsOcyGfa30sLUUGBr3g6aPqCoRG465YLu6pW6KfTpqaJjKI29y1beialOHiEC4ZeiJr-V8mm2_4z3cGzBgTvtuKVBoa4Zgvn1-wVX5cUndnFgqFf1M2oenBzCisKgSu1zydKD_9FRpxooyzciSsODCRg81c8AcBomUC2oc1516BuvV0pmhOLIMrX3_JN2W2Bl3nRczDUDZOGIJNrperf6E4bCKpgbc95gn6wRDn0M9YYYtevg7kVECwKfivYLF5D6CNvQpzTN) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Mississippi Legislative Session - What To Watch For
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571691?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**With a massive conservative majority in the Mississippi legislature, will they deliver real conservative policy?** Or will we see the implementation of a soft-left, progressive-but-slower agenda to expand government?
---
| [Legislative Tracker](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=092ae090e3&e=5703353baa "Legislative Tracker")
---
| We have created a legislative tracker to allow you to keep an eye on what is happening in the Capitol.

Here are some of the key things to watch for:

**EDUCATION FREEDOM:** HB1076 (Representative Boyd) proposes multiple Charter School Authorizers. Great! There are also some bills tweaking the limited Special Needs Education Savings Account program we already have. Good. Also interesting are HB867 (Representative Owen) and SB2234 (Senator Johnson) which allow a greater degree of school choice within the public school system between districts. Important. **This is all good stuff, but where’s the beef on school choice, you might wonder?

The big question is will we see an Arkansas-type effort to implement universal Education Savings Accounts? We should know by this coming Friday.**
---
|
---
_Good news: Mississippi lawmakers will have the chance to pass plenty of meaningful conservative measures this session._
| **EDUCATION FUNDING:** In 2018, Mississippi came very close to overhauling its antiquated system of school funding. During the last legislative session, the Senate voted to replace the current system. **In this new session, SB2332 (Senator DeBar) proposes to reform the current system.** I suspect that there will be a lot of interest in the legislature in school funding reform this session. **Mississippi needs reforms so that we fund students, not a system. **

**BETTER HEALTHCARE:** One in four people in Mississippi already receive Medicaid benefit. Adding to that number is not going to miraculously improve health outcomes, no matter how many politicians in the legislature believe that the answer is to spend someone else’s money.

**Some bills that might actually improve health outcomes are HB419 (Representative Zuber), HB956 (Representative Scott) and SB2064 (Senator Hill).** These all propose abolishing Certificate of Needs laws, which intentionally limit the provision of healthcare in our state, in order to safeguard provision by existing cartels.

---
|
---
| **TACKLING DIVERSITY, EQUITY & INCLUSION:** The divisive DEI agenda risks tearing America apart. **With an enormous conservative majority, it ought to be possible to pass some legislation in Mississippi that prevents public institutions being taken over by the radical left, yes?**

One such proposal, which would ban state funding for DEI programs, is SB2402 (Senator Hill). Let’s hope it has some success.

**PARENTS' RIGHTS:** There are already a couple of bills that aim to strengthen the rights of parents, including HB815 (Representative Crawford) and SB2469 (Senator Parker). I expect we will also see a broad parent’s and / or a women’s bill of rights, too. Good.

---
|
---
_Riley Gaines speaking at our event in Jackson. _
| Next week will see some additional bills emerge, and we will then have to wait until March 5th to know which ones have made it out of committee (Committee chairmen exercise a de facto veto over legislation, not passing out of committee should they decide not to).

**The good news is that there are already a number of excellent bills out there, and a good chance that we will see even more. Mississippi lawmakers could pass plenty of meaningful conservative measures this session should they choose to do so.**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4961b5a697&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e1e88cdede) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=e1e88cdede).

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
| [View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMtO6zAURb_mZNbI3nbq3IEHF6ogISExaQfMHPu4seq0UR6U_D1qKUzPY-2l7fohp7haMk8EdClMBJD6T8Ayq4Pb79_GdfP-is1LdcDxtsQzAfM68N_lA1Jy71K-Tc2uCFbDyegLttKIWhqt9L-is1yxb-ttCM4Hbo2ACrUWFVizNsxtkSwEtIA0EhUgSx0Qao06tlFJo1rS4h5UxpF57tL5xGNwKa-lv_RFtt08D9NdrCE0l9CW58VnXqafL3_pCc1DmdB8Eprh6_gRq8WsV1LNvQS124795K6nczHaMFxTzmnaGtLi-Ev5DgAA___FJWCz)
|
---
| | Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0FvnDAQhX-NuRnZY3sNBw7dsGxVKWmVJrmiiT1erOIFgWm0_fUVq7TX7z29mQ_TPMZwa5g9MoAh-pUBMPWFAWxZveHr6-Ny4z--AT-bN7jsITwwgHyb6X_zc6SkhHHcqW0L32hAGVxBjbSiklYrXRdDcxAuSCSkAO5g0ShlqJLoa-tQeSmL2IAALUBaCQZAltqDrzRU4T0oadU70-J-qAwLUR7i9RctHuN4K92UirEZcp7X-2Mdg24lty1U4pX8lPcGg87j7-j5MC3TR8x_-L7jp8QdXTMte-6V8BYlhxoM18Ejr4MJHA3KIHRdGSOY6rac-nXaFkdMtcf2zJ9PTwwOO07k45aYak-Pn8RhmjFerky1__z6Y3vu26_dQ__9eIL--fTU_3zh3UtbLI2fP-I4xvVgmRaXu66b0t8AAAD__-C_glU)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0FvnDAQhX-NuRnZY3sNBw7dsGxVKWmVJrmiiT1erOIFgWm0_fUVq7TX7z29mQ_TPMZwa5g9MoAh-pUBMPWFAWxZveHr6-Ny4z--AT-bN7jsITwwgHyb6X_zc6SkhHHcqW0L32hAGVxBjbSiklYrXRdDcxAuSCSkAO5g0ShlqJLoa-tQeSmL2IAALUBaCQZAltqDrzRU4T0oadU70-J-qAwLUR7i9RctHuN4K92UirEZcp7X-2Mdg24lty1U4pX8lPcGg87j7-j5MC3TR8x_-L7jp8QdXTMte-6V8BYlhxoM18Ejr4MJHA3KIHRdGSOY6rac-nXaFkdMtcf2zJ9PTwwOO07k45aYak-Pn8RhmjFerky1__z6Y3vu26_dQ__9eIL--fTU_3zh3UtbLI2fP-I4xvVgmRaXu66b0t8AAAD__-C_glU)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8j0FvnDAQhX-NuRnZY3sNBw7dsGxVKWmVJrmiiT1erOIFgWm0_fUVq7TX7z29mQ_TPMZwa5g9MoAh-pUBMPWFAWxZveHr6-Ny4z--AT-bN7jsITwwgHyb6X_zc6SkhHHcqW0L32hAGVxBjbSiklYrXRdDcxAuSCSkAO5g0ShlqJLoa-tQeSmL2IAALUBaCQZAltqDrzRU4T0oadU70-J-qAwLUR7i9RctHuN4K92UirEZcp7X-2Mdg24lty1U4pX8lPcGg87j7-j5MC3TR8x_-L7jp8QdXTMte-6V8BYlhxoM18Ejr4MJHA3KIHRdGSOY6rac-nXaFkdMtcf2zJ9PTwwOO07k45aYak-Pn8RhmjFerky1__z6Y3vu26_dQ__9eIL--fTU_3zh3UtbLI2fP-I4xvVgmRaXu66b0t8AAAD__-C_glU)**

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Fani Willis is CORRUPT
body:
Help me remove this crooked DA from President Trump's case in Georgia >>>

| | Friend, did you see the Fani Willis hearing? The crooked Democrat DA going after Trump in Georgia was just caught lying to the court. **Fani Willis is corrupt and she MUST be removed from President Trump's case in Georgia.** And thanks to the support of patriots like you, who joined my fight to launch an investigation into Fani Willis, she was brought in front of Judge Scott McAfee to decide if she should be removed from the case. Judge McAfee's decision should be obvious... We know for certain that she has been financially benefiting from the witch-hunt against President Trump and when confronted about the facts she began to perjure herself. **But Democrats want to sweep this under the rug so it’s up to us once again to keep a spotlight on this case and show that Americans across the nation want Fani Willis removed from President Trump's case for her blatantly criminal actions.**
---
| [ ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=558561c718b34881b1ab6fe1a433be84&_e=KILu0F_lC1k3UVISqynTBPysUgJf1GsCFYtlHVUTrF-CH4VH-lQlwp74gTHvmCd-pCIB00gTwS63Osb46qPneuY3R528Mg2GZjr9SnqqoiZJJkIOD0KU5OyjOB_9JyXvGBdXNzsRRNSl2UeFAzvucTqTqprDELoKat83k1XL-J62Ynd6SGnVQlx3wWCkY-G2ULhM87sp0bwjfhnSWwKws74wC8xczZVrg4xHeBTFdas_r6JhiHu_JLc03UDtdewsVaxvr3-y4bqYKdR-daaFVF5BZl2dW5plIYlYJSmxCfyV2Q6x9cLBkvrpK_1YBmm345dIJVGOhxff7rPXZlN_nQ%3D%3D)
---
| [ **REMOVE FANI WILLIS** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=558561c718b34881b1ab6fe1a433be84&_e=KILu0F_lC1k3UVISqynTBPysUgJf1GsCFYtlHVUTrF-CH4VH-lQlwp74gTHvmCd-pCIB00gTwS63Osb46qPneuY3R528Mg2GZjr9SnqqoiZJJkIOD0KU5OyjOB_9JyXvGBdXNzsRRNSl2UeFAzvucTqTqprDELoKat83k1XL-J62Ynd6SGnVQlx3wWCkY-G26U9fpJE-jpZvcIK4DMD-OHo4qd_sLdCIMUOuYq_YJX4vZqNPQ5VpOXQssiO9wvRrZVMEhjPE7qh0ROedX1u-xgjO8eeAnJ-YzmpOQgXqNYZagMYmAZ5SHqf6mOD58KKLPjqhQMVN4T7kmbEVekbcaw%3D%3D)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e6eb9c5c5ae4a87a51f13074827f2bd&_e=SQ_oyB6Wrvk5IKi_1d5trEvUezbC5-b6KcnKIYlDQ0peufEudk8WVxoeuojIS-urH0DB9aFkWMPwwipyCzXT9IFsDfh8LkMDiQqgo6WPjSus2XCLQa1RT2VumJojwCojmUgnZDO-baPUGoNtYrOStKjWhxIYtALWGNR8W_Cw5M9A1PBeIUOZGx66sFZQNKTUhvOpkP8FWqJcQ2IBdR0FXzkOFMzci_ojmSQ_tgoDp8OBXqMJHhmA2pCh7KUxw0tRceaeJDYYDExZ3CpnzQX8ogpaSWTZ_tPokliWjOHPjqTnBCnWk9KrCzp7rp5aTilVVZ6OoLPrAPMG5w--b4aTM1N6_JJFB56qgUV2qlOAZ_47-hhg10Jw-4zjM6hVn72MCWrwafCWMhRK0EMpTVKZzQ%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Reader, It's no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.

| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ ->](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=6b4be455dcf1412381a9d62f432c8ce5&_e=eVZpuUYSQp2dWXg2qjJgnBagfHFpV4qvTnWgAkHpahdDbo6QS6EA3g-U2iCcu4f8PRvzbehu4jORU3Jcyaf4qbsDNE-57xiM5yuNwudEHv7b32OS8YCi8fCDsmK2TZoJ8xvN1bUR3GYIn7sb2PyVkHlVxIRy8yEkz6NP4mPqPilBt9hQbO4ddZLKGG3r1Nm-ER42oKLMWatParT9CkSjvsZl1ZYJ9eRfxkzYwziBuukNqM8mSNqFUnFSMDfgasfKu07xUPVzyHg_UUJ04JPCRVBBoYzI-ki1tIjMUyR1EtJTIoPVi69eg1YZ_FCv1EfWAvGi4mBx0CgkjAR0e7DOsKTkxhARzjNrIJxFCgyQdApaYYBD98uxJXsTbmzsWDHk5QrQMOCzxfa15FWiumF8MQ%3D%3D)

| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we'll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It's a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I've been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I'm asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.
---

clean_body: Our economy is a mess The Sun knows how to fix it | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Dear Reader, It's no secret that our economy is in shambles. At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press. | | | | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote: With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we'll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It's a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I've been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I'm asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time. | | | | Believe me when I say that America needs the Sun, now more than ever. And the Sun needs you. Join our movement now. For just 1c a day you can make a real difference. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails

subject: If You Value Your Freedom:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Don’t let power-hungry bureaucrats infringe on your voting rights.

Dear Peter,
The last thing Washington insiders want is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s name on the ballot.
Here’s why ...
The ruling elites want their corruption, power, and lies to continue unchallenged.
Their number one goal is to keep _you_ under their thumbs. And that’s why they want to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, not only in your state, but across the country.
If they can stop us, they can continue to subjugate _you_.
But you’re not going to let that happen, are you? You’re ready to take action and say, “ _I want my country back!_ ”
That’s why we’re counting on you to help ensure Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is on the ballot in your state. If not, your choice is limited, and your freedom is taken away.
Don’t let power-hungry bureaucrats infringe on your voting rights.
For a fair election, we must be on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia. But to reach this critical goal, _our campaign must raise $20,000,000 over the next three months._ [Can you help?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=3)
[Your gift of $5, $10, $24, or even more is essential if you want to have a say in your family's future.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=4)

[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=9)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=10)
The promise of America as the land of opportunity has dimmed under the weight of a self-serving government that has spiraled out of control.
In a democratic society, government is meant to be of, by, and for the people. However, our trust has been betrayed by institutions that have lost sight of their duty to serve the public.
_Intelligence agencies spy on our own people, including you._
_Government and tech platforms invade your privacy, access your personal data, and censor you._
_Regulatory agencies have been captured by those they are supposed to regulate:_
* _Wall Street controls the SEC_
* _Polluters dominate the EPA_
* _Big Pharma is in cahoots with the CDC, NIH, and FDA_
* _Big Ag controls the USDA_

_In the end, it all hurts you._
No wonder trust in government is at an all-time low. It’s time to earn it back.
As President, RFK, Jr. will prosecute officials who abuse the public’s trust. He’ll slam shut the revolving door that shunts people from government agencies to lucrative positions in the companies they were supposed to regulate, and back again.
_And he’ll get money out of politics and restore government integrity._
[If this sounds good to you, can we count on your support?](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=about_you_2_17_24_eml_1rs_nd1&n=11)
The prosperity of you and your family in the days ahead depends on fair elections. Do you want to be a subject or a citizen?
_If you value your freedom, do whatever you can to make sure that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia._
Together, we will make America what it once was – the land of the free and the home of the brave.
Thank you for your support.
Team Kennedy

My name is Hung Cao. I’m a 25-year Navy Veteran who fought alongside special forces in some of the toughest war zones in America. I’m running for Senate in Virginia because it’s time to have leaders in Washington DC, not politicians. I may have hung up my Navy uniform, but my service and dedication to our country is far from over. I owe everything to America, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to protect the American dream that saved my life. **Together, I know we can defeat the swamp-entrenched incumbent, but I can’t do it alone. ** **[**Can you pitch in just $10 today to help us take back the Senate?**](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=4a944e8253954e15aaa18fdb46297116&_e=2EHtU8SuGDLT96PQ4TEqswkd_PG5y9twoOQvMWQcQuO6aqK633SF1_6P0Tac9LzCZElGLv7Ih1XdiDI7sq_BNp-Z-k7lNQRe_VOXJgLpydqU2BFt4frqIKfglucli1OQIyxhgpZaaVpF3q7Ql7xqOyy91-w2m3HzW4VIdbBqrSsIh7MT820gHN8E9FiEwOTbYT7nVd7mUB13cwYqZcSv0yVMHMtfwiusG0kXizDYky6leEtNpg-eOvQ28TS9jvwFZSLqbsBtkNM-7JNvYCgXRTL5Q6YsEgu1wgQ9x7FgGFrWgwkZglbd4qkRRapjKoXNwefHoCRhPmYFaVr0KCzwB1OHQKtDAxWm7fkUKYYbURs%3D)**

subject: Fani Willis is CORRUPT
body:
Help me remove this crooked DA from President Trump's case in Georgia >>>

| | Friend, did you see the Fani Willis hearing? The crooked Democrat DA going after Trump in Georgia was just caught lying to the court. **Fani Willis is corrupt and she MUST be removed from President Trump's case in Georgia.** And thanks to the support of patriots like you, who joined my fight to launch an investigation into Fani Willis, she was brought in front of Judge Scott McAfee to decide if she should be removed from the case. Judge McAfee's decision should be obvious... We know for certain that she has been financially benefiting from the witch-hunt against President Trump and when confronted about the facts she began to perjure herself. **But Democrats want to sweep this under the rug so it’s up to us once again to keep a spotlight on this case and show that Americans across the nation want Fani Willis removed from President Trump's case for her blatantly criminal actions.**
---
| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0db4ed83334b4a1a9e6944eec8bc0afc&_e=ajIw4aHic6c4hUdWU_6V0OObfPnKq04FLWODtWZgX7QxhAgzYJaQjD3WgxrbkiAYHHeSt36Tki34PBgdAznWVWsg2RsL4vqtXG5ANbFSO2ycQDkfyXm6rTbz0Vy_qVNhqQxVjsX4sc6alMbWm78NHoks-9PaKuYxpzeqOpR2D2paSvnJmFdl6870-wlDsjkfceukDEzLOb7F3mdP16RSIKBLHWYCpSGEocM2-tBDCNAaLhxkIZp2RNRQkRUS75rynQSbHQbdT4kM3kRAdQNwtGq1qRbe4jfLSk7OC9fU0apg8ch1_Hh76j_2TsKWYyOEdQF5NORT18RkP5bagECCjw%3D%3D)
---
| [ **REMOVE FANI WILLIS** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0db4ed83334b4a1a9e6944eec8bc0afc&_e=ajIw4aHic6c4hUdWU_6V0OObfPnKq04FLWODtWZgX7QxhAgzYJaQjD3WgxrbkiAYHHeSt36Tki34PBgdAznWVWsg2RsL4vqtXG5ANbFSO2ycQDkfyXm6rTbz0Vy_qVNhqQxVjsX4sc6alMbWm78NHoks-9PaKuYxpzeqOpR2D2paSvnJmFdl6870-wlDsjkfYh6L1RYX90nvaaEvv2MX_Earz62dSS00NdFzLmmVY8Z5BEc8Qh0o8RIyI9rHL0V5SO1Rj0WKRBJ_skJ24MKYUGi00rmrqdcN9oA3nMiymW4S8KdHVR2Y4E4Qdl-C2OJolQUa91vcXYTveRPT7Mk2Yw%3D%3D)
---
Friend, the details of this case are astounding. _Fani Willis not only hired her secret lover, Nathan Wade, as the special prosecutor to go after President Trump, but she then proceeded to pay her secret boyfriend nearly $700,000 in taxpayer dollars._ _She then allegedly took illegal kickbacks from her secret lover and had taken lavish trips around the world on the government's dime._ _We also know Nathan Wade colluded with the Biden White House in the months leading up to Fani Willis’ disgraceful RICO case designed to stop Trump from winning the White House in 2024._ _Fani Willis and Nathan Wade even colluded with Nancy Pelosi’s J6 Committee to retrieve selective information from the likes of Liz Cheney and Adam Schiff._ _That is the same J6 Committee that refused to hand over encrypted files to Republicans and even destroyed evidence from the committee._ **And this is just what we know so far!** This should be a clear verdict to remove this DA from this case. **But we CANNOT leave anything to chance.** [**That’s why I need you to stand with me by adding your name to my request urging Judge Scott F. McAfee to remove Fani Willis from the case and ensure that justice is served.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0db4ed83334b4a1a9e6944eec8bc0afc&_e=ajIw4aHic6c4hUdWU_6V0OObfPnKq04FLWODtWZgX7QxhAgzYJaQjD3WgxrbkiAYHHeSt36Tki34PBgdAznWVWsg2RsL4vqtXG5ANbFSO2ycQDkfyXm6rTbz0Vy_qVNhqQxVjsX4sc6alMbWm78NHoks-9PaKuYxpzeqOpR2D2paSvnJmFdl6870-wlDsjkfrvYgVX4FxSQ4IsqVyIF0gbkMwq2yjN-xgbZ8bNhlJrzos50OI57w1V3HiaUtphamCHQjvRzDI2fv00V5yt3ACP-7t2vqY02Vwa5E6LmCXtP_S5_qzMUFoo5GmMdUV14KiyxIct-ZxIkBqzhyb2nB-A%3D%3D)
| [ **REMOVE FANI WILLIS** ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0db4ed83334b4a1a9e6944eec8bc0afc&_e=ajIw4aHic6c4hUdWU_6V0OObfPnKq04FLWODtWZgX7QxhAgzYJaQjD3WgxrbkiAYHHeSt36Tki34PBgdAznWVWsg2RsL4vqtXG5ANbFSO2ycQDkfyXm6rTbz0Vy_qVNhqQxVjsX4sc6alMbWm78NHoks-9PaKuYxpzeqOpR2D2paSvnJmFdl6870-wlDsjkfbFUX1xQBe8NAf91haIIh0TmGQ_UHuE9v4KtJ1T44Wjx0dymKxXg5lmRnZVyM7rzxHeYTHZIHj8RGbdRoUDNZY9cHYcLEtNoUhlkEiK__K4CIoGRDLd-6DE_TbLnqqXbKRoqDxWW0wC0anYf3Z7y5LA%3D%3D)
---
If Corrupt Fani Willis is not held accountable for her actions, and we allow her to proceed with her witch-hunt case against President Trump, he could be in serious trouble. That's why we need America First patriots from across the nation to keep applying public pressure. **So please, join me TODAY and help me defend President Trump from the political persecution against him.** **[Help Remove Fani Willis. SIGN NOW >>>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0db4ed83334b4a1a9e6944eec8bc0afc&_e=ajIw4aHic6c4hUdWU_6V0OObfPnKq04FLWODtWZgX7QxhAgzYJaQjD3WgxrbkiAYHHeSt36Tki34PBgdAznWVWsg2RsL4vqtXG5ANbFSO2ycQDkfyXm6rTbz0Vy_qVNhqQxVjsX4sc6alMbWm78NHoks-9PaKuYxpzeqOpR2D2paSvnJmFdl6870-wlDsjkfpD5DLkFNcXK0DIRA-KvKVsVGbMpNIUMmuTbUTPo9bbRcb8OL9quDy8zymm3x9opTloWYdI51PHfFqV-vAq9RjMDrZKf7EA4-YbaqPAjjuHZunpZ21Kqcvig-uPJLS0QrArF5bVA_6Zcc0oNhwZZI8g%3D%3D)** _Talk Soon,_ Marjorie Taylor Greene

But Democrats want to sweep this under the rug so it’s up to us once again to keep a spotlight on this case and show that Americans across the nation want Fani Willis removed from President Trump's case for her blatantly criminal actions. | | Friend, the details of this case are astounding. Fani Willis not only hired her secret lover, Nathan Wade, as the special prosecutor to go after President Trump, but she then proceeded to pay her secret boyfriend nearly $700,000 in taxpayer dollars. She then allegedly took illegal kickbacks from her secret lover and had taken lavish trips around the world on the government's dime. We also know Nathan Wade colluded with the Biden White House in the months leading up to Fani Willis’ disgraceful RICO case designed to stop Trump from winning the White House in 2024. Fani Willis and Nathan Wade even colluded with Nancy Pelosi’s J6 Committee to retrieve selective information from the likes of Liz Cheney and Adam Schiff. That is the same J6 Committee that refused to hand over encrypted files to Republicans and even destroyed evidence from the committee. And this is just what we know so far! This should be a clear verdict to remove this DA from this case. But we CANNOT leave anything to chance. | If Corrupt Fani Willis is not held accountable for her actions, and we allow her to proceed with her witch-hunt case against President Trump, he could be in serious trouble. That's why we need America First patriots from across the nation to keep applying public pressure. So please, join me TODAY and help me defend President Trump from the political persecution against him. Talk Soon, Marjorie Taylor Greene | | %unsubscribeurl% Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: We're fed up

body:
and we’re stepping up to do something about it.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240217-1&t=1&akid=395%2E587540%2Ejh_TaE)
Hey Peter, it's David.
Young people are FED UP with the cowards in our government who sit back and let our planet burn and kids be slaughtered in school — and we’re stepping up to do something about it.
We’re just a few weeks into 2024, but **Gen-Z candidates are already rising up to run for office, grow our ranks in the halls of power, and fight with urgency to change the trajectory of our future.**
At the same time, **special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding power are so determined to maintain the status quo** that they will spend _millions of dollars_ to keep Gen-Z candidates from winning.
**Leaders We Deserve is fighting back.** We’re recruiting, training, organizing, and financially investing in young progressives running for office. **But the scale of our efforts (including exactly how many candidates we’re able to support) depends on how much we’re able to raise.**
[**Will you pitch in $5 now to help us raise the resources we need to elect the next generation of transformational leaders?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240217-1?refcode=em20240217-1&amount=5&refcode2=395_587540_jh_TaE&akid=395%2E587540%2Ejh_TaE)

Thank you!!!

David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Leftwing Protesters Outside My House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This is disgraceful – but I won’t back down...

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._KFxg)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, For the second time this week, far-left agitators have come to my house early in the morning chanting hateful slogans, ringing bells, and shouting at the top of their lungs. They claim to be protesting Israel’s actions in Gaza, _but their real goal is to wake up my neighbors, harass my family, and attempt to intimidate me_. **I won’t be intimidated by these lefty malcontents and their liberal paymasters- but I need your help to stand strong and fight back. Will you chip in right now to let me and my family know you’re with us? >> [https://secure.winred.com/stand-with-ted-cruz-and-family-now](http://trk.tedcruz.)** Sadly, this is now common in American politics thanks to the far-left non-profits that fund political agitators seemingly everywhere on every issue- we see protesters blocking traffic, interrupting campus speeches, screaming hatred on the streets, and even attempting to vandalize artwork in museums. _Now they’ve come to my home... _
---
**[**DONATE NOW TO HELP ME FIGHT BACK >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-jj5pW3wf_1MxRwgpyshvA)**
---
**Why is this happening?** Because the left isn’t able to tolerate any dissent. And the far-left has always used physical violence and intimidation in order to put pressure on their political opponents. Now this tactic is common in within the Democratic Party. It’s wrong. Please know that _I’ll never bow to these disgraceful tactics_. I’ll stand strong for Texas and the United States of America- always. When I look outside my window at the screaming mob, I only grow more resolved and committed to fight for what’s right. Thank you.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump and NATO
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5545%2E5257348%2E0FY1iI ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — let’s
face it:

Donald Trump’s admiration for dictators like Vladimir Putin is a serious
danger to our country — and to democracies worldwide — if he ever returned
to the Oval Office.

Last weekend, Trump said he would encourage Russia to “do whatever the
hell they want” to NATO member nations that haven’t spent enough on
defense.

It’s hard to view it any other way than Trump egging on Russia to attack
our allies, and that the United States should turn its back on NATO
allies.

I’m deeply alarmed. When Trump was president, I investigated his blackmail
threat against Ukraine’s President Volodymyr Zelenskyy to dig up dirt on
Joe Biden, or else not receive congressionally-approved U.S. military
assistance to defend against Russia’s aggression. We impeached him, and I
led his Senate trial — and I warned that he would do this again.

Trump continues to forsake our allies. He is aligning our country with
dictators, and betraying fellow democracies, in an effort to upend our
constitutional system of checks and balances and insulate himself from all
democratic accountability.

It would destabilize our security. Our economy. Our democracy.

Donald Trump’s shallow ego admires the autocratic personalities of despots
like Putin and Kim Jong Un.

He’s willing to give up the United States’ historic responsibility of
defending democracy.

We can’t let him.

I have sounded the alarm to make sure every voter knows the true threat
another Donald Trump presidency would pose to our country.

I will continue to hold him to account for his willingness to bend to
Putin’s will — just as I have done for the past several years. But this
role of holding him accountable would become even more important in the
Senate – where many of his staunch supporters reside.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5545%2E5257348%2E0FY1iI ]In the U.S. Senate, I will hold Trump’s feet to the fire and make sure
the United States remains committed to our allies in NATO. Will you please
pitch in to my campaign while I continue to defend democracy, both here at
home and abroad?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=5545%2E5257348%2E0FY1iI ]EXPRESS DONATE

---
| | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=a0c9022155e5423b9746d5c459d7c871&_e=6NctwDG4uFPzj-knnKWDNE1XbX6gKM8mSt6B7A1IFJYPE2QY0ZLyY7LxgmAC3Lgk_Yn_Fqeuk0wwIS4DWXmjP3JwxS4crwYHeYrTbLNAc7NNhcmFxvoG2xscy4rycSZsNlfkAGP3Diar8O8_IgnMSFADJHYGTux2i9Hhv4Np1ougApKNJVqsWw_-Wb3BhlckYaqz9AN-xNCvPJ8AUqXBAvPAmzXvd1TJeSLUbaLedLdWVru-WWwlr1aL2auC1L1lXWdp7BCxG4zRtgLBln1Nxg%3D%3D)

General Teichert has given a lifetime of service and dedication to our country.

**He's a true patriot, devoted public servant, and a great Marylander.**

We are truly humbled to have his support.

We've got General Tiechert on our team — **[will you join our team today?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=a0c9022155e5423b9746d5c459d7c871&_e=6NctwDG4uFPzj-knnKWDNE1XbX6gKM8mSt6B7A1IFJYPE2QY0ZLyY7LxgmAC3Lgk_Yn_Fqeuk0wwIS4DWXmjP3JwxS4crwYHeYrTbLNAc7NNhcmFxvoG2xscy4rycSZs7AQ57cLsQrOctLA3bLR_uiSQ6XQ3KClpjoizAbfpJMv9DakB6AGFlb60ekKBkxXGFd8nmctsfHzuqHY1jk0cSTib6_EN7LXDN4OZvqzwsrCz4x_hshn3hF9Q5mj_CGY_g4USckL8_F78S0mg44IjYA%3D%3D)**

As momentum is building behind Governor Hogan, we are focused on addressing the critical issues facing Maryland and the nation, **but we can't do it without your support.**

**[Can you chip in now so we can bring the same results-driven leadership to Washington just like we brought to Annapolis?](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=a0c9022155e5423b9746d5c459d7c871&_e=6NctwDG4uFPzj-knnKWDNE1XbX6gKM8mSt6B7A1IFJYPE2QY0ZLyY7LxgmAC3Lgk_Yn_Fqeuk0wwIS4DWXmjP3JwxS4crwYHeYrTbLNAc7NNhcmFxvoG2xscy4rycSZsVO24GNbo9OCdFpjW2QNEstWJKBipQcRT0vl7bzqVgYPHhROhj4Li54Jj_OmM5Om98apOu17gn-ifU0V7o-EC11jKJ8BvlkFTlD4HQ-kMDQundMjYUdxH-7z4u881NfnQQI5ob-gwtsVIm532eEwIcw%3D%3D)**

This endorsement is a testament to the movement we're building together.

But here's the thing: this campaign is not just about endorsements or political figures. It's about you — and the overwhelming majority of Marylanders who are tired of the same old politics as usual.

Together, we changed Maryland, overcoming challenges, cutting taxes, balancing budgets, and creating a record surplus.

We've done it before, and we can do it again.

**[Chip in now to help us take on the career politicians in Washington.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=4449508d3d964e6f94eacd69d0969ff3&_m=a0c9022155e5423b9746d5c459d7c871&_e=6NctwDG4uFPzj-knnKWDNE1XbX6gKM8mSt6B7A1IFJYPE2QY0ZLyY7LxgmAC3Lgk_Yn_Fqeuk0wwIS4DWXmjP3JwxS4crwYHeYrTbLNAc7NNhcmFxvoG2xscy4rycSZsNjESJKtWEFy7oZNfPukcRhkPFzwNVVwcCC4pFMbSSlEmnEbxzUJtl9YcEiu-k_sT4aOGcTDi4Bo10NrdtLQAxVF-jRbBvpYO9dZZ9XmRIe_qlV52bwSB0oPcbPo5nQ4voXFCdTiKg9NhsQ3AEYbCkQ%3D%3D) **

Let's get back to work.

**Andrew**
Team Hogan

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b2ee24f4674bc4ae71e2d02ae385ee&_e=rQFEuLkMm7JIY5FH9RLqJ4IZIqCqixOQ_-xuVS5qjiaPCk5sRcxDwc65FBBouAD82aRu2btkEDz-f5B7c_3m46oq8YuEdt5AFnLShq4ArC-ZcsF8_LfKLwrJaCl32z4uXYR4zg4wLJZh3kZIYmPfmN-grB1mFHRa_oTgW1M_S3lJcLZ9X1cRUKb9f5gkDmwonNGHOzISrO28ZHANOldYGCYre-ZxpRGVRLAsDycGkgdmQG8EEwcg84L5TKEjKffmzW43dnkVscuzSM6a7rLPO6wXg1w0V2xPWjWvF9SYda511V1vxPVGYG2Jq1xbdtl1AshL1yr1wkhSVImP0qt9jK5DlirmdJ8SbRQzP2uSi-q9JbCE3Xtwa_X2XviMJscyFlCIzvsOlF7HlxmgY8ldAQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b2ee24f4674bc4ae71e2d02ae385ee&_e=rQFEuLkMm7JIY5FH9RLqJ4IZIqCqixOQ_-xuVS5qjiaPCk5sRcxDwc65FBBouAD82aRu2btkEDz-f5B7c_3m46oq8YuEdt5AFnLShq4ArC-ZcsF8_LfKLwrJaCl32z4uXYR4zg4wLJZh3kZIYmPfmN-grB1mFHRa_oTgW1M_S3lJcLZ9X1cRUKb9f5gkDmwonNGHOzISrO28ZHANOldYGCYre-ZxpRGVRLAsDycGkgdmQG8EEwcg84L5TKEjKffm6mwpGfoEyal4Xcevi00cQvJ5WQbNBnBanfHmtV-oGQBZwi0gxK9lVyrRLkDDvzs-R3KmHSP5qTBxr0YghTcsu_xql7EVaqU6NUi7OAwN5jlYAvfKojDpSF80TEq7lqKbNct4LJAl5wjZd63lZNCZOw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0b2ee24f4674bc4ae71e2d02ae385ee&_e=rQFEuLkMm7JIY5FH9RLqJ4IZIqCqixOQ_-xuVS5qjiaPCk5sRcxDwc65FBBouAD82aRu2btkEDz-f5B7c_3m46oq8YuEdt5AFnLShq4ArC-ZcsF8_LfKLwrJaCl32z4uXYR4zg4wLJZh3kZIYmPfmN-grB1mFHRa_oTgW1M_S3lJcLZ9X1cRUKb9f5gkDmwonNGHOzISrO28ZHANOldYGCYre-ZxpRGVRLAsDycGkgdmQG8EEwcg84L5TKEjKffm32mbbOT5iqj-qZn9nKlfenvEZt-SLz21SLNyjl_Grc1trgsBUK1NLH2xw5cvHBpEjLJcsB52h5Hc_8KJnIM3_JIkpsMIEyfpJOS_LWtQJYpnGzOMMU3e9rlEWOubs4hWdFcKsq9RG04HLyOUColeOA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Before Trump visits Michigan...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)

Friend --
Trump will be here tonight and it would mean A LOT to me if you would chip in today.
I am asking for a contribution -- $3 or whatever you can afford — before Donald Trump takes the stage. If that's all you need to hear, please use this link to donate today:
**[https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/-Trump-Visit](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=2&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
Here's how former President Trump's visit plays in our race:
Recent polls show that President Biden and former President Trump are just about tied in a head-to-head race here in Michigan -- along with our race being a dead-heat. If his recent comments are any indication, tonight we'll hear the former President attack service members, throw our allies under the bus, and brag about doing "nothing" to combat gun violence.
Given that the Senate race is the top of the ticket in the state, it’s just a matter of time until Trump turns his attacks toward us.
That means we can likely expect to see Trump in Michigan a lot. And National Republicans will be doing everything they can to flip our state red and boost our ultimate GOP opponent in the Senate race.
So we need to continue building up our reserves if we are going to be able to fight back against the attack ads and outside spending and keep this seat blue in November.
Trump will be here tonight. The Republican presidential primary follows shortly after.
[**It would be a huge boon to our campaign if you would chip in and show your support before he gets here. Our goal is to send a message that we are NOT letting them win back Michigan! Even a single $5 or $10 contribution goes a long way when lots of folks are chipping in.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb24.z4X5uQ&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=3&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb24.PidIwI&amount=3&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=22&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-feb24.kYsf1_&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=23&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-feb24.pAXxly&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=24&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-feb24.XXfcj1&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=25&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-feb24.dReN5q&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=26&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-feb24.PidIwI&refcode=em240217-1-700k&t=27&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)**
---
****
Thank you again. Your donation today — especially today -- really means a lot.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=29&akid=1143%2E135344%2E8oyRG6)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Hill H. (personal)
subject: making sure you saw the big news, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)
Hey, it’s Hill. Just wanted to make sure you saw my email from yesterday, since **I’ve officially filed to be on the ballot in Michigan’s U.S. Senate race!**
My team captured this special moment that I wanted to share, so please take a moment to check it out and read my email from yesterday below. **[Then, chip in $5 — or anything that’s right for you — to help build our people-powered movement and win this race for Michigan’s future!](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=3&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=5&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)
Thanks so much for all your support. We couldn’t have done this without you.
_\- HH
_

**Begin forwarded message:**
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Hill Harper [(info@e.hillharper.com)](https://act.hillharper.com/go/435?t=6&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)
Subject: It’s official, Peter — my name will be on the ballot for U.S. Senate
> I wanted to let you know right away: I just filed to put my name on the ballot as a U.S. Senate candidate in Michigan!
> I can’t tell you how much this moment means to me, Peter. Thousands of Michiganders signed on to signal their trust in me as their candidate for U.S. Senate. Dozens of volunteers took time out of their busy lives to collect signatures because they believe in our shared vision.
> But getting my name on the ballot isn’t what this is all about. Rather, it’s about the priorities on the ballot: abortion access, climate justice, common-sense gun safety reforms, raising wages, strengthening unions, and delivering universal healthcare for all.
> **Thanks to your ongoing support and to the incredible volunteers who helped secure more than 24,000 petition signatures, we are now one step closer to taking our people-powered movement all the way to Washington.**
> **[Please, chip in $5 _right now_ to help us beat the odds, win this high-stakes Senate race, and put working Michigan families FIRST >>>](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=9&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
> **[ARE YOU WITH ME?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=10&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
> As a union organizer, activist, single father, and the owner of a small business in Detroit, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now:
> * We pay **14 times more** for a vial of insulin than our neighbors to the north.
> * We’re **49th** in the nation for growth.
> * In the last three years, more small businesses **closed their doors for good** here than in any other state.
>

> I _know_ we can win this race and get to work for Michigan, but Peter — I mean it when I say I’ll need you with me until the last ballot is counted.
> My main opponent in the race is a career politician backed by the Washington elite and party insiders. They know a lot is riding on this race, and they’re working hard to make sure the establishment pick is the eventual Democratic nominee.
> _That’s why I’m counting on your support more than ever right now._ **This is our chance to show everyone that working Michiganders don’t want more of the same bought-and-paid-for politicians leaving them behind.**
> **[I can’t thank you enough for helping us get this far, but now, our eyes are set on the August primary. Please, rush a donation of $5 — or anything that works for you — to build our grassroots momentum in the coming months>>>](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=13&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
> **[DONATE $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/434?t=14&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
> Let’s do this!
> Hill Harper
> Democrat for U.S. Senate
> [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/435?t=15&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_em_footer?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=16&refcode2=980_62735_8PwW41&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=17&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=18&akid=980%2E62735%2E8PwW41)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

My team captured this special moment that I wanted to share, so please take a moment to check it out and read my email from yesterday below. Thanks so much for all your support. We couldn’t have done this without you. \- HH Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Hill Harper Subject: It’s official, Peter — my name will be on the ballot for U.S. Senate I wanted to let you know right away: I just filed to put my name on the ballot as a U.S. Senate candidate in Michigan! I can’t tell you how much this moment means to me, Peter. Thousands of Michiganders signed on to signal their trust in me as their candidate for U.S. Senate. Dozens of volunteers took time out of their busy lives to collect signatures because they believe in our shared vision. But getting my name on the ballot isn’t what this is all about. Rather, it’s about the priorities on the ballot: abortion access, climate justice, common-sense gun safety reforms, raising wages, strengthening unions, and delivering universal healthcare for all. Thanks to your ongoing support and to the incredible volunteers who helped secure more than 24,000 petition signatures, we are now one step closer to taking our people-powered movement all the way to Washington. As a union organizer, activist, single father, and the owner of a small business in Detroit, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now: We pay 14 times more for a vial of insulin than our neighbors to the north. We’re 49th in the nation for growth. In the last three years, more small businesses closed their doors for good here than in any other state. I know we can win this race and get to work for Michigan, but Peter — I mean it when I say I’ll need you with me until the last ballot is counted. My main opponent in the race is a career politician backed by the Washington elite and party insiders. They know a lot is riding on this race, and they’re working hard to make sure the establishment pick is the eventual Democratic nominee. That’s why I’m counting on your support more than ever right now. This is our chance to show everyone that working Michiganders don’t want more of the same bought-and-paid-for politicians leaving them behind. Let’s do this! Hill Harper Democrat for U.S. Senate

| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f20d2eb6116047e48d6221a7e571c3e8&_e=3S4L25dxY7zf7T3SiXhRe0hN0Fb1CR2TYJPJqu6LaMnipP50VDXzCBN-_KKX1h7QAW_dwRU1grnTYWYH32IYGqQADPWzqtt3VI-rx5WW3MAoLS5SedAhh0KjmAHo6QDNI11AT5ppfJaJxwo-188ZmnZ-RaMv3vQ0EzGh0rp5s7XD1zgnB-cr3rvDCGIVsl8uhuIEDIrSvBDqVDzYHme-W1Wb8SzyRpfxOK65TIoQYB2oXV9QCHB0FEVQWCvIfeLoivXOngpfNvXT5ldeOQ0mu0IVHDYQgMpLBFRISSLF3fw4Y8cLLUphO8t8l-rbEgJ4sWgRcbYWCTN6gk_870SmCjzbmA-SofyNvkXMFjNOIOfq8fUh4_1l-hVU_nDTqCENhN5GBkKnLRfxVq6Tne71Hw%3D%3D)

| | **Today,[I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f20d2eb6116047e48d6221a7e571c3e8&_e=3S4L25dxY7zf7T3SiXhRe0hN0Fb1CR2TYJPJqu6LaMnipP50VDXzCBN-_KKX1h7QAW_dwRU1grnTYWYH32IYGqQADPWzqtt3VI-rx5WW3MAoLS5SedAhh0KjmAHo6QDNI11AT5ppfJaJxwo-188ZmnZ-RaMv3vQ0EzGh0rp5s7XD1zgnB-cr3rvDCGIVsl8uhuIEDIrSvBDqVDzYHme-W1Wb8SzyRpfxOK65TIoQYB32EA2pneEM6su8exwKUooaH4i9-0_6jfJ7Qxn-F0lSaAaI7E72tZvXQ7wOC4ZfgMHIzqHFPDy-wic5gqoSV6yfR0CUxZpIGDgYG1-mOdN8z89Xcg0xyBPDsJm4sBvxn_70ZMRScVgSAAoVQ_D_8btkniI4sXtJaIQWoK9uTaCW8w%3D%3D)** Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. **_Remember?_** \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. **_Remember??_** Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... **_We Republicans_ ****pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** _**We can do that again**_**.** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there 's no way I can pull it off without you.** **That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today** I'm sorry for the urgency but _the primary is in less than three months_ and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. **[**When you rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more...**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f20d2eb6116047e48d6221a7e571c3e8&_e=3S4L25dxY7zf7T3SiXhRe0hN0Fb1CR2TYJPJqu6LaMnipP50VDXzCBN-_KKX1h7QAW_dwRU1grnTYWYH32IYGqQADPWzqtt3VI-rx5WW3MAoLS5SedAhh0KjmAHo6QDNI11AT5ppfJaJxwo-188ZmnZ-RaMv3vQ0EzGh0rp5s7XD1zgnB-cr3rvDCGIVsl8uhuIEDIrSvBDqVDzYHme-W1Wb8SzyRpfxOK65TIoQYB2MrBSb5UxSd0tq1vd2OpSHhc0h0eCMpcwHTT8_xsgYbC_i6ExKhF6TWcgHudv_QFM4mU0zBLLbEKWUBCKxbFdRGiDFTyfBXGgZz6odfcS6w_UzO1TyvakAsY7f0s0qHg4UNXKdZZxazty_-5G-C6-3fmd1zbVvAt-_OmcIVB2ruQ%3D%3D)** ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. _ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can **[**step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f20d2eb6116047e48d6221a7e571c3e8&_e=3S4L25dxY7zf7T3SiXhRe0hN0Fb1CR2TYJPJqu6LaMnipP50VDXzCBN-_KKX1h7QAW_dwRU1grnTYWYH32IYGqQADPWzqtt3VI-rx5WW3MAoLS5SedAhh0KjmAHo6QDNI11AT5ppfJaJxwo-188ZmnZ-RaMv3vQ0EzGh0rp5s7XD1zgnB-cr3rvDCGIVsl8uhuIEDIrSvBDqVDzYHme-W1Wb8SzyRpfxOK65TIoQYB2d2qzuRaxF-o6g_5ngkwLa7I86xzLS3QDWwZsdctfLCLkDVmzc2iQXNit6zrRgIaLarqFvBEfpiOPfTKc0jWF1elywgIlDCUWRM-rujTTSPBFuCWOQptLfTWQ7dABEfHsrbsFeJCA4T6BlSpw-9OZ-2F1306guTbk-dfUiliVe1Q%3D%3D)**. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f20d2eb6116047e48d6221a7e571c3e8&_e=3S4L25dxY7zf7T3SiXhRe0hN0Fb1CR2TYJPJqu6LaMnipP50VDXzCBN-_KKX1h7QAW_dwRU1grnTYWYH32IYGqQADPWzqtt3VI-rx5WW3MAoLS5SedAhh0KjmAHo6QDNI11AT5ppfJaJxwo-188ZmnZ-RaMv3vQ0EzGh0rp5s7XD1zgnB-cr3rvDCGIVsl8uhuIEDIrSvBDqVDzYHme-W1Wb8SzyRpfxOK65TIoQYB16gwHGfbzH5K3ZxwFB8g6ltExiLNESL1v5VSggz8FEEnLc0cizjXt7KUvDMJqCSZLwPv0CE9ykePbOmya9mv0cDJLR9aIggRW77lhwifOBCgzyIYbxC4BdnAXHB8X4ZzbLYdABlR-XU3TUd5P3cQxc4AEpdpeRqN5JDe0XSXNuxw%3D%3D)
