clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | Today, Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... We Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did. And America became a shining city upon a hill once more. We can do that again. It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California. But there 's no way I can pull it off without you. That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today I'm sorry for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can . Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. It's the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun. We simply can't let another election slip through our fingers while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. Thank you! -Steve | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

name: Mark Kelly
subject: PA could determine control of the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
I’m not a take-it-easy kind of person. I’m going to do whatever it takes to protect our razor-thin Senate majority. That’s why I recently visited Pennsylvania — which could determine control of the U.S. Senate — to support my friend Bob Casey who’s in his toughest re-election fight yet.
**[Before I get into it, can you chip in $5 or more to Bob’s campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-1&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)**
While I was in Philadelphia, I joined Bob to meet with some of the great men and women who served our country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-1&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)
I also got to try one of Bob’s favorites – a soft pretzel. I learned that there are few things more important to Team Casey than a Philly soft pretzel, but one of them is re-electing Bob so we can defend our Democratic Senate majority.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-1&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)
Bob is a fierce advocate for Pennsylvanians, and we can’t afford to lose his voice in the Senate. But this year, Pennsylvania is one of the battlegrounds in the fight to protect our Senate majority, and Bob is counting on us to get him over the finish line.
Grassroots support was critical for me to win my battleground races in 2020 and 2022, and it’s going to be just as important to keep PA blue in 2024. Bob is going to be up against a wall of cash from National Republicans, so he needs your help.
**[Please help Bob by chipping in a grassroots donation of $5, $10, or $20 today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-1&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240217-1-el&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240217-1-el&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240217-1-el&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240217-1-el&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240217-1-el&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-1&refcode2=2001_552475_KVJqF7&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)
---
Thanks for having Bob’s back and doing your part to protect our Democratic Senate majority.
— Mark Kelly

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=2001%2E552475%2EKVJqF7)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

| | | Peter, did you see my invitation?

November 5th, 2024 will go down in the history books, and we have the chance to decide the outcome.

The White House, the Senate, and the House are all up for grabs, and we have a real chance to retire Joe Biden, fire Chuck Schumer, and send Nancy Pelosi back to California. We have the chance to MAKE AMERICA GREAT ONCE AGAIN!

subject: Every dollar makes a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Especially when we’re running in one of the most competitive races in the country

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79196373/455744205/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.17_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA4OTFkNy1hOGNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=at6OW9o7J39Iju5vzFdrPg8RMzGwXUcaBsgPKwBGXiM=) Peter, I don’t want to take up too much of your Saturday, so I’ll get right to it: **My campaign team set a goal of raising $8,000 before midnight tonight, but right now we’re still $2,009 shy of that mid-month goal.**

[**I’ll explain more in a moment, but first, I have to ask: Is there any amount you can pitch in to help us reach tonight’s must-hit goal? If everyone reading this email chipped in just $1, we will close this gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79196374/455744206/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.17_b1_es_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA4OTFkNy1hOGNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=at6OW9o7J39Iju5vzFdrPg8RMzGwXUcaBsgPKwBGXiM=) | [**CHIP IN $1 >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79196375/455744207/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.02.17_b1_es_all-nd&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTA4OTFkNy1hOGNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=at6OW9o7J39Iju5vzFdrPg8RMzGwXUcaBsgPKwBGXiM=)

name: Cory Booker
subject: Angela Alsobrooks can help us achieve big things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ][IMG]

As U.S. Senators, it’s our job — our responsibility, our calling — to do
big things that benefit those we represent.

That means we owe it to the American people to expand access to education,
protect folks’ fundamental rights, and make housing, healthcare, and
raising a family affordable.

Those are all things I’m working towards in the Senate, but if we’re going
to make those ideals reality — while simultaneously safeguarding our
democracy from those seeking to undermine it — then we need more champions
willing to take up the fight for working families.

Angela Alsobrooks would be that champion,
Peter. She’s dedicated,
compassionate, and she understands the challenges families face every
single day.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]I’m proud to support Angela in the U.S. Senate because I’d be honored
and excited to fight alongside her, and I need YOUR help electing her.
Would you please consider donating to her campaign to give Maryland a
champion in the Senate?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]Donate

American families are struggling,
Peter.

When I took over as mayor of Newark, our city was facing rising inequity,
a worsening housing crisis, and a crippling city deficit. Big problems
require big solutions, so we made affordable housing and addressing
inequality top priorities.

As County Executive, Angela works to make communities safe, increase
access to education, and expand opportunity for everyone. That type of
hands-on, real-world experience is part of what makes her the best
candidate for Maryland’s open Senate seat.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]I’m committed to helping elect Angela to the U.S. Senate, but it’s
going to be an uphill battle. Would you be willing to make a grassroots
contribution to help ensure she’s the next senator from the great state of
Maryland?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]Chip in $25 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]Chip in $50

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]Chip in $250 [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/10651?t=1008&amount=35&akid=1077%2E52803%2ECuwepx ]Other Amount

Together, we can achieve big things,
Peter, so thank you for
everything you do.

— Senator Cory Booker

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: NEW MU LAW POLL: Trump 49%, Biden 49%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Marquette Law School just released a new poll for WI, team. Take a look:
**_Marquette Law School Poll_
Donald Trump: 49%
Joe Biden 49%
**
**This race is currently a statistical tie and confirms Wisconsin is once again a critical BATTLEGROUND state!**
We’ve known from day one that this race would be close — and this poll proves it. Once again, the presidency will be decided by just a few states, and Wisconsin is at the top of that list.
So we need to do everything in our power to turn more Democrats out to the polls in 2024 and keep Trump out of the White House. And the Long Run is leading that charge to make sure we do that here in Wisconsin.
[**So can you please support our movement so we can help turn out voters this November and turn Wisconsin blue?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=1&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)

[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.iVDKI-&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=21&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.0ufIZo&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=22&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.SGdEqN&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=23&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.OE_EdI&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=24&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=25&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)
This poll tells us that EVERY SINGLE VOTE will be critical this November if we want to keep the White House out of Trump’s hands.
Last April, our PAC helped to elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court and flipped the majority liberal for the first time in 14 years! That is the power of this grassroots movement.
And if we continue to work together, we can do the same for President Biden and Senator Baldwin. So let's gear up and do everything in our power to make sure Trump loses this election.
[**Please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today to help us continue our fight to turn Wisconsin blue.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-feb24.ocq2fh&refcode=em240217-1-tt&t=26&akid=5199%2E196590%2EdoTMq2)

Thank you for your continued support. Let’s do this!
Mandela

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Chiefs’ Super Bowl Parade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
What are we doing here? This is insanity.

Look at this.
This is the moment shots rang out at the Kansas City Chiefs Super Bowl celebration just a few days ago.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-feb24-amd?refcode=em240217-1-30&refcode2=1837_4767699_ARUL9S&akid=1837%2E4767699%2EARUL9S)
More than twenty people were injured. Almost a dozen of them were between the ages of 6 and 15. A local radio host, dead.
What are we doing here?
This is insanity.
The shooting happened in the presence of more than 800 law enforcement officials — "good guys with guns."
Maybe, just maybe, it would be easier to make sure people who shouldn't have guns aren't able to buy them?
And let me remind you, it was not long ago, the Supreme Court overturned a 100-year old law in New York allowing almost anyone to carry a concealed firearm in public places outside their homes.
And it's not just the Supreme Court. Right-wing judges appointed by George Bush and Donald Trump are overturning commonsense gun safety laws proven to save lives.
This is why we need a Constitutional Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence. Because if Congress won't act, and if the courts refuse to let states like California pass commonsense gun laws, then we need to amend the Constitution.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
**☀️ Wait wait wait! Don't go just yet. 🔥**
Far-right Republicans and the NRA will attack us and do whatever they can to stop our progress in the fight to amend the Constitution on guns.
But the good news is that the people are on our side, the facts are on our side, and if we stick together we are going to get this done and save lives. It may not happen soon, but you have to believe it will happen.
[**Gavin Newsom’s pledge to you is every donation made today will go right toward our fight to pass a Constitutional amendment on guns. If that sounds worth it to you, please contribute $20 today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-feb24-amd?refcode=em240217-1-30&refcode2=1837_4767699_ARUL9S&akid=1837%2E4767699%2EARUL9S)
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-feb24-amd?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=em240217-1-30&refcode2=1837_4767699_ARUL9S&akid=1837%2E4767699%2EARUL9S)**
---

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1837%2E4767699%2EARUL9S).

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I’d like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love.

**[But if you only have a minute, all I’ll ask is that you donate $5 _(matched to become $15)_ to help defend our Senate majority and make a difference for our _real_ president’s Democratic agenda.](https://go.dscc.org/go/17386?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240217-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240217-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=13570%2E9716520%2EtcecSH)**

**I’ve said before that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. $5 may not sound like a lot, but I’ve seen time and time again that each of us pitching in a little will make a BIG difference together -- and right now, my friends at the DSCC need that exact kind of help from Democrats like us.**

Here’s why: Republicans are just two seats away from retaking the Senate, and they’re willing to spend millions to erase our _razor-thin_ Democratic majority. The future of our country could be decided by critical races in battleground states like Nevada, Ohio, or Pennsylvania.

We can’t leave anything to chance. Everything from health care to climate change is on the ballot and Democrats simply can’t win without your support to **out-raise** , **out-organize** , and **out-campaign** the Republicans.

**This request is so important that for a limited time, a group of donors will _personally_ triple your gift. [So please join me by rushing $5 _(becomes $15)_ to defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep moving America forward >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17386?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240217-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240217-MartinSheen-SheenWhatAskMeans-Pros-sl1&akid=13570%2E9716520%2EtcecSH)**

clean_body: | | | Hi friend, it's Martin Sheen. As a former "acting" president of the United States, I’d like to talk about what your support could mean for the country you and I both love. I’ve said before that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. $5 may not sound like a lot, but I’ve seen time and time again that each of us pitching in a little will make a BIG difference together -- and right now, my friends at the DSCC need that exact kind of help from Democrats like us. Here’s why: Republicans are just two seats away from retaking the Senate, and they’re willing to spend millions to erase our razor-thin Democratic majority. The future of our country could be decided by critical races in battleground states like Nevada, Ohio, or Pennsylvania. We can’t leave anything to chance. Everything from health care to climate change is on the ballot and Democrats simply can’t win without your support to out-raise , out-organize , and out-campaign the Republicans. This request is so important that for a limited time, a group of donors will personally triple your gift. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED: | | | | | \- Martin Sheen | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Defend Democracy (via DR)
subject: Trump wishes you didn't have the right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Stand up to his voter suppression attempts >> | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79200449/455752770/1124992383?refcode=EmailLogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiOWVlMzEwLWFjY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6pz-plPsivIKeZebkCf1czI8HLj4fCvwobtQJx8qxU=)

Donald Trump is **_LYING_** about the democratic process of voting by mail:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79200452/455752773/152438111?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240216_1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiOWVlMzEwLWFjY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k6pz-plPsivIKeZebkCf1czI8HLj4fCvwobtQJx8qxU=)

In stark contrast, Democrats are fighting tirelessly to make voting accessible, bolster election security, and dismantle the influence of dark money in our elections. But the truth is, we can't do this alone.

[Stand with us now. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8U5li3DLuYv_Q_BIETap7MwHVyAXiPyXl0GQb02BE5bPJ7jEkm2BOhmiN3e_Rq9X0BN1yyqWQ3Eur2_7bqWmGh360_si6rBzWc7I4ey22GjsyOU5u7Ztp79Q73t7uSq66I0OJg2XEU8XFIkXmQi_85Prq2Ip9VRHhqYnOWnGM2XG_UjWu8GjC8p_pp0Bn2A6rEFOmLMCEv406x_rAPjfY1ZQAUWvbiowMRvTXGM_q3ssOjowemCr8uu1OjKl7AqodBkzN1FmkG6iQ1iQfwJLSEw/43x/FxIZ8DkpTdu0SEexy_kAwA/h0/asBhkheH-6WTdBQgDmUZNE-joKNb3HrMM4IfKHe3slw) | | _Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and The Collective PAC._
[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJL7YjBTR9z4YmFHXXi-JJZR--Vri5fol3bQZIDWewEnV2C62CbSqqqsbc3hLBrpT5AMELVALR1BFCY_V4I5kmkgLKntAz2nomdRnbw8hWw30JY3scdo-MvNc6cX7sKe7kqqJWVqpeRaP3h-klE1d_yRb3oAAwGpInK28IbWmYkr47sw3pfzCs-N5pK2ZfDt2Rou05Lu2GlCvmdb_eSd1ndGzmcCyuPZ49dJvsmDXfUwbrT3cW8qJxnJIqj8RfGLbMsui5Trj63dq4d2uiazI7fcdyrlfpGmkKhzgpVTUSrT1X0Rhz0dUVFq-x2eK1VTM3/43x/FxIZ8DkpTdu0SEexy_kAwA/h1/ZhkU-bWyHw0_SvysjSlAXCPfVP3SAIiZcWqGXsEGpM8) Peter, Harry Dunn here.

I don't want to take too much of your time, so I'll make this quick:

I looked insurrectionists like Trump in the eye on January 6th and fought for our democracy.

I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of that day while I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged.

So trust and believe when I tell you: _I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before._

[But right now, I'm not where I need to be on my $100,000 end-of-month goal. I really need to pick up the pace to get there before tomorrow at midnight. Will you split a donation between me and The Collective PAC to help me hit this goal? Anything you can spare is appreciated! ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x7ESlwpd39wyaaM2DOMklJL7YjBTR9z4YmFHXXi-JJZR--Vri5fol3bQZIDWewEnV2C62CbSqqqsbc3hLBrpT5AMELVALR1BFCY_V4I5kmkgLKntAz2nomdRnbw8hWw30JY3scdo-MvNc6cX7sKe7kDBksgqDu7H9UdlHD5IGbfcP8MhgTYZ0jGGuF_utilrWBNGcOasCQUML3VH243ZtoC5BKzI-h8Mm21yVmLFwxBKOva403H9FaNyog19l90tut5TQBCZxZXXU7KU6v0fxCMcWyjnfOmnXlsxohtXezjQAZrZpm5LSGla-R97E-0WAVGRoFUqOMka2RyVvX14wE/43x/FxIZ8DkpTdu0SEexy_kAwA/h2/2QBg-uPZ3Fv0SLfx_qZwTvhTM6uYqheeMU7Q9Qz0Y-c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Harry Dunn and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and The Collective PAC. Peter, Harry Dunn here. I don't want to take too much of your time, so I'll make this quick: I looked insurrectionists like Trump in the eye on January 6th and fought for our democracy. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of that day while I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Harry Dunn and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | -Harry The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . # Senate swings back to business
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTcuOTA0MTE0MDEifQ.znPKJvMKBW4B5vcHj-plp69Rv--s531VzpcHrQrkl5I/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
---
| | | | | This week the Senate heard the first of the bills sent over from the House. There are highlights, and some real low-points. I'll get into it soon, but first...
---
| |
* * *
---
## Citizens stop by the Statehouse
---
One of the most fruitful parts of my job is meeting the folks who are impacted by Indiana legislation. This week I met children in The Boys and Girls Club, representatives from the Marion County Young Democrats, and advocates from Women4Change. Citizen involvement is an integral piece of the legislative process, and I encourage all citizens to involve themselves with politics.
* * *

## [Senate passes puppy mill bill to third and final reading](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMTMvcGV0LXN0b3Jlcy1icmVlZGVycy1pbnNwZWN0aW9uLWJpbGwtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC13aXRoLWZ1bmRpbmctc3RpbGwtdW5kZXRlcm1pbmVkLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTcuOTA0MTE0MDEifQ.i94Yu9ujU2TnfNpAC2uTN7ICSMTU11YzqZWX8y9xMko/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMTMvcGV0LXN0b3Jlcy1icmVlZGVycy1pbnNwZWN0aW9uLWJpbGwtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC13aXRoLWZ1bmRpbmctc3RpbGwtdW5kZXRlcm1pbmVkLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTcuOTA0MTE0MDEifQ.WfVGH3It4xhf48rA5HQAkUu_Rpw9240o57IJS7IVk_A/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
---
Local control is so important to developing people who care about politics. It's disheartening to see the passage of public policy that will strip localities of the ability to govern themselves. It's even more disheartening when the policy enforces cruelty. On Thursday, HB 1412 passed second reading. It now heads to the Senate chamber for a third and final reading. HB 1412 strips localities of their right to self-governance by enforcing the sale of animals bred in puppy mills in every city in Indiana. Over 20 cities in the state of Indiana have pre-existing ordinances banning the sale of animals from mills. I will continue to fight for local rule.
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[HB 1133 heard in the Elections Committee](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..rgHPR1ZgmO3Nb-raJTK645heCG8vCOrkZ5ra4PZS0gA/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
HB 1133 is a piece of legislation with good intent, but it could benefit from adding parameters to prevent candidates using AI to support their own campaigns.
[Concerning childcare bill passes first reading](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tL2JyaWVmcy9ob3VzZS1jaGlsZC1jYXJlLWJpbGwtbW92ZXMtZm9yd2FyZC8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjE3LjkwNDExNDAxIn0.ile4DVmjFFYsdtmzUzCyy7NAJJv1TCXKfUVJvBoXx6w/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
* A hazardous deregulation of unlicensed homecare providers that would:
* Increase the number of children a childcare provider can monitor.
* Remove regulations that protect children in childcare.
* Fail to provide quality childcare infrastructure.

[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTEsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYWNhcGl0YWxjaHJvbmljbGUuY29tLzIwMjQvMDIvMDcvc2VuYXRlLWVkdWNhdGlvbi1iaWxscy1vbi1odW1hbi1zZXh1YWxpdHktY3Vyc2l2ZS1tb3ZlLXRvLWhvdXNlLyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMTcuOTA0MTE0MDEifQ.4Ye0044GohS6rQoEHwRRi9z02TebVD5gLxA_xc1jqyc/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)[Governor Holcomb signs wetlands bill into law](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd2liYy5jb20vMjYwODgyL3dldGxhbmRzLWJpbGwtc2lnbmVkLWJ5LWdvdmVybm9yLWhvbGNvbWItd2hhdC10aGF0LW1lYW5zLWZvci1pbmRpYW5hcy1lbnZpcm9ubWVudC8iLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjE3LjkwNDExNDAxIn0.4Grs-jn4uR6fyw_ubR1fNfoRo95smoR4dBBMhMQJVig/s/2950175210/br/237315107018-l)
Indiana's wetlands are one of our most important natural resources. To endanger them is to endanger Hoosier lives. I will continue to stand in opposition to the destruction of our environment.

body:
Are Democrats ever going to win? | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3e64412c00e2/about-time?e=c7de1ce9fa)
---
Friends,
It might be hard to believe, but a lot of Texas Democrats do not know who they will vote for in the US Senate race.
Tattoos. Motorcycle riding. Reformer District Attorney. Vaquero. Father of five and attorney. I know what it’s like to meet a payroll, get the kids to gymnastics on time, and castrate a steer at the ranch.
I am not your typical candidate, and that’s probably why I won twice in a red county. In the year that Trump carried Nueces County, the same voters elected me as a Democratic District Attorney with a reform agenda.
To win statewide, we need someone with crossover appeal. Before we get there, I need your help. [Consider making a donation right now so we can talk to more voters.](https://markagonzalez.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=240bb4be19e50425868596a83&id=dcd298d243&e=c7de1ce9fa)
Adelante! Mark

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: re: AIPAC’s second endorsement against an incumbent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We knew AIPAC was coming for progressive rising star Rep. Cori Bush in
2024, but they just made it official.

This week, AIPAC officially endorsed Cori’s moderate primary challenger
Wesley Bell in the Democratic race for Missouri’s 1st Congressional
District.

It’s the second time this cycle that AIPAC has made an endorsement against
an incumbent, both of whom are progressive Black members of the Squad.

This anti-Palestinian, pro-war lobby group is using Trump supporters’ and
other GOP megadonors’ money to target the Squad and stop our movement.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240217-cb.l9Fvrx&refcode=em20240217-33363&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=33363%2E1203867%2EeB9kPb ]Help us fight back by splitting a grassroots donation of
$3 or more to Cori’s campaign and Justice Democrats NOW!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240217-cb.l9Fvrx&refcode=em20240217-33363&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=33363%2E1203867%2EeB9kPb ]Contribute $3

Cori is a tireless advocate for the people of St. Louis and for regular,
everyday people all across our country and world. We can’t afford to lose
her voice in Congress, but it’s going to take a groundswell of
people-power to defend her seat this year.

Thanks for anything you can contribute to our fight,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=33363%2E1203867%2EeB9kPb ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=33363%2E1203867%2EeB9kPb ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We knew AIPAC was coming for progressive rising star Rep. Cori Bush in 2024, but they just made it official. This week, AIPAC officially endorsed Cori’s moderate primary challenger Wesley Bell in the Democratic race for Missouri’s 1st Congressional District. It’s the second time this cycle that AIPAC has made an endorsement against an incumbent, both of whom are progressive Black members of the Squad. This anti-Palestinian, pro-war lobby group is using Trump supporters’ and other GOP megadonors’ money to target the Squad and stop our movement. [ ]Help us fight back by splitting a grassroots donation of $3 or more to Cori’s campaign and Justice Democrats NOW! [ ]Contribute $3 Cori is a tireless advocate for the people of St. Louis and for regular, everyday people all across our country and world. We can’t afford to lose her voice in Congress, but it’s going to take a groundswell of people-power to defend her seat this year. Thanks for anything you can contribute to our fight, Geoff Simpson Campaigns Director Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a ceasefire through [ ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them using [ ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this critical moment. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: small acts have the power to create big, transformative change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
how doughnuts will save our Senate majority 🍩
| | |
---
Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 weekly goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority.
**[**( If you're short on time and ready to retire Rick Scott this fall, you can help me make up this fundraising gap and flip Florida blue by clicking here to split a gift ****between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79203651/455761364/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk4818-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWI2NDVhZS1hZmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOMXA9jOKxw0n4hxEbSaxDDXT1PxNzPsp4UQH4MjY0s=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79203652/455761365/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4818-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWI2NDVhZS1hZmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YOMXA9jOKxw0n4hxEbSaxDDXT1PxNzPsp4UQH4MjY0s=)
When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment.
So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality.
We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate.
**Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign this November.**
**[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in just $10 — about the cost of a dozen doughnuts — to send me to the Senate. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's before my weekly deadline to help me defeat Rick Scott? clean_body: how doughnuts will save our Senate majority 🍩 | | | Friend, I'm about to ask you to help me hit my $100,000 weekly goal. But first, I want to tell you a story about doughnuts — and how they're going to help us save our Senate majority. = = When I was 14, my family came to America to seek a better life. We arrived here with big dreams for the future. But those early days were hard. I remember my mom working back-to-back double shifts and still struggling to afford rent for our small, one room apartment. So, after I turned 15, I got a job working the early morning shift at a local doughnut shop. It was just a minimum wage job, but the small checks I brought home gave my family room to breathe. Finally, after a lot of hard work, the possibilities that we could only dream of before became reality. We were able to move out of that one room apartment, and I got a scholarship to an incredible college. Eventually, I found a career path where I could give back to the communities and country that gave me so much. That call to service took me to places I had never even dreamed of before. I became the first South American immigrant to serve in Congress, and now, I'm running for the United States Senate. Making doughnuts in the morning before homeroom brought me all the way to Congress. I've seen time and time again how small acts have the power to create big, transformative change. And that's exactly how we're going to win this campaign this November. = f you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: President Obama is right. | | | | | ---|--- Democrats may have won big in 2023, but this fight is far from over – especially in our statehouses. State Democrats have no time off when it comes to elections – which is why Obama is sounding the alarm on the importance of our level of the ballot: Your state legislators have a major impact on policies that affect day-to-day life. And, with a divided Congress, state legislatures are where progress can happen on protecting abortion access, our climate, and voting rights. But the fight for 2024 has already begun – with over a dozen critical special elections over the next few months. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Together, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. If you’re short on time, I understand — but can you chip in $15 before you log off? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79205380/455765476/1698357921?refcode=20240217_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJiOGJjYi1iMWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twpstXCSkksUTaMJRP53FTYe06ydeDr0omHKCiUHzzA=) **[1\. That’s why special interests just spent **[$50,000](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79205384/455765480/1698357921?refcode=20240217_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJiOGJjYi1iMWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twpstXCSkksUTaMJRP53FTYe06ydeDr0omHKCiUHzzA=)** flooding the airwaves with lies. [**_That’s why I need resources to pull this victory off – and a handful of grassroots donations from supporters like you can make all the difference. In a close race like this, I can’t waste any time. So I’m asking: Will you chip in $15 in the next 13 hours before midnight? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79205386/455765482/1698357921?refcode=20240217_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJiOGJjYi1iMWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twpstXCSkksUTaMJRP53FTYe06ydeDr0omHKCiUHzzA=) **[2\. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you — teachers, first responders, and all hardworking Americans — who are ready to finally put working families first. Can I count on you to chip in $15? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79205390/455765486/1698357921?refcode=20240217_em_fr_b1_tony_30_op_v1&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDJiOGJjYi1iMWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=twpstXCSkksUTaMJRP53FTYe06ydeDr0omHKCiUHzzA=) **[3\. [**_I know we can pull this off — but only if we all band together. "Arizona lawmaker wants to give state electoral votes to GOP nominee before 2024 election"
— AZ Central, February 15, 2024
"The legislation, sponsored by Republican state Rep. Rachel Jones of Tucson, also "urges" Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs to sign an "election reform bill" that would ban early voting and require the hand-counting of ballots."
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION TO FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-feb24]
Republicans in our state legislature are already trying to suppress Arizonans’ voices at the ballot box. Not only is Rep. Rachel Jones working to ban early voting, she also wants to hand every electoral vote to the presumptive GOP nominee before Arizonans are even able to cast their ballots.
In 2022, with a strong grassroots base, we were able to elect voting rights champions in Governor Hobbs and Secretary of State Fontes, and since then they’ve made it a priority to make sure our elections are safe, secure, and accessible for Arizonans.
Democrats are just TWO seats away in our legislature from building a majority that not only enhances the security of our elections but expands access to the ballot box to ensure that every Arizonan has the right and the ability to cast their vote.
Pitch in $17 (or whatever works best for your budget this week!) to help us unseat Rachel and every member of the GOP working to rig our elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-feb24?amount=17]

body:

Top Stories of the Week

worse than you think

Guard to do the unthinkable
➞ Continue Reading

Trump was delivered a major court victory
after DA Fani Willis was forced to testify
➞ Continue Reading

Please read the following message from our
sponsor.

According to the US National Library of
Medicine, there's one special food you should be eating daily.

Because for folks with blood sugar issues, it
works just as well (or even better) than metformin.

No one wants to take meds like metformin for
the rest of their lives. So if you'd like to dump yours in the
trash, you should try this out.

Put all the horrible side effects of
metformin behind you. No more diarrhea, stomach aches, feeling
sick or losing your appetite.

Instead, you just enjoy this tasty food every
day to lower your A1C and lose weight at the same time.

To get the full story and learn which special
food to eat, watch the complimentary video here.

name: Team Nikki
subject: We need more support from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress [https://nvlupin
body:
Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92407/images/Budzinski_Logo_AAA.png]
Team — Will you stand with Nikki in her fight for continued investment in agricultural research?
ADD MY NAME [https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/support-investment-agricultural-research]
In 2023, President Joe Biden signed into law a continuing resolution for the Farm Bill that lays the foundation for agriculture policy through September of this year. This legislation package includes funding for SNAP and nutrition programs, loans and resources for the farmers we rely on, and continued research and conservation efforts to ensure our communities are farming sustainably.
As a member of the House Committee on Agriculture, Nikki has been an advocate for farmers across the Midwest including right here in the 13th District.
She’s been a key component in ensuring that we continue to invest in agricultural research so that we know not only how to grow better crops, but how we do so sustainably and limit and eliminate the negative impacts on our climate.
We could use some community support here: W ill you add your name and support continued investment into agricultural research? [http://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/support-investment-agricultural-research]
ADD MY NAME [https://go.nikkiforcongress.com/a/support-investment-agricultural-research]
Thank you!

name: Harry Dunn
subject: hard email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| _**Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and DASS**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79209094/455772413/1441636268?refcode=em-2.17.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTgwNWVmZC1iNWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uzwiaTiJPbz7yBjBtKtrhjOvQ3gLY2MDFGKa-en7wfA=) Hey there, I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. _And folks, I've never looked back._ **[I'm ready to protect our democracy as a Congressman, and I need you to join me. I wouldn’t ask if this fight wasn’t absolutely critical – will you split a donation between DASS and my campaign? clean_body: | Our friend Harry Dunn is running for Congress in Maryland’s Third District, and we’re working to support him. We hope you’ll read the message below from him and consider splitting a donation between Harry’s campaign and DASS = Hey there, I'll be straight with you, I've done a lot of tough things in my life. I played college football, tried to make it in the NFL and CFL. That was tough, mentally, physically, emotionally. I served as a Capitol police officer for over 15 years, those were tough some days. But the aftermath of the January 6 insurrection was one of the toughest things I've been through. My pain, my trauma, it didn't end on January 7. Even after the violence of that day, I dealt with death threats. I dealt with people harassing me for speaking out. And when I decided to testify in front of Congress? It was one of the toughest things I've ever faced. But I did testify, because it was my duty not just as an officer, but as an American. I made a big step the day I testified for the January 6 committee. I stepped in the direction of protecting our democracy. And folks, I've never looked back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** With love, Harry 🖤 | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. subject: Black and Palestinian solidarity in Congress

body:
AIPAC’s spending millions against me and Summer Lee. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvavstEHPsSgc8kXE6d7CArcsylDhc4T2WV7cs-1ktQehl8FF3tdLqGBZOxB8CoTAq_waGMG62sCBML5VD5M69jKJIu79FEYpVp-fOLxQjoat6MfxtpXmCSETLb3todcxIT2ZJ6mlz4BBfMQwxa8W2ZUwRbs9VbSXrvBJUjJy9PlRUJT885FcUL90EmJ46ZuMi/43x/Ji1IxT9qR52CBrLAMYwH3w/h0/XlqJfoMJTnRS7i1jdgvLmQo7uR4Sh9slmRfNTKcxX9s)
---
Friend, We’re celebrating Black-led movements for justice and social change this Black History Month, including the history of Black solidarity with Palestinians. **I’m proud to serve in Congress alongside Black progressive leaders who’ve been demanding a ceasefire and speaking up for Palestinians’ rights.** One of my fiercest allies in Congress is **Rep. Summer Lee** , who overcame millions in attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC in 2022, during her first election to Congress. Members of the U.S. House of Representatives run for re-election every two years, which means this is her first re-election. And this year, Republican-funded AIPAC is planning to spend $100 MILLION to defeat Summer and other Black progressives from our Squad. AIPAC even recruited an anti-ceasefire opponent who’s running against Summer in Pennsylvania’s April 23 primary election. With her primary election coming up so soon, Summer needs grassroots fundraising support to once again overcome AIPAC’s attacks. [**Please split a donation today between my and Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns so we can overcome the millions of dollars that AIPAC’s spending to try to defeat us.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxGqDIQxlBf8XZHYV2mEq6hhmXLXE9--fMadDPciD4kGpxOjWWqU706oC4ua7BWg1IyQlV2ZJ4OiFwyfQSwR-ZnnMQGV2GMZjDlAtO4Ljyn6aVquyOwi6Cjg3FKORPh0fdmjLfUMcy9aUCtiiyv9ZdZ2AZ51pwGYYlX95R-XT_sQ8usgZFXTSuIKhZeu3-XALBOYnp-1fClptMcpfL8vPCSPGdr-9FMg6oSOrTUxwKU8tt2j_j6ze6Zoa_bBdLC5UrD7vUjtAlpwRRnO0X-mxQ91dkgwQ13kY8tpUEtgRubRuk8k2f8zwzF1pEDHzwxWSg/43x/Ji1IxT9qR52CBrLAMYwH3w/h1/VC8Cp-f1nIhhOaFN-aFtQHjjKqJtjrsja0bEyHyoei8) [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxGqDIQxlBf8XZHYV2mEq6jdLuoGNSEjQ3jsKIEnWyFeXgZFZ1CzO0U2oUWLA0sKXdJZ599G_XCz7QCP5kGjnYWekdVGgOuJ8EiKPQ1WOU5qhPjPRZl0dUt8SvoNmM9P-xla_Bgpg8fQA_EFUDAsh_V2687UsMQ3n1RLYvAAb2XBZehmuH-4G2b5allEYBOfbi6ruLhpXGvQvxd6nm80ojcUApV4bamGXx6He6j3NMlnEYubjldlrPpcU0YpD5Ib9JAMXd1ll6xYMD-SVTFZ15WWyAyQbFt0aXLtuIqC75lcy-rL98IP61WSMt2BHXerIA/43x/Ji1IxT9qR52CBrLAMYwH3w/h2/MMQkrGXk8hW9pUIKfTOnM0cPCUX6F5IPvzqYioEC98I) | [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxGqDIQxlBf8XZHYV2mEq6gEGyY0oedRLT_Rjy56eAW1ShHKVoFEnSDCSmfRnU68n_FIITNZoj-FXf4NMizcZzg9hqVvZtvakkNjXfzZvTwtGDU1XNp1b5E9rjO59FOnTyAgKLll3vgk1WLDLTerwkmjm_J_TcycNN0gYtQoYbrHD1iYahM5kK4ByB2O035gXbHVfJwm0Zk6P3hMslemm5Vzgd1TauTGnWgH4uJBig6w_Jn5B5mIVQe86SHhgDUOn3XyLuuPtJzqKDbMvhJygyPTn1HFEVU-x8J6d0QGPdW_ZyNq9XGSUCrwtjS5iXTvNA/43x/Ji1IxT9qR52CBrLAMYwH3w/h3/TmvPkZLs1cvv6Cn1nyHFgj_oiuXANsPQq1ebcS-d_1w)

Summer Lee and I were both community organizers before running for state-level public office and then for Congress.
On both the state and federal level, I’ve created multiple Neighborhood Service Centers to help constituents with everyday needs. In Congress, I’ve been training my colleagues on how to do similar work in their districts.
In her first year of office, Summer has so far opened up 5 satellite offices in her district, in addition to her main office, and has run mobile service centers.
Through this on-the-ground service work, she has supported 1,600 constituents with getting their Social Security benefits, and has helped other constituents with issues like navigating our immigration system.
**We need to keep Summer Lee in Congress so she can keep doing this essential work—the work that all members of Congress should be doing.**
She is truly rooted in her community, and while prioritizing the needs of her constituents, she also recognizes the importance of equality and freedom for all people across the country and the world.
[**Will you donate $5 or more today to keep me and Rep. Summer Lee in Congress pushing for liberation and dignity for all people?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKw4CgPtiDSXkrPijXbd1rNxGqDIQxlBf8XZHYV2mEq6ha70ehd6pM9U3JS8sl81Ii7CChnkIll96MrOp3H6_aCdGfl4BqVDb6h6prjHLSLqniXstpV8mt0CXZJ9OS1_7fVhx34SA3DX_lOrRU28Qzj6o4Gvkm91LCBlmI0WIaQeX-v1CxXw_BfOzPk5-q1So6_j4hsi2qnj-6CFXovjThHtSYuZwxiLt7hoUrFAa5GRAc1rZNeNtL0HCq378ncNfFUUhGPUnCvje0v27uuIjoIIprhppw0wAPNfLfKONec-QoFi04Ab-v4ozeeG2A-HPQvjx3Qe4wZ182Zld42SVCmA/43x/Ji1IxT9qR52CBrLAMYwH3w/h4/1JiLC0IvUNtJryPVtq9cH92K359LRPmQZ5ygS4HR9kM)

clean_body: AIPAC’s spending millions against me and Summer Lee. | | | Friend, We’re celebrating Black-led movements for justice and social change this Black History Month, including the history of Black solidarity with Palestinians. I’m proud to serve in Congress alongside Black progressive leaders who’ve been demanding a ceasefire and speaking up for Palestinians’ rights. One of my fiercest allies in Congress is Rep. Summer Lee , who overcame millions in attacks from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC in 2022, during her first election to Congress. Members of the U.S. House of Representatives run for re-election every two years, which means this is her first re-election. And this year, Republican-funded AIPAC is planning to spend $100 MILLION to defeat Summer and other Black progressives from our Squad. AIPAC even recruited an anti-ceasefire opponent who’s running against Summer in Pennsylvania’s April 23 primary election. With her primary election coming up so soon, Summer needs grassroots fundraising support to once again overcome AIPAC’s attacks. | Summer Lee and I were both community organizers before running for state-level public office and then for Congress. On both the state and federal level, I’ve created multiple Neighborhood Service Centers to help constituents with everyday needs. In Congress, I’ve been training my colleagues on how to do similar work in their districts. In her first year of office, Summer has so far opened up 5 satellite offices in her district, in addition to her main office, and has run mobile service centers. Through this on-the-ground service work, she has supported 1,600 constituents with getting their Social Security benefits, and has helped other constituents with issues like navigating our immigration system. We need to keep Summer Lee in Congress so she can keep doing this essential work—the work that all members of Congress should be doing. She is truly rooted in her community, and while prioritizing the needs of her constituents, she also recognizes the importance of equality and freedom for all people across the country and the world. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. Onward together! -Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
I’m fed up with Tennessee’s far-right “leaders.”

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79209689/455773982/-849459103?refcode=ea.0b8a69ae-b6cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.0b8a69ae-b6cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjhhNjlhZS1iNmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lV9Bv2H74zjIcngtn-x6ShyUnWFbA6LQNqSYMNPUB7o=&emci=6cc63ed9-dfcc-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=0b8a69ae-b6cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

Peter, I hold a lot of opinions that make me mighty unpopular with extremist Republicans here in Tennessee (like my colleagues in the TN legislature) and in Washington (like Marsha Blackburn). But here’s one belief that really _shouldn’t_ be controversial: Elected representatives must be accountable to their constituents — not special-interest groups, not powerful political leaders, not unaccountable organizations like the NRA. _My opponent and her far-right allies would seem to disagree._ They’re in the pocket of the gun lobby, then vote AGAINST commonsense gun violence prevention legislation, even when survivors plead with them to do something. They take massive checks from corporate PACs, then vote to give corporations tax breaks while working folks make up the difference. They ignore the real needs of our communities right here in Tennessee in favor of playing political games with far-right culture war issues. **I’m fed up with the far-right so-called leaders Tennessee’s saddled with. I think we can do better.** **_[Peter, I’m asking you to join me in the fight to DEFEAT Marsha Blackburn and return responsive representation to the people. clean_body: I’m fed up with Tennessee’s far-right “leaders.” | Peter, I hold a lot of opinions that make me mighty unpopular with extremist Republicans here in Tennessee (like my colleagues in the TN legislature) and in Washington (like Marsha Blackburn). But here’s one belief that really shouldn’t be controversial: Elected representatives must be accountable to their constituents — not special-interest groups, not powerful political leaders, not unaccountable organizations like the NRA. My opponent and her far-right allies would seem to disagree. They’re in the pocket of the gun lobby, then vote AGAINST commonsense gun violence prevention legislation, even when survivors plead with them to do something. They take massive checks from corporate PACs, then vote to give corporations tax breaks while working folks make up the difference. They ignore the real needs of our communities right here in Tennessee in favor of playing political games with far-right culture war issues. I’m fed up with the far-right so-called leaders Tennessee’s saddled with. I think we can do better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: It’s coming
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Kyrsten Sinema could make her decision any day now. Once she does, the entire GOP is going to open up on Ruben.
#

By this point in 2022, more than $34.5 million had been spent in Arizona’s Senate campaign.
We haven’t seen anywhere near that amount so far.
**But believe us: It’s coming.**
Kyrsten Sinema could make her decision any day now.
Once she does, the entire GOP is going to open fire on Ruben.
They’re keeping their powder dry for now, but they’re going to give everything they’ve got to take back Arizona’s seat.
**The question is: What are we going to do to stop them?**
Arizona is the best chance we have at picking up a seat in the Senate this year. If we do, we’ll have a much better chance at holding our majority, especially in an environment where we have no margin for error. If we don’t, it’s Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell again.
If we’re going to have any shot at it, we’re going to need to hit our fundraising goals. And right now, we’re tracking behind where we need to be.
[**So we’re asking you, respectfully, if you can chip in $3 and help us catch up. We can’t do it without you. Never could.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240217-1-120&t=1&akid=1969%2E734936%2EndPvZX)

clean_body: Kyrsten Sinema could make her decision any day now. Once she does, the entire GOP is going to open up on Ruben. By this point in 2022, more than $34.5 million had been spent in Arizona’s Senate campaign. We haven’t seen anywhere near that amount so far. But believe us: It’s coming. Kyrsten Sinema could make her decision any day now. Once she does, the entire GOP is going to open fire on Ruben. They’re keeping their powder dry for now, but they’re going to give everything they’ve got to take back Arizona’s seat. The question is: What are we going to do to stop them? Arizona is the best chance we have at picking up a seat in the Senate this year. If we do, we’ll have a much better chance at holding our majority, especially in an environment where we have no margin for error. If we don’t, it’s Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell again. If we’re going to have any shot at it, we’re going to need to hit our fundraising goals. And right now, we’re tracking behind where we need to be. Friend,

Well, it's official.

I feel lower than a gopher hole.

So low I couldn't even jump over a dime.

We didn't meet our recent fundraising deadline, which doesn't bode well for the rest of this year.

**I feel like maybe I forgot to mention that it 's an election year, and we have the chance to Take Back the Senate in just a few months.**

subject: Week 6: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4b74d10053&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

An exhausting, but a productive week at the Capitol. Early mornings, late nights. Nothing like getting to the Capitol around 8am and leaving after 8pm. This was also the last week to hear non-appropriation-related bills in the State Senate. Last Monday, we heard over 30 bills in Finance and Commerce (FICO) and on Valentine’s Day we heard nearly 40 bills in Education until well after 7pm.

Over the course of the week, I had two bills heard in [FICO](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2d1b2cb69c&e=a7ab36849c), three bills in Transportation, Technology and Missing Children ([TTMC](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f17cf839c3&e=a7ab36849c)), one bill in Military Affairs and Public Safety ([MAPS](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bdcd19ad26&e=a7ab36849c)), four in [Judiciary](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=a0fd5d6fe0&e=a7ab36849c) and one in [Elections](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4455980c1e&e=a7ab36849c) before this week wrapped up. Thankfully, they all passed out of committee and will head to the Senate floor for a vote next week.

On Thursday, February 15th quite a few of my bills were voted out of the Senate and will now head to the House for a potential hearing, including:
[Senate Bill 1364](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=491208727e&e=a7ab36849c) (probation transfer) voted out of the whole Senate (26-0-4)
[Senate Bill 1366](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6dbb70e42c&e=a7ab36849c) (regulatory sandbox) voted out of the whole Senate (16-10-4)
[Senate Bill 1370](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2636cddab8&e=a7ab36849c) (youth entrepreneur aka free the lemons) voted out of the whole Senate (16-10-4)
[Senate Bill 1436](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f1fc111bce&e=a7ab36849c) (Kayleigh’s law additions) voted out of the whole Senate (26-0-4)

Next week, we’ll finish voting out Senate-sponsored bills to send over to the House for a hearing and hopefully final votes before heading to the governor.

**Arizona Republican Party Keeping Secretary Fontes Honest **

As you may know, in each newsletter I email to you I include a link to my E-Qual (aka online nomination petition) so registered voters receiving our emails in LD2 can sign my online nomination petition. Well, earlier in the week the Secretary of State’s office took down E-Qual without notice. Under the former Secretary of State they pulled the same non-sense in 2022, so when I served in the House I sponsored, [HB 2703](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d552cddb82&e=a7ab36849c), a bill demanding the SOS keep E-Qual open and if for any reason they believe there might be a disruption they are supposed to notify us. Well, my 2022 legislation is the basis for an inquiry by the Arizona Republican Party against the current Secretary of State. You can read more about it [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=67f7e722e0&e=a7ab36849c). Finally, the AZGOP chairwoman gave an election integrity update. You can listen [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1773f23f60&e=a7ab36849c).

**Calling all Election Integrity Enthusiasts**

If you care about election integrity, can you lend a hand to be a poll observer this year? If so, there are quite a few upcoming online training sessions available for you to be a better poll observer. Here are a few upcoming training sessions for you to sign up:

**Monday, February 19 th 1:00 PM**
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwtdOCprzIvG9yX1JESQihiLUgtqsofUnWf](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=44da906de1&e=a7ab36849c "https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwtdOCprzIvG9yX1JESQihiLUgtqsofUnWf")

**Monday, February 22 nd 1:00PM**
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcofuqrqz0rHt0J3bwnKMdHGyZK9kM-QSTc](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ca95726e71&e=a7ab36849c "https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcofuqrqz0rHt0J3bwnKMdHGyZK9kM-QSTc")

**Saturday, February 24 th 5:00 PM **
[https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZAldemoqzsoE9O4hlk0y2hZjvzJOgJqFouw](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f01a94b7bc&e=a7ab36849c "https://rnchq.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZAldemoqzsoE9O4hlk0y2hZjvzJOgJqFouw")

**March 19 th Presidential Preference Election (PPE)**

What is a PPE? A [PPE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=613ff44332&e=a7ab36849c) is an election which voters choose who they want their presidential candidate to be in the November 2024 general election.

If you are a registered Republican or Democrat, you can vote in the upcoming PPE. If you are a registered Independent and would like to vote in the PPE, you will need to re-register either as a Democrat or a Republican to cast a ballot. If you have a strong preference in this year’s presidential you have until February 20th to register to vote in the PPE. Early voting begins on February 21st. If you vote in person, please visit this [dashboard](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6e4cab6571&e=a7ab36849c) once early voting begins to see where you can vote.

We have all heard about recent glitches in the voter registration database. You can check your voter registration [here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1eecc2f37a&e=a7ab36849c) to ensure you can vote in the PPE.

Ok, I must run. I am heading back down to the Capitol this morning in support of the Second Amendment rally.

Take care,
Shawnna

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Freedom Fighters, An exhausting, but a productive week at the Capitol. Early mornings, late nights. Nothing like getting to the Capitol around 8am and leaving after 8pm. This was also the last week to hear non-appropriation-related bills in the State Senate. Last Monday, we heard over 30 bills in Finance and Commerce (FICO) and on Valentine’s Day we heard nearly 40 bills in Education until well after 7pm. Over the course of the week, I had two bills heard in , three bills in Transportation, Technology and Missing Children (), one bill in Military Affairs and Public Safety (), four in and one in before this week wrapped up. Thankfully, they all passed out of committee and will head to the Senate floor for a vote next week. On Thursday, February 15th quite a few of my bills were voted out of the Senate and will now head to the House for a potential hearing, including: (probation transfer) voted out of the whole Senate (26-0-4) (regulatory sandbox) voted out of the whole Senate (16-10-4) (youth entrepreneur aka free the lemons) voted out of the whole Senate (16-10-4) (Kayleigh’s law additions) voted out of the whole Senate (26-0-4) Next week, we’ll finish voting out Senate-sponsored bills to send over to the House for a hearing and hopefully final votes before heading to the governor. Arizona Republican Party Keeping Secretary Fontes Honest As you may know, in each newsletter I email to you I include a link to my E-Qual (aka online nomination petition) so registered voters receiving our emails in LD2 can sign my online nomination petition. Well, earlier in the week the Secretary of State’s office took down E-Qual without notice. Under the former Secretary of State they pulled the same non-sense in 2022, so when I served in the House I sponsored, , a bill demanding the SOS keep E-Qual open and if for any reason they believe there might be a disruption they are supposed to notify us. Well, my 2022 legislation is the basis for an inquiry by the Arizona Republican Party against the current Secretary of State. You can read more about it . Finally, the AZGOP chairwoman gave an election integrity update. You can listen . Calling all Election Integrity Enthusiasts If you care about election integrity, can you lend a hand to be a poll observer this year? If so, there are quite a few upcoming online training sessions available for you to be a better poll observer. Here are a few upcoming training sessions for you to sign up: Monday, February 19 th 1:00 PM "" Monday, February 22 nd 1:00PM "" Saturday, February 24 th 5:00 PM "" March 19 th Presidential Preference Election (PPE) What is a PPE? A is an election which voters choose who they want their presidential candidate to be in the November 2024 general election. If you are a registered Republican or Democrat, you can vote in the upcoming PPE. If you are a registered Independent and would like to vote in the PPE, you will need to re-register either as a Democrat or a Republican to cast a ballot. If you have a strong preference in this year’s presidential you have until February 20th to register to vote in the PPE. Early voting begins on February 21st. If you vote in person, please visit this once early voting begins to see where you can vote. We have all heard about recent glitches in the voter registration database. You can check your voter registration to ensure you can vote in the PPE. Ok, I must run. I am heading back down to the Capitol this morning in support of the Second Amendment rally. Take care, Shawnna | "Help a Republican Win in 2024" | "Sign a Proven Leader's Nomination Petition " | "Volunteer with the Bolick Brigade" | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. I’m sure you must be thinking: How will $1 make a difference?

In a toss-up, extremely competitive race like ours, I promise you, it will make a significant impact. **If everyone reading this email chipped in just $1, we would be able to ramp up our on-the-ground programs this year to reach more undecided voters in AZ-01.**

But as we inch closer to the AZ-01 primary election this summer and the general election this fall, we need to finish every month as strong as we possibly can.

**Remember: Schweikert has never been more vulnerable – his campaign is facing lawsuit after lawsuit, and he’s losing the trust of Arizonans.**

Schweikert is beatable – he narrowly won in 2022 with 3,200 votes (that’s less than 1% of the vote), and with his far-right extremism on full display, he is dangerous and must be defeated.

[Unlike Schweikert, I’m ready to put our community first and represent AZ-01 in Congress. That’s why I’m personally asking you to chip in just $1 or any amount you can afford today.
