clean_body: | = Hi there, today I’m reaching out with a unique request: = I know it may sound small, but any amount boosts our campaign. | **= I’m sure you must be thinking: How will $1 make a difference? In a toss-up, extremely competitive race like ours, I promise you, it will make a significant impact. If everyone reading this email chipped in just $1, we would be able to ramp up our on-the-ground programs this year to reach more undecided voters in AZ-01. But as we inch closer to the AZ-01 primary election this summer and the general election this fall, we need to finish every month as strong as we possibly can. Remember: Schweikert has never been more vulnerable – his campaign is facing lawsuit after lawsuit, and he’s losing the trust of Arizonans. Schweikert is beatable – he narrowly won in 2022 with 3,200 votes (that’s less than 1% of the vote), and with his far-right extremism on full display, he is dangerous and must be defeated. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’m so grateful for your support. name: Matthew Lucci
subject: Early Voting Starts Tuesday!
body:
We're in the final stretch of this election. Early voting starts on Tuesday!

There's two things that we need help with:

**1) Our campaign is about _$200 short_ of our funding needs to cover literature and signs for the key early voting locations.** Can you spare a few dollars to get us across the line? You can donate [**here**](https://secure.winred.com/lucci-for-congress/donate-today) to power us to the finish.

**2) We need folks to help greet voters at the polls during early voting, so that we can catch undecided voters before they cast their ballots.** Sign up to help greet at the polls [**here**](https://forms.gle/SsKgHuBaL4TYmoqQ9). We need all the help we can get, so if you can spare a few hours or a few days, or anything in between, please sign up to help!

Thank you so much!

(AND MAKE SURE TO GO VOTE!)

\--

**\--**
**Matthew Lucci for Congress TX-25**
[Matthew@LucciForTexas](mailto:Matthew@LucciForTexas.com)

(682) 220-9925
**[www.LucciForTexas.com](http://www.luccifortexas.com/)**
****

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Fighting disinformation from super PACs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We’re going to give you a look behind the scenes here.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37804%2E3422442%2E27Se_2)
Derek, we’re going to give you a look behind the scenes here:
Every Sunday night, our team looks at how much we’ve raised over the past week and re-evaluates our TV spending ahead of the primary election on March 5th.
We’re currently being outspent 3:1 and multiple super PACs are attacking Katie with dishonest and misleading ads. **We have to fight back against this disinformation with our own TV ads, but we’re slipping behind in reaching our fundraising goal for the week.**
**We won’t BS you: we urgently need to raise another $50,000 before midnight tomorrow** in order to avoid making budget cuts to our current TV and digital ad plans for these final 17 days before the primary. **[Will you donate right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240217-1?refcode=em20240217-37804&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37804_3422442_27Se_2&akid=37804%2E3422442%2E27Se_2)**
Derek, you are a critical part of this campaign. Unlike other candidates in this race, Katie has never taken corporate PAC money.
**[Can you donate right now to help us close our $50,000 gap, so we can reach the voters who will decide the election on March 5?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240217-1?refcode=em20240217-37804&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37804_3422442_27Se_2&akid=37804%2E3422442%2E27Se_2)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240217-1?refcode=em20240217-37804&refcode2=37804_3422442_27Se_2&akid=37804%2E3422442%2E27Se_2)
Thank you so much for being a Porter Supporter! We have a path to victory but it’s going to take all of us to get there.
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240217-37804&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37804_3422442_27Se_2&akid=37804%2E3422442%2E27Se_2)**

name: Seth Moulton
subject: We must stand up to dictators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements]Friend,
On Friday, news broke that Vladimir Putin had murdered Russian opposition leader Alexei Navalny. That news sent a shockwave throughout the world and prompted world leaders to respond.
Putin is a murderous dictator who loathes dissent, free speech and true democracy. Though his regime killed Navalny, they won’t be able to quash his legacy. His life and his work gave hope and voice to millions of Russians who are tired of Putin -- people who are ready to fight for change.
But since the war in Ukraine started, there has been a rapidly growing faction of the Republican Party that idolizes Putin. In fact, the Russian President appears to have a real grip on what now seems like a significant portion of MAGA Republicans. It’s strange and it’s scary, friend.
That’s why today, in the wake of this news, I’m asking you to make a contribution to Serve America -- an organization dedicated to electing a new generation of Democratic leaders to Congress. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america] I can assure you, they believe in democracies, side with America, and know better than to idolize Vladimir Putin.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements]
In his final message to the world, Navalny reminded us that "the only thing necessary for the triumph of evil, is for good people to do nothing."
This is an election year. Trump, who leads the Republican Party and will likely be on the ballot in November, has openly fawned over Putin. He’s repeatedly shared his admiration of him and many in his party are now following his lead.
We cannot afford to do nothing. We have to fight this year and every year to elect leaders who love America and work to improve our democracy -- not break it.
Navalny had what Putin will never have: courage, true patriotism, soul.
Let’s honor him by continuing to fight.
-Seth
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-america?refcode=email_20220217_SA_endorsements]
https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton [https://www.facebook.com/sethmoulton] https://twitter.com/sethmoulton [https://twitter.com/sethmoulton] https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sethmoulton/?hl=en] https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/seth-moulton-for-america/]

Salem, MA 01970

name: Impeachment Update
subject: A Biden Administration official could be REMOVED from his cabinet position

body:

|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79212255/455781496/-46109959?refcode=em-2.17.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE5YjEyZS1iYWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-574bBkreUVk9q8t9NzRipwKpVgt9bybb3s9OSC2Q0=)

Did you see this news, Peter?

**My opponent Mike Garcia launched a flurry of attacks against me. With Election Day just weeks away, his campaign sent out deceitful mailers to voters across the district.**

I’m disappointed, but not surprised to see these tactics. It’s clear he sees our grassroots movement as a real threat, and is likely starting to panic.

Garcia is the last Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress. He doesn’t share values with the people of CA-27, and voters know that his career in Congress is defined by his alignment with the extreme far-right.

I'm not a career politician, but I do know that we can't let attacks like these go unchecked. And the best way to push back is by doing it together -- with lots of grassroots contributions from folks who are ready to defeat Garcia and bring real leadership back to Congress.

**[With nearly two weeks until ballots are counted, we need a surge of support to counter these attacks. We are on the ground reaching undecided voters, running digital ads, and planting yard signs – but this work isn’t cheap. Can I count on you to rush in $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79212258/455781499/-46109959?refcode=em-2.17.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE5YjEyZS1iYWNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W-574bBkreUVk9q8t9NzRipwKpVgt9bybb3s9OSC2Q0=)**

clean_body: | = = Did you see this news, Peter? My opponent Mike Garcia launched a flurry of attacks against me. With Election Day just weeks away, his campaign sent out deceitful mailers to voters across the district. I’m disappointed, but not surprised to see these tactics. It’s clear he sees our grassroots movement as a real threat, and is likely starting to panic. Garcia is the last Republican representing Los Angeles County in Congress. He doesn’t share values with the people of CA-27, and voters know that his career in Congress is defined by his alignment with the extreme far-right. I'm not a career politician, but I do know that we can't let attacks like these go unchecked. And the best way to push back is by doing it together -- with lots of grassroots contributions from folks who are ready to defeat Garcia and bring real leadership back to Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. subject: Asking for your personal endorsement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy needs to know if you stand with her.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2015%2E35263%2Ea67Rq8)
Peter — Tammy needs your support today, but first let us tell you why: **FIRST:** Reports confirmed that right-wing megamillionaire, Scott Mayer, is making preparations to launch his Senate campaign against Tammy Baldwin for Wisconsin’s Senate seat. **THEN:** A story broke confirming that ANOTHER right-wing megamillionaire — Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate, Eric Hovde — will announce his Senate campaign to flip Tammy’s seat _next week._ **NOW:** We need a surge of grassroots support before these potential Republican opponents launch their campaigns and make this one of the nation’s most competitive Senate races. But we’re not asking you for money today. **Instead, we’re asking for your personal endorsement.** **[Will you add your name to personally endorse Tammy Baldwin for Senate? This race is heating up, so Tammy needs to know if you stand with her.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2402_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240217_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2015%2E35263%2Ea67Rq8)** | [ENDORSE TAMMY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2402_endorsetammy/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240217_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2015%2E35263%2Ea67Rq8)

**“China’s hackers are positioning on American infrastructure in preparation to wreak havoc and cause real-world harm to American citizens and communities, if or when China decides the time has come to strike,”**

**-FBI Director Christopher Wray** This is really disturbing, Friend, First, Chinese Communists bought up America’s farmland.

Then, they piloted a spy balloon over our soil.

And now, they’re ready to hack into our critical infrastructure and wreak havoc on American lives.
**[All while President Biden, Homeland Security Secretary Mayorkas, and FBI Director Wray sit on their hands.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ee24271c666c42048ef39319a6c260bf&_e=wzjARrvVVdccOx1TV6jvnw2S7cPZupCViSEz_C4bFujVf2FFtTIOxd6tAGHkSKADNnSQla9ylbfb5XV2SlMOsf9TcFwgpqhg9JIITb9yOsQkhhIkeFzPfjBLACiQwVrw9RzU8InbVnlU323pnzH0oTThfNOPDxY-05z__WCvidKTFkjoUfIP5IwYKzxSp97hoYLIOBl5Io8GTph8Ko5xzKUbR6Pm7XftOnT78_ainXFJbL1xtZA6oMoDHdseFVxdyDtMAJdsiAcTzDOuzJBnlsnemN3eaP0qZ4eBlR9UXsXo5i-SBO8ncP3083oOZMBJDPq-KALuwnBWagWe5-djNXXaEQ_XmRta-yHlkLdScOafJkBwvImo8zcWdDmyp51denDOzniX0MC1i2C28TPd2anLYSTK-Wl7_4c3n3G8atJ8vkVq9vyLGaIL3deURM_e)** Friend, I’m going to tell you a few uncomfortable truths. These may be difficult to read, but you deserve to know. 1: The Chinese Communist Party is the biggest foreign threat that America has ever seen.

2: Chinese Communists are not only building up an army, but also funneling money into efforts to attack our country and dismantle our infrastructure.

3: Chinese nationals are the fastest-growing group of people coming across our border unvetted and unaccounted for.
4: Chinese companies are building factories on American soil to build their products, including here in Michigan. **[And meanwhile, Joe Biden’s administration has made our country a sitting duck for attack.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ee24271c666c42048ef39319a6c260bf&_e=wzjARrvVVdccOx1TV6jvnw2S7cPZupCViSEz_C4bFujVf2FFtTIOxd6tAGHkSKADNnSQla9ylbfb5XV2SlMOsf9TcFwgpqhg9JIITb9yOsQkhhIkeFzPfjBLACiQwVrw9RzU8InbVnlU323pnzH0oTThfNOPDxY-05z__WCvidKTFkjoUfIP5IwYKzxSp97hoYLIOBl5Io8GTph8Ko5xzKUbR6Pm7XftOnT78_ainXFJbL1xtZA6oMoDHdseFVxdyDtMAJdsiAcTzDOuzJBnlsnemN3eaP0qZ4eBlR9UXsWcXlfEyM5Ir-wrK8223BoOPPWVdzpfnT8bZqJaG1eBMtPGmJFIdn62GJtFc47omBrFHpU_bI4wgSKbH0qdEJL6S1rmA3KHKKy9YivpgZ2iq5vphAy2DVsDPDq0S-vIfhZ8QZvRnu5JDJSv56s1XeOM)** Joe Biden and his Democrat allies have continuously voted to send YOUR hard-earned taxpayer money to build up China’s military. Friend, I’m not exaggerating when I say that our country’s survival depends on electing leaders who understand the threat posed by Communist China and are ready to tackle it head on.

But in order to do that, I’m going to need your help.
Friend, I wouldn’t ask for money unless it was important – and our national security certainly is. With all that being said, **[any amount of money you can give, whether it be $10, $15, or even $25,](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=ee24271c666c42048ef39319a6c260bf&_e=wzjARrvVVdccOx1TV6jvnw2S7cPZupCViSEz_C4bFujVf2FFtTIOxd6tAGHkSKADNnSQla9ylbfb5XV2SlMOsf9TcFwgpqhg9JIITb9yOsQkhhIkeFzPfjBLACiQwVrw9RzU8InbVnlU323pnzH0oTThfNOPDxY-05z__WCvidKTFkjoUfIP5IwYKzxSp97hoYLIOBl5Io8GTph8Ko5xzKUbR6Pm7XftOnT78_ainXFJbL1xtZA6oMoDHdseFVxdyDtMAJdsiAcTzDOuzJBnlsnemN3eaP0qZ4eBlR9UXsWONlLACEpbQGfZpZ5oNa93iRWJcgkYxRbYwK50sBr0xftNWjWXj7a_ReovgjTk_j1-kQGc9Fh9HK94VVOwHvjagLsF5OIQI2f2K5XJ3ycoGmTYdT3c0LM5Tay00sW8vG8mXjQgtD6g_3sYiFsfyudl)** will go a long way in helping me reach Michiganders on the necessity of fighting back against Chinese Communist threats. Can you help me take on this important fight?

Sincerely,

Mike Rogers

Here's why:
As you probably already know, Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the same way a lot of her colleagues in Congress do. She doesn't take dark money from super PACs, big checks from corporate lobbyists, or curry favor with billionaires.

**That's because Ilhan knows she can count on _us_ — a grassroots movement of lots and lots of real people chipping in what they can, when they can.**

Our average contribution this cycle is about $24. And when we ask supporters like you to chip in for the first time, we usually ask for just $3.
All that matters is that _you_ are choosing to be a part of this movement — a part of something larger than all of us.

|

[Act now](https://www.kennedy24.com/february-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=online_event_2_17_24_r2_e2&n=2) and sign up for an unforgettable virtual experience featuring Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. alongside a special guest. This exclusive event promises an engaging fireside chat, providing unparalleled insights into Mr. Kennedy's vision for the future of our nation.
_As a valued supporter, your presence at this event is paramount._ Your ticket, available with a campaign contribution of $24, not only secures your virtual seat but also contributes to our shared mission of positive change.
Event Details:
| Date: Friday, February 23rd, 2024
---
Time: 5:00 - 6:00 PM PST
Location: **Virtual Only**
Ticket: $24
[RSVP Now >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/february-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=online_event_2_17_24_r2_e2&n=3)

_This event is fully virtual._ Whether you're at home, in the office, or on the go, you won't miss a moment of this enlightening dialogue. Once registered, you'll receive a link on the day of the event, granting you access from anywhere with an internet connection.
[Purchase your ticket now](https://www.kennedy24.com/february-virtual-event?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=online_event_2_17_24_r2_e2&n=5) and be part of a transformative discussion that shapes the future of our nation!

See you there!
Team Kennedy

| Friend, It's Rudy Salas. I’m the Democrat running to flip California's 22nd Congressional District and defeat my extremist opponent David Valadao. We fought hard to flip this seat last November. **With your help, we almost did it.** Our campaign came closer than _any_ Democratic challenger in the entire state to flipping a red seat. We were just a few points short, and that was despite Kevin McCarthy's super PAC allies spending $16 million against us. Winning back the House majority runs through CA-22, and I intend to finish what we started. But I can't do this alone. If we're going to win, I'll need your help in standing up for American Democracy and protecting our rights. **[Please, can you chip in $35 to my campaign and the California Democratic Party ahead of my critical Primary Election where early voting is already happening >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79214478/455788949/-734407027?&refcode=20240217_FR_45DO_SalasSplit&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJhZmE1Ny1iZmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zje6xMBm-36EPV5u1prfA2Dn0eHI2r3mR95Ka-d2TI8=)** [CHIP IN $15 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79214479/455788950/-734407027?&refcode=20240217_FR_45DO_SalasSplit&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJhZmE1Ny1iZmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zje6xMBm-36EPV5u1prfA2Dn0eHI2r3mR95Ka-d2TI8=)

Twelve years ago, I made history when I became the first Latino elected to Bakersfield's City Council and with your help, we will make history again by becoming the first Latino from the Central Valley to serve in Congress. During my five terms in the California State Legislature, we brought down costs for seniors, passed overtime pay for farmworkers, invested in our children and made drinking water safer for our communities. **My opponent David Valadao and his party bosses in Washington are making life harder for families in CA-22.** At a time when costs are rising, Valadao is currently voting the party line to raise health care costs, cutting “meals on wheels” for seniors and cutting veterans' benefits. While our freedom rights as Americans are under attack in the Supreme Court, _Valadao is a co-author of legislation for a national abortion ban, even if a woman is raped._ **We deserve better.** The Central Valley is the beating heart of our state, and we deserve someone who will do what’s right for America and Central Valley families. The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13024%2E878179%2EEXHBmW). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13024%2E878179%2EEXHBmW).**

We knew Ted Cruz was pro-insurrection. Now we have proof.
In the recording, Cruz brags that he had talked 11 of his fellow Senators into OBJECTING to certification of the election.
The Fox anchor asks: “Is there any chance you can overturn this?”
Cruz responds: “I hope so.”

**We couldn’t agree with Senator Warren more.** Billionaires shouldn’t be able to buy elections, it harms and corrupts our very democracy.

But unless we all step up, dark money-backed Republicans will steamroll our efforts to end _Citizens United_ and we’ll lose our window of opportunity.

[**So we’re joining Senator Warren in this fight and calling on you to stand alongside us: Chip in $7 to help end _Citizens United_ and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/37948?t=8&akid=20815%2E4449941%2EophKC1)

name: Juanjo at United We Dream Action
subject: Abbott’s racist law will go into effect March 5— unless we can do something about it
body:
Lawyers appeared in court in Texas this week. | | | Peter, The Department of Justice is suing Texas over its latest attack on human rights — and their lawyers faced off in court this past Thursday. SB 4, a bill championed by racist Texas Governor Greg Abbott, would make crossing the border punishable by **jail time** and would give Texas law enforcement the power to **deport migrants back to Mexico.** The law is abhorrent, and will open migrants and people of color up to harassment and physical danger, while trampling on their basic human rights. **But unless the judge rules against Texas, the law will go into effect in just two weeks.** We have to get loud now, and make our demands known before it’s too late. Our country should welcome immigrants and pass laws that allow us to live safely and thrive — not demonize us for cheap political points. **Will you chip in $10 or whatever makes sense for you to fuel our work for expansive and permanent protections for all immigrants and against racist and harmful laws passed by terrible politicians?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP839WsQnMAgK23tZWX-Lv8bYX7pUW7d8rhnm8dS_k39VvweEbCKkIzv6qYkXpY8qqvQz0sw4S0Cpq1HMfQ8Au6Ky3f9JlOeONJcdUvWzmSA7mZSZ97QqA3Xiwu3gXlq7IIphQk0ogxkJ_OhazgouwQtfX8uItTFn7JaTG4KvE9r5zC4-LB1q_xo2UywUIL-lUZrx7G1N7JWoed1662rn1atHlIrWEUonsEY397E9bKxDtKbvjJ5SWLuXiV11PE0HE92GK29vUcKquaS9zYaLuZHo-Lyke7-DPod7SABF3qpVoNZtud1m5pyzzBIMWUkNpFvkzlWc0yh7ufGlEgaZFbhNzQ7ZOnSHskk6uw9myVqAStzVHhfzmgw-gPRTVObIU-mJZp6dDhSv48uIxsA3Kf_VDB6hZ5xVN2mjX3lKIJ9YLfg5JvTNf_7JyB9GrNri18z87hLjEmYrtu9uIlkV5YnC3gb8XmGCrxIJyrOYQCJ42bDyT7iSH9iHQ9yYYZwfjA/43x/iAOzeHFKR-GD4qCkJSh8Sw/h0/z1UIEcz3_BFfHPtSCN6N_02QKY43nnjZ--LhEeOOKYE)

clean_body: Lawyers appeared in court in Texas this week. | | | Peter, The Department of Justice is suing Texas over its latest attack on human rights — and their lawyers faced off in court this past Thursday. SB 4, a bill championed by racist Texas Governor Greg Abbott, would make crossing the border punishable by jail time and would give Texas law enforcement the power to deport migrants back to Mexico. The law is abhorrent, and will open migrants and people of color up to harassment and physical danger, while trampling on their basic human rights. But unless the judge rules against Texas, the law will go into effect in just two weeks. We have to get loud now, and make our demands known before it’s too late. Our country should welcome immigrants and pass laws that allow us to live safely and thrive — not demonize us for cheap political points. Will you chip in $10 or whatever makes sense for you to fuel our work for expansive and permanent protections for all immigrants and against racist and harmful laws passed by terrible politicians? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for being on the team, Juanjo, United We Dream Action

With our planet on fire and our leaders failing us, we need to elect new leaders who will take direct and meaningful steps to avert climate disaster. Thankfully, it’s not too late.

body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=82834dcbe58546b28e0edcc45229a590&_e=AL9uOw0DkMlb9kRi8DJ5Mc-1IEeSEtsSKr68PYr-peKUITCRek3SNMPFLlFw_W078a1ssM2ccn1tCqsXokzEvwHS5pZdHLlFjLkwQi9-QtYAuOChkM9N6W6P5WgYNEsoDEyJ_v40sXtBwiYtsECvzeHxbvzatIZv30hDnI0Ravfvv1uvOjIo6y1DyUoQc5mdNdHcoXnFC_rTXsrVoXqv39dK5YECpsokysxzVkRwGKAyvO3UGYl2aiq5TAMMkKqxdP-orJ03OPvymh6YZOd5GA-2z-R-bEBeOx1Mv2L7mi-dJiyssEhFZpYHgnzi2KvHrhJnPXfZVr7wVf5ZYuB4QOo-R2rHYuX02V_kzx3oXTClc8uDdDgu5cnsVUTO0UKs)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=82834dcbe58546b28e0edcc45229a590&_e=AL9uOw0DkMlb9kRi8DJ5Mc-1IEeSEtsSKr68PYr-peKUITCRek3SNMPFLlFw_W078a1ssM2ccn1tCqsXokzEvwHS5pZdHLlFjLkwQi9-QtYAuOChkM9N6W6P5WgYNEsoDEyJ_v40sXtBwiYtsECvzeHxbvzatIZv30hDnI0Ravfvv1uvOjIo6y1DyUoQc5mdNdHcoXnFC_rTXsrVoXqv39dK5YECpsokysxzVkRwGKDVKmWs2YC8j2RhZcfUVmTPwy_FhglFlv6j9tA3fSy7AjsrIgRjIr3gyQfRanj1pKiM79d4mYLme2nNx46xWcLNJOlSQbyJZZ4NyI22wTjNJC1wq4emWLD-teAevp49eRjDHBJeCr2wqNymVPqXv0YC)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=82834dcbe58546b28e0edcc45229a590&_e=AL9uOw0DkMlb9kRi8DJ5Mc-1IEeSEtsSKr68PYr-peKUITCRek3SNMPFLlFw_W078a1ssM2ccn1tCqsXokzEvwHS5pZdHLlFjLkwQi9-QtYAuOChkM9N6W6P5WgYNEsoDEyJ_v40sXtBwiYtsECvzeHxbvzatIZv30hDnI0Ravfvv1uvOjIo6y1DyUoQc5mdNdHcoXnFC_rTXsrVoXqv39dK5YECpsokysxzVkRwGKA5Swx3MABt5fcjC2_GRO-ZSiKc01m7wBlJS6PEK4-yAg2xtyfoww8w4NxEfZxyL8rImCVka6wxGV-N_YfDxQwC1s_kLKVSBhYt-78QRyOPonKR9S0hio_q078DwhBLI6BEB8Py-yY8szy1fIBu7zqB)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=82834dcbe58546b28e0edcc45229a590&_e=AL9uOw0DkMlb9kRi8DJ5Mc-1IEeSEtsSKr68PYr-peKUITCRek3SNMPFLlFw_W078a1ssM2ccn1tCqsXokzEvwHS5pZdHLlFjLkwQi9-QtYAuOChkM9N6W6P5WgYNEsoDEyJ_v40sXtBwiYtsECvzeHxbvzatIZv30hDnI0Ravfvv1uvOjIo6y1DyUoQc5mdNdHcoXnFC_rTXsrVoXqv39dK5YECpsokysxzVkRwGKBH7ZwE3Gm3DG06BHIX3J74petATatP-MotbPqixilkrg67nJO1s9bPmpf3esSzgwv08nSRUAgeuAK-LBM6o-LUOLa2kxgD82Hh8CzJUzH_6DtZKOqw2xEXOGpmI7tLAtEU2EMccw_XLftvLLhTZfoe)

A radical Democrat Judge can destroy the business I’ve spent DECADES building. The AMERICA LAST Swamp can make me march to Hell & back, but there’s NOT ONE THING I would change. Why? Because every hardship they put me through I’M DOING ALL FOR YOU! The Biden Regime & their corrupt allies want to DESTROY MY LIFE because I don’t bend the knee to DC Swamp. I will never stop putting AMERICA FIRST , but every second of my fight depends on support from Patriots like you. YOU ARE THE REASON I CAN KEEP FIGHTING! So today, I’m humbly asking for your support. | All of this will be worth it when we WIN in November. And when we’re victorious, I’ll remember what you did to make that possible. Please chip in today. WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | Thank you, | | Donald J. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: From Day One
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek,
We’ll get right to it: **_Will you chip in $5 to support John Fetterman today?_**
From Day One, we’ve never taken money from shady corporate PACs as John has stood up for the working people of Pennsylvania. It’s with grassroots supporter after grassroots supporter stepping up that we’ve been able to accomplish so much.
**[So can you chip in $5 — or more! — today? Your contribution helps us continue powering John’s work to fight for PA in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240217-1?refcode=em20240217-1-8796&refcode2=8796_434096_OKNImz&akid=8796%2E434096%2EOKNImz)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240217-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240217-8796&refcode2=8796_434096_OKNImz&akid=8796%2E434096%2EOKNImz)**
We’re so grateful you’re part of this incredible team.
Thank you!
-- Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240217-8796-footer&t=1&refcode2=8796_434096_OKNImz&akid=8796%2E434096%2EOKNImz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8796%2E434096%2EOKNImz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8796%2E434096%2EOKNImz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

“did not receive” a gift from Nathan Wade that she needed to disclose
in 2022. Willis did not disclose any payments made by Wade, including
a plane ticket to Miami that bank statements revealed he made, on her
2022 financial disclosure form, the Daily Caller News Foundation
previously reported.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Our Newest Video — “Appeasement”.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Republicans used to stand up for freedom. Now they stand for Putin.
#
When we say that we’re not going to let Trump get away with kowtowing to Putin, appeasing his expansionist ambitions, undermining NATO, endangering our national security — we mean it.
[**Watch our newest video, “Appeasement”](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-appeasement.vDZ25l&refcode=em240217-1-NOR&t=1&akid=24910%2E3013755%2E0A-lGg)**
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-appeasement.vDZ25l&refcode=em240217-1-NOR&t=2&akid=24910%2E3013755%2E0A-lGg)
Congressional Republicans and Trump are marching our country to war at the behest of Putin. Make no mistake — if Putin defeats Ukraine, he won’t stop there. And Trump’s encouraged him to do “whatever the hell” he wants to our allies and friends in Europe.
He’d lead us into World War III. That conflict would endanger American lives, and it would hit our own shores.
Republicans used to stand up for freedom. Now they stand for Putin.
VoteVets will continue to make the hardest hitting ads in the country — and we’ll continue hitting the GOP for their cowardice and appeasement.
[**Please, help us make sure this video is seen by the people who need to see it. Make a donation and help us spread the word. Help us hold Trump and the GOP accountable.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-appeasement.vDZ25l&refcode=em240217-1-NOR&t=3&akid=24910%2E3013755%2E0A-lGg)**

name: JasonCrowForCongress.com
subject: On a tightrope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
After the events of January 6, our democracy could rest on the 2024 election.
Add your name alongside Jason’s if you agree: We must elect a pro-democracy majority who will work to defend our democracy — not tear it down. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet]
ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet]

Team, our democracy is on a tightrope.

The Bipartisan Policy Center recently released a poll showing 82% of voters are worried about the state of our democracy.

That’s not all: Following the January 6 insurrection, another poll found that 83% of Americans are worried about further political violence.

https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet]

This is a concerning statistic — and one that transcends party lines. January 6 revealed that we cannot be complacent in protecting our democracy.

Americans should be able to trust their leaders to uphold our democratic values. That’s the bare minimum. We need leaders who have the courage to defend our democracy.

For Jason, this fight is personal. In the Army, he saw countries that struggled to enforce the rule of law, due process, and individual rights. He spent time in countries where fundamental rights — like the basic right to vote — aren’t guaranteed, so he knows the importance of protecting it here at home.

Jason is fighting to defend America’s democratic institutions and the rule of law. But with attacks on our democracy increasing by the day — including by MAGA extremists — we need to continue fighting to overcome their attacks.

Add your name today to stand with Jason: We need to elect a majority who is ready to fight to defend our democracy. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet]

ADD MY NAME [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/2024-02-democracypet]

Thank you,

— Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-february-2024]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]
Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
*Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

subject: We need to save our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

Our democracy is in danger. With Donald Trump set to be the Republican
nominee this election year, we’re witnessing our fundamental rights and
the very foundation of our democracy at risk.

As he continues to lie about the outcome of the 2020 election, Trump
promises to be a dictator upon day one in office.

Here's what another Trump presidency would mean: a national ban on
abortion, in his words the "termination" of the Constitution, the
weaponization of the Department of Justice against his political
opponents, the end of the Department of Education, and more.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2231?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_FR_20240217_MMFR_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_1.4&t=1001&akid=6607%2E1827488%2EHMk7AX ]In the face of these threats, we need your help to fight back by
winning Wisconsin this November. Please donate what you can to help us
reach our mid month fundraising goal.

With fair elections, reproductive rights, and the state of our government
on the line, there’s no room for error.

All of America is counting on us to win Wisconsin. We can’t let them, or
our democracy, down.

body:

| | The House of Reps passed my no mask bill...

46 voted yes, 24 voted no.

👀 Look who voted to keep you in masks (the red/no votes):

**So, now what?**

Well, now it goes to the Senate side of the building, where bills like this have NOT been given a hearing in recent years. Sad!

If you want Idaho to **__ban mask mandates and keep this medical tyranny from EVER happening again__ ,** please contact the "Senate State Affairs" committee members and let them know how you feel about this bill - H 493.

It's the PEOPLE's BILL and it MUST be heard!

In liberty,

Brian **P.S.**

[Click here to email the **Senate State Affairs** committee all at once](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=6c1270f3d2&e=dea908e0fe "let them know to hear H 493")

name: Team Kaptur HQ
subject: Vivek Ramaswamy endorsed Marcy's opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
Another MAGA Republican weighs in on our race

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79218546/455802157/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240217_team_vr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODg4Nzk3Zi1jYmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MVcfSoznMC99afPN3sOB7M54Ns-CvqIPxXSTlWR9TQ=)
---
Team, Marcy was just **one of FIVE Democrats to win in a Trump district in 2022**. You know what that means — GOP extremists are bringing everything they've got to try to unseat Marcy this November. The latest entrant in our re-election battle? **Vivek Ramaswamy** , the failed GOP presidential hopeful who never met a TV camera he didn't like. He just endorsed J.R. Majewski, Marcy's 2022 opponent who's running for Congress again. Ramaswamy said he's endorsing Majewski because he is an "America First" patriot. **We have different definitions of patriotism - ours doesn't include people who fabricate their military records or participate in an insurrection.** Our definition of patriotism involves fighting and delivering for our Heartland communities every day, protecting vital programs like Social Security and Medicare, and creating once-in-a-lifetime job opportunities through generational investments in our Great Lakes Region. **While Ramaswamy and Majewski fight to prove how much they love Donald Trump, Marcy never stops fighting for the community she loves.** That's the difference between the two, and it's why Marcy will win in November. [**Friend, we must reject Ramaswamy and the GOP again this fall, and we can only do that with your help. Please rush a contribution of any amount you can afford today to show the GOP that Northwest Ohio stands with Marcy in her work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79218547/455802158/1037629634?refcode=240217_team_vr_l1&ms=240217_team_vr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODg4Nzk3Zi1jYmNkLWVlMTEtODVmOS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8MVcfSoznMC99afPN3sOB7M54Ns-CvqIPxXSTlWR9TQ=) clean_body: Another MAGA Republican weighs in on our race | | = Team, Marcy was just one of FIVE Democrats to win in a Trump district in 2022. You know what that means — GOP extremists are bringing everything they've got to try to unseat Marcy this November. The latest entrant in our re-election battle? Vivek Ramaswamy , the failed GOP presidential hopeful who never met a TV camera he didn't like. He just endorsed J.R. Majewski, Marcy's 2022 opponent who's running for Congress again. Ramaswamy said he's endorsing Majewski because he is an "America First" patriot. We have different definitions of patriotism - ours doesn't include people who fabricate their military records or participate in an insurrection. Our definition of patriotism involves fighting and delivering for our Heartland communities every day, protecting vital programs like Social Security and Medicare, and creating once-in-a-lifetime job opportunities through generational investments in our Great Lakes Region. While Ramaswamy and Majewski fight to prove how much they love Donald Trump, Marcy never stops fighting for the community she loves. That's the difference between the two, and it's why Marcy will win in November. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Thank you for your support. Former President Donald Trump blasted Democratic Attorney General
Letitia James of New York and Judge Arthur Engoron on Friday following
the ruling in his civil fraud trial. James sued Trump in September
2022, alleging that he overstated the value of real estate holdings in
order to obtain loans.

Former President Donald Trump’s recent remarks regarding NATO created
a typical Trumpian firestorm. No wonder. NATO presents itself as an
effective collective security organization. Would that it was.
Instead, it is and has for many years been a club of posturing,
preening dependents on the American security umbrella. http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbbe1oh1hrdbm8aqnvn70t98q4ij9t0t5dq44m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30s9i66oj6cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctle1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprcd1hekrjfcjkmbqj2dt1e9qnbc3lkpqjaddmemgnfdd0mgpnadd2ekq33cdkumh78cbhe6qj2dd3mgonfdjlkoq3ed9nk8iv0

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
Arizona lawmakers just moved the date of this year’s primary up a week to July 30th.
We’ll be honest: this doesn’t make a big difference in our race.
Kirsten is running unopposed in the Democratic primary. From the start of this campaign, she has focused on reaching out to voters and defeating her Republican incumbent.
But , moving the primary also moves up the timeline to qualify for the Arizona ballot.
Signing Kirsten’s nomination petition is a quick and easy way to show your grassroots support. If you live in AZ-06, click here to sign on. And if you aren't sure, click here to find out! >> [https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/?emci=2fe66d79-76eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5ec42545-0eed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15014523]
The new Arizona election timeline does mean that Kirsten’s Republican opponent and the MAGA establishment backing him will turn their attention to Kirsten even sooner.
Juan Ciscomani is a Republican puppet who will choose Trump over his constituents every time. Kirsten is an experienced and committed lawmaker who will fight for working families, reproductive rights, and climate action.
Kirsten is the right choice for AZ-06 — but we need the resources to get her message out.
In 2022, our campaign was outspent 6:1. Your grassroots support is critical to winning this year. Can we count on you to chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_021724_NomPet_act]

Do you agree that Congress needs to improve access to quality education by investing in our teachers and improving school resources?
Do you agree that Congress needs to invest in quality, accessible educational opportunities for all?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/79218767/455802838/476240478?refcode=em_eng_2024.02.17_b1_stvbhq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQzNDQ0NTAtY2RjZC1lZTExLTg1ZjktMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QZs7-PR0ynKkAfgJpSZl_rXi2_yIBPt9XjBbSDqgmhc=)
Friend – as the daughter of two teachers and mom of four children, Janelle knows firsthand that education is our greatest equalizer. Throughout her entire career in public service, **Janelle has always fought to build pathways for young people to get ahead through education.** Our education policies should focus on uplifting our students, which means increasing teacher pay, decreasing class sizes, and improving school resources and facilities. Janelle won’t stop fighting to ensure every Oregonian can get ahead through quality education, but she needs to know if you’re in this too. That’s why we need your response: |

| | Good Afternoon Fellow Republicans,

This is a friendly reminder that the MIGOP will be holding an Election Security Operations Training Program on:
* **Sunday, February 18, 2024, at 2 pm EST – please use this link to join - [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJckcOGrrzkoEtb50efCIuPFlnEOMDrUdy6Z#/registration](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=a23f2048a9&e=a2af77507c)**

# If you have any questions, please contact [PollChallenger@migop.org](mailto:PollChallenger@migop.org).

In Liberty,

Communications Team
Michigan Republican Party

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: gun violence prevention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We have some promising news coming out of Richmond – a number of gun violence prevention bills have advanced, including one that would ban assault-style weapons and one that would require safer storage of firearms.

| | | **BREAKING NEWS:
Major Gun Violence Prevention Legislation Passes in Virginia Senate and House of Delegates**
---
Peter,

We have some promising news coming out of Richmond – a number of gun violence prevention bills have advanced, including one that would ban assault-style weapons and one that would require safer storage of firearms.

This is a direct result of our work to elect Democratic majorities in the Virginia Senate and House of Delegates. As Governor, I promise to continue this focus on reducing gun violence and keeping our families, children, and law enforcement safe.

As a mom of three school-aged children, I know the feeling of worrying about the safety of our kids as they board the bus — and I know the fear that comes with each active-shooter drill. But most importantly, I’ve promised parents who have lost children to gun violence that I will work tirelessly in their children’s honor to pass meaningful legislation and save lives, and those are promises I intend to keep.

[_**It is a long road to the 2025 Governor’s election, but will you join me now and support my campaign with a contribution? name: Chris Deluzio
subject: The House is out of session so I wanted to chat with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Hey Derek. The House is out of session, which means I get to spend some much-needed time at home with my family and meet with the good people of Western PA.
There's nothing more motivating to me than taking my kids on a bike ride around our neighborhood, helping with homework, or taking them to some of my favorite spots around our home in Western PA.
I know we're all busy, but I wanted to ask if you would consider chipping into my reelection campaign. I'm running in one of the most competitive races in the country, and I can't do it without your help.
Will you chip in whatever you can to help me fight against corporate jagoffs and for the Common Good in Western PA? name: Harry Dunn
subject: not where I need to be
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Team, Harry Dunn here.
I don't want to take too much of your time, so I'll make this quick:
I looked insurrectionists like Trump in the eye on January 6th and fought for our democracy.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of that day while I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged.
So trust and believe when I tell you: I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before.
But right now, I'm not where I need to be on my $100,000 goal. I really need to pick up the pace to get there before tonight. Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton to help me hit this goal? Anything you can spare is appreciated! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
- Harry

I really need to pick up the pace to get there before tonight. Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton to help me hit this goal? Anything you can spare is appreciated! body:
Words cannot express what I felt.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79220173/455807761/1328794144?refcode=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNGUzZTljLWQzY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6zvvZVShWbt2mAWSJ4xHqYCa-59IjdEmgJeP9Brb7Dk=&emci=3a4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)
---
Remember this number: 80216. This number is among the nation's most polluted zip codes, nestled in North Denver and Commerce City, Colorado. Two weeks ago, I decided I needed to witness it firsthand. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79220174/455807762/1240937746?refcode=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNGUzZTljLWQzY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6zvvZVShWbt2mAWSJ4xHqYCa-59IjdEmgJeP9Brb7Dk=&emci=3a4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105) At the Green House Connection Center in the Elyria-Swansea neighborhood, surrounded by local politicians, community activists, and concerned citizens, I listened to their stories — and it brought me to tears. The firsthand accounts of life in the shadow of polluters like the Suncor Oil Refinery were heart-wrenching. Lucy Molina, an environmental activist from Commerce City, shared what life is like for her and her neighbors—stories of health issues and a community constantly enveloped by the smell from nearby industrial sites, including the Nestle Purina pet food factory. The reality of this community’s poor air quality is not just a statistic. **It's a daily struggle for residents who suffer from nosebleeds, headaches, and even cancer due to pollution.** On top of it all, Suncor has paid massive dividends to its shareholders but has failed to allocate adequate resources to deal with the problems it’s created in Colorado. My visit was a vivid reminder that behind every statistic are real people—families, children, and elders—whose lives are impacted by the reckless actions of fossil fuel giants like Suncor. This experience has strengthened my resolve to keep fighting for climate justice and stand in solidarity with those on the frontlines of this battle. At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, our core mission is to elect state and local leaders who are truly dedicated to tackling climate change and cutting our dependency on fossil fuels. It's essential that our elected officials in Colorado prioritize the well-being of their constituents over the interests of harmful corporations. Last year, we saw our efforts bear fruit when Shontel Lewis and Sarah Parady, two candidates with a firm stance on environmental and public health issues, were elected to the Denver City Council. **Their victories underscore the impact we can achieve together.** And that’s why your involvement is crucial. Whether by staying informed, contributing to Jane PAC, or volunteering in your community, every action makes a huge impact in our fight to elect more climate champions at every level of government. **_[For those who wish to learn more about the local activists battling in these communities against the oil and gas giants, I encourage you to click here to read more about my experience and the ongoing efforts in Colorado>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79220175/455807763/1240937746?refcode=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNGUzZTljLWQzY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6zvvZVShWbt2mAWSJ4xHqYCa-59IjdEmgJeP9Brb7Dk=&emci=3a4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&emdi=3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ceid=4823105)_** This is a long fight, but together, we’ll keep moving forward. In solidarity, Jane Fonda | [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/79220176/455807764/2105508926?refcode=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&ms=ea.3e4e3e9c-d3cd-ee11-85f9-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNGUzZTljLWQzY2QtZWUxMS04NWY5LTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6zvvZVShWbt2mAWSJ4xHqYCa-59IjdEmgJeP9Brb7Dk=)

clean_body: Words cannot express what I felt. | Remember this number: 80216. This number is among the nation's most polluted zip codes, nestled in North Denver and Commerce City, Colorado. Two weeks ago, I decided I needed to witness it firsthand. At the Green House Connection Center in the Elyria-Swansea neighborhood, surrounded by local politicians, community activists, and concerned citizens, I listened to their stories — and it brought me to tears. The firsthand accounts of life in the shadow of polluters like the Suncor Oil Refinery were heart-wrenching. Lucy Molina, an environmental activist from Commerce City, shared what life is like for her and her neighbors—stories of health issues and a community constantly enveloped by the smell from nearby industrial sites, including the Nestle Purina pet food factory. The reality of this community’s poor air quality is not just a statistic. It's a daily struggle for residents who suffer from nosebleeds, headaches, and even cancer due to pollution. On top of it all, Suncor has paid massive dividends to its shareholders but has failed to allocate adequate resources to deal with the problems it’s created in Colorado. My visit was a vivid reminder that behind every statistic are real people—families, children, and elders—whose lives are impacted by the reckless actions of fossil fuel giants like Suncor. This experience has strengthened my resolve to keep fighting for climate justice and stand in solidarity with those on the frontlines of this battle. At the Jane Fonda Climate PAC, our core mission is to elect state and local leaders who are truly dedicated to tackling climate change and cutting our dependency on fossil fuels. It's essential that our elected officials in Colorado prioritize the well-being of their constituents over the interests of harmful corporations. Last year, we saw our efforts bear fruit when Shontel Lewis and Sarah Parady, two candidates with a firm stance on environmental and public health issues, were elected to the Denver City Council. Their victories underscore the impact we can achieve together. And that’s why your involvement is crucial. Whether by staying informed, contributing to Jane PAC, or volunteering in your community, every action makes a huge impact in our fight to elect more climate champions at every level of government. This is a long fight, but together, we’ll keep moving forward. In solidarity, Jane Fonda | = | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Sunday Prayer Circle for RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Please join us on Sunday, February 18 on Zoom from 2:00 pm - 2:30 pm PST. We gather to surround our future President RFK Jr., future First Lady Cheryl Hines, their families, and Team Kennedy in prayer.

|
---
| | |
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=1)
|
---
Peter —
The response to Sunday's Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr. has been so heartwarming. Thank you for your emails! Mr. Kennedy is so grateful and appreciative of your prayers.
Please join us on [Sunday, February 18 on Zoom](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa47nwI_KUjjHlL8yDwWeFpVIqsXQkC8dfZL-TTba4ayEzHHzn6dr1NGhTmeHggs2pPYvqs_QxC9u69AprCO8O3GDlj48Npq20qKQSJMzgxuFn2lFR6umQcEuRkfywfej6qA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=2) from **2:00 pm - 2:30 pm PST**. We gather to surround our future President RFK Jr., future First Lady Cheryl Hines, their families, and Team Kennedy in prayer. All faiths are welcome, and your presence is greatly appreciated.
Mahalia Jackson said, "Faith and prayer are the vitamins of the soul; man (woman) cannot live in health without them." Let's join together and spread good health and cheer to our future President RFK, Jr., future First Lady Cheryl Hines, his family, and Team Kennedy. Our unified prayers matter!
Below are details for [Sunday's Prayer Circle for RFK, Jr.](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa47nwI_KUjjHlL8yDwWeFpVIqsXQkC8dfZL-TTba4ayEzHHzn6dr1NGhTmeHggs2pPYvqs_QxC9u69AprCO8O3GDlj48Npq20qKQSJMzgxuFn2lFR6umQcEuRkfywfej6qA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=3):
| **Day** : Sunday, February 18
---
**Time** : 2 pm PST
**Location** : [Zoom link](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa47nwI_KUjjHlL8yDwWeFpVIqsXQkC8dfZL-TTba4ayEzHHzn6dr1NGhTmeHggs2pPYvqs_QxC9u69AprCO8O3GDlj48Npq20qKQSJMzgxuFn2lFR6umQcEuRkfywfej6qA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=4) **_(this is the only Zoom link for you to use)_**
Once you register, another link to join the Prayer Circle will be emailed to you.
If you have any registration issues, please email [faith@teamkennedy.com](mailto:faith@teamkennedy.com) and we will respond as soon as possible.
Please invite your friends and family to join us! A graphic for Sunday's Prayer Circle for RFK Jr. is below that you can share.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa47nwI_KUjjHlL8yDwWeFpVIqsXQkC8dfZL-TTba4ayEzHHzn6dr1NGhTmeHggs2pPYvqs_QxC9u69AprCO8O3GDlj48Npq20qKQSJMzgxuFnbuWbTqHaqpy7bVyjPhTcSsAFy4Y9gi8ivGSFepDwmQ2b-7tW4d62AhwJ8FAlCnIUY1kwck7CqqvyHre6WBzJf8iwb-qbT0vJ-hBF_SGR_ts&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=5)
We believe in our hearts that Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the perfect person to be our President in 2024. Just as his campaign and future legislation aim to heal the divide in our society, we also seek healing of hearts through this prayer. By joining together in this way, we invite divine intervention and support for his campaign as he travels throughout the United States.
See you on [Sunday, February 18, 2:00 pm PST](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=iKj5iuxBXy-0B6ifolAJk-7Mb6lE5uIHFHjDzmPEvfZ2zm9HA1wiNemIxMpCx3pmuL06i6Nkym1HJbmUMnGa47nwI_KUjjHlL8yDwWeFpVIqsXQkC8dfZL-TTba4ayEzHHzn6dr1NGhTmeHggs2pPYvqs_QxC9u69AprCO8O3GDlj48Npq20qKQSJMzgxuFn2lFR6umQcEuRkfywfej6qA&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=6). The Zoom room accommodates 1,000 people so an online space will be provided for overflow. Please check your upcoming emails for this information.
Peace and Richest Blessings,
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=7)
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=8) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZdMp9-e17RgxqtIk69rUIjeOqT1-oa6z7jeUAIaHEF2m&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=9) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=10) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=11) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzI54ka0wzIYPxyZaEWdcWSHecUzjTC_26r6_PMq84pDYNHmKWp713umpU1ZYCPsJg&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=12) [](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=NeYFSHY3wLA-A6ZQ4K_eCvyPLw9XUBWykYMXk8oA7_J_3Q_g_ArGpQEnreGd3k1h&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=13)

[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=prayer_circle_zoom_2_17_24_2&n=14) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024!
Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

name: Elect Barbara Lee via Our Revolution
subject: Every voter contact counts right now for Barbara Lee: the Peace candidate in the race for U.S. Senate in California
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1011?refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Our Revolution is out with Barbara Lee in San Francisco right now
rallying, knocking doors, and talking to voters. Because we know it’s
going to take a massive mobilization to reach enough voters to elect
Barbara to join Bernie in the U.S. Senate.

We’re not just knocking on doors and rallying, we’re texting and making 1
million calls to voters — because we know that’s what it’s going to take,
and early voting is already underway in California.

Nearly 30% of voters are undecided, and we know that when we talk to
voters we can persuade 1 in 7 to vote for Barbara, the Peace candidate in
this race — the one true progressive. The more voters we reach, the more
votes Barbara will get.

But making calls and mobilizing our supporters ahead of the March 5
primary day is expensive,
Peter Willis. And while Barbara’s
opponents are funded by big corporate money, Our Revolution is funded
solely by grassroots donors. So we need your help to keep reaching voters
in California right now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]Donate now to help us make one million calls to elect Barbara Lee to the
U.S. Senate. Every dollar counts right now as we contact voters with
ballots in their hands every single day. Our average donation ($17.04) can
help us reach about 22 voters!

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

While we’re out with Barbara talking to voters in San Francisco, Our
Revolution phone bankers and organizers are building on 1 million voter
contacts we’ve already made for Barbara. And we want to make another
million before primary voting ends on March 5th.

Barbara’s the only candidate who supported a Ceasefire in Israel-Palestine
since day one of Israel’s bombing campaign in Gaza. She’s been a singular
courageous voice for Peace in Congress for decades — she was the lone vote
against the war in Afghanistan in 2001.

Barbara Lee has been a constant voice for people and for peace, and she’s
relying on our help to bring her courageous work to the U.S. Senate to
join Bernie. We can only make 1 million calls, knock doors, run strategic
GOTV ads, and more with your support.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14274?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240217&akid=5350%2E5885482%2ENAqelv ]Contribute now to elect Barbara Lee — another unwavering progressive to
join Bernie Sanders in the Senate!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The right wing loves to come after me. Here’s why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5509%2E5257348%2ETi4wLL)
Derek,
Never did I imagine that I would become the right-wing’s favorite punching bag for insults and attacks. Never.
But if investigating Donald Trump and holding him accountable for his attempts to overturn the election and incite an insurrection makes me a “Wild-eyed conspiracy nut,” as Tucker Carlson called me, **so be it.**
If Roger Stone wants to call me a congenital liar and despicable huckster, **so be it** (a pretty rich insult coming from him if I do say so myself).
And if Donald Trump himself wants to call me, as he did in all caps on his social media, “SLIMEBALL ADAM ‘SHIFTY’ SCHIFF, ONE OF THE TRUE LOWLIFES IN THE HISTORY OF POLITICS IN AMERICA” for holding him to account over and over and over again, **so be it.**
They are going after me because they know I am effective. Those that don’t concern them — they ignore. The _last place_ Roger Stone or Donald Trump want me to be is in the United States Senate — because they know I will continue to hold their feet to the fire.
**[Please, help me take our work to the United States Senate by pitching in $10 or any amount you can spare ahead of our primary election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=5509%2E5257348%2ETi4wLL)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=8&akid=5509%2E5257348%2ETi4wLL)

| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2024_abs_em.phJe21&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=9&akid=5509%2E5257348%2ETi4wLL)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240217_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=5509%2E5257348%2ETi4wLL)

I won’t let any of these guys interfere with my work to defend our democracy.
I wear their enmity as a badge of honor, Derek, and I appreciate your help in my work.
Thank you,
Adam

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: I’m proud to have Missouri’s Fire Fighters and first responders on my team in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
"We look for two things in a Senator: An effective leader who actually fights for us on our issues, and someone we'd trust to dive into a basement fire with us if they were in our unit. Josh Hawley is neither."
#
"We look for two things in a Senator: **An effective leader who actually fights for us on our issues, and someone we'd trust to dive into a basement fire with us if they were in our unit. Josh Hawley is neither."**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43827?refcode=em20240217-4827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4827%2E614464%2EbkLPLM)
**[ELECT LUCAS: CHIP IN →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43827?refcode=em20240217-4827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4827%2E614464%2EbkLPLM)**
Peter — in recent elections, Missouri's Fire Fighters have endorsed Republicans for U.S. Senate. **Not in this race.**
**They know that Josh Hawley is an unserious, self-obsessed, partisan hack who only stands up for himself — and that they deserve better.** That’s why the Missouri State Council of Fire Fighters became our first statewide labor endorsement.
**Missouri’s Fire Fighters and first responders need a U.S. Senator they can trust to be their warrior in Washington, and they know I’ll fight like hell for them.**
**[Will you stand with us to defeat Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat by making your first donation of any amount toward my campaign today? We’re building a worker-led grassroots movement to put everyday people in charge of our country, and we can’t do it without your help.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43827?refcode=em20240217-4827&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4827%2E614464%2EbkLPLM)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: With just 17 days until the primary, can Katie count on your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We won’t BS you, if Katie doesn’t finish in the top two in the primary on March 5, then her time in Congress would come to an end.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37759%2E3422442%2EfL9ZFI)
There are just 17 days left until the primary election on March 5. **[Our donation records indicate that you haven’t chipped in to Katie’s Senate campaign yet,* and we wanted to let you know this is the most useful time to make your first contribution.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240217-2?refcode=em20240217-37759&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37759_3422442_fL9ZFI&akid=37759%2E3422442%2EfL9ZFI)**
We won’t BS you, if Katie doesn’t finish in the top two in the primary on March 5, her time in Congress will come to an end. _We need her voice fighting against greedy corporations and holding Wall Street accountable._
With multiple super PACs spending big against us, we need every single supporter of this campaign to contribute in this critical moment.
**[Can Katie count on you to make your first contribution right now? As a grassroots campaign, every single contribution will make a difference and help us reach more voters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240217-2?refcode=em20240217-37759&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37759_3422442_fL9ZFI&akid=37759%2E3422442%2EfL9ZFI)**

Thank you so much,
Team Katie Porter

_*If you have donated, thank you! Rest assured we have your donation, likely just filed under a different email._

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240217-37759&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37759_3422442_fL9ZFI&akid=37759%2E3422442%2EfL9ZFI)**
