name: Padora Campaign HQ
subject: John is the best choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
We’re bumping John’s message from yesterday because it’s important to note one of the biggest (of MANY) differences between John and Boebert’s approach to politics.
__ | | | Hi there, We’re bumping John’s message from yesterday because it’s important to note one of the biggest (of MANY) differences between John and Boebert’s approach to politics. John was inspired to run long before Boebert switched to this district because he wanted to help bring progress to our community. He wanted to bring better jobs, improve our health care, and offer more educational opportunities for today’s generation and tomorrow’s generation. Lauren Boebert is only running in this district because she thought it would be harder to win in the district that elected her. She wants to keep her nice office in Washington and continue her Fox News hits. That’s all. [**John will fight for the Fourth District. Lauren won’t. Help us finish our Beat Boebert fundraiser by rushing $10 or more to John’s campaign before midnight.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVt7SBp8pv6lQyxKU0xM9oqgX5OPcWZY-Uck4A6ON-Ij07CivZvLK8MV1dsbK6-gdzqSyzcq4-GiHqb8QfsQELZdqU8DyQU25jYq4pTsVbE7bHRSCyiAgegzJiEt1aJvm_oaG-CLmQ0RLU_Fx7zt55FUt7FRUONj-U9KR5dP5ooKoA%3D%3D) Best, Padora Campaign HQ _\------- Begin Original Message --------_ [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVt7SBp8pv6lQyxKU0xM9oqgNrboBwOBTdTuAlKu3sWo3yza5xGy1WavQAhjLxj89QYpJcRf6e7Bv9ohyToqaaha2uN-MixZKpCqCI3AIGekqiQ76pA2lTzlgBYGnqNRy21xr6-yvSH8foBXVFZ2ratwVQMHTEIbx6Jcy8XitZolKw%3D%3D) Here’s the deal friends, **Lauren Boebert joined this race because she believed that it would give her a better chance to win and stay in her cushy job in DC.** She clearly wasn’t interested in staying and fighting for her constituents in the place where she actually lived. And that’s because, for her, it was never about public service. It was about fame, going viral, and getting rich being a Congresswoman. She did it to her last district, I don’t think it’s difficult to believe she’d do it to ours as well. **We don’t need the baggage that Boebert brings with her, and we CERTAINLY don’t need her extremism.** I promise to fight for our community that has been left behind by elites in Washington for far too long. [**Boebert has become one of those elites, so I’m asking if you can donate $25 to my campaign to help me raise $6,000 by tomorrow night and defeat her.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVuyW8oNCHmwaAdBa2hOjNt40mDJQH5xKahNnXUWI1seeSkHs40yWKOY_K2V0D6r_6wKSUHQJh1Z4bzvw5CjpVmhpiVR7XBdF8pKwSfzgFM9y9Mh-VWN9tvauNUR8bVCQdiePF_qpQpzmiH1Qb0qhPW0rqWrlca5Zgefy1unqt9EGR_cLzOhntmmeIpNzaZ8kiA%3D) **[DONATE> > >](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVuBXqylJwItXCYkM2fkYVbf-4TBlVHABnYJ_lV3cOmpGvh7Jmd_lNp8kUKmOVyL9VKVtEmyB9Q2zMbDKfckSLL5sn3AyAjUvcjNUrUCC7rzOun2s8V670-kxonG4j4t4OF7uTTuJDbrTuSM3Y3Vfac8elJwkGBlgOasz-ruJCgCn9MxQq81AuphbYQMlUzVeqg%3D)** Our district and our community deserves better than Lauren Boebert. We deserve someone who will actually serve the needs of workers and families around here. She will only serve her own interests in DC. [**I hope you’ll join me in working to defeat her by donating $25, or whatever you can afford, to my campaign.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVuyW8oNCHmwaAdBa2hOjNt40mDJQH5xKahNnXUWI1seeSHpNjXG9ZWPuBfeqtf2UG_Yo031z7RezU_XxfD2yXMBL8RDTUnQX1D7JwfTPyRNULgIWT0d6sSv2Brk_BxIfKVqBmVSdRLWnK4uh5M1haDh_DK2i-_wEpaOi-B9jEbWViNOOwQWmuc-p-Dhpai6zW0%3D) All the best, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. [WEBSITE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliUOqUjn-pzJgAmxrjNnQxKTG6pgpKCnnd86_D8sbdBNR0MCslMxkbzX6CqeutTmh7JDXK4NNNpvoInStLuSk3n7xkPnOSxRLfwMcN7ttpX0-vfF0_21sphpE0dW-r9h88O49xzj_JQ1oPj2j2tAiHqhndUuCVStKEW8bXewCN_3DHptWSqsrBrK-b5N3MURahQ%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=0c51f22c2b3743a3b7803db00850717c&_e=_E4KdDKagPg8VL6hHkhliXmi0NgR-aIBknIJHdI-CSkiIWpOy7NoXg84kBNh0IXoDPhKJo0Z7dpIlaSKE3MkP2VAl-pMee93QvZFJlHaSQHjIZ7QXFTjVQx2HblHA9R8u5iSJlcjVQEZt22yiVG8-z2iumWjeChq_Anis_QCb3CxzHL3GGpSw-_kbGCqbaajM9Pjj91Ugm6zm1lHAmHX1HEfcEq79Q8gkFAggYGwBVuBXqylJwItXCYkM2fkYVbf-4TBlVHABnYJ_lV3cOmpGi2jr-ZdV9J-Xx6E5RZ20ZVaafdLEKdoaV9arpFAVrjAfIudrTIPPQc_1HJYptgWmmPrM8zPs_zZUs4H8WJq2V9AuUWI3SmuV4y5Z1Chl5fd7L1atBUw_ZWh_CyTEgT7hkd_yZYTsIlmBiHHrLoNbdA%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

It was about fame, going viral, and getting rich being a Congresswoman. She did it to her last district, I don’t think it’s difficult to believe she’d do it to ours as well. We don’t need the baggage that Boebert brings with her, and we CERTAINLY don’t need her extremism. I promise to fight for our community that has been left behind by elites in Washington for far too long. Our district and our community deserves better than Lauren Boebert. We deserve someone who will actually serve the needs of workers and families around here. She will only serve her own interests in DC. All the best, John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CD-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Team Mazie
subject: ➡️ Five important reasons ⬅️
body:
|
#
Peter, We know you probably didn’t wake up this morning thinking first about contributing to Mazie’s campaign today, but here are five reasons why your support is so important right now: **➡️ Mitch McConnell and his dark money super PACs raised _$95 million_ last year to flip the Senate red this November.** If we’re going to stay the course and preserve our Democratic majority just like we did two years ago, we can’t afford any slowdown in our grassroots momentum.
**➡️ Senate Republicans have to flip just _one_ seat this November to retake the majority.** That means holding on to _every single_ Senate seat is absolutely critical — including Mazie’s.
**➡️ Mazie is leading the charge for accountability and transparency at the Supreme Court.** After the Court announced its disastrous _Dobbs_ decision overturning _Roe v. Wade_ , reporting revealed that Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito have cozied up to conservative billionaires with interests before the Court. Mazie is one of the only Senators consistently speaking out against this outrageous misconduct.
**➡️ In 2022, dark money super PACs spent over $1 million in Hawaii.** That’s mere pocket change to right-wing billionaires who’d like nothing more than to put an end to Mazie’s progressive agenda for working families — so we have to be prepared for _whatever_ they throw our way this year.
**➡️ Mazie is the only immigrant serving in the Senate.** While we’ve made plenty of progress, Washington still doesn’t represent the incredible diversity of the American people. We need to ensure Mazie can continue bringing her unique perspective and lived experience to shape policies that affect millions of people across the country. **[So Peter, now that we’ve explained 5 critical reasons to chip in, will you donate $5 to Mazie’s re-election campaign today? If we’re going to stay the course and preserve our Democratic majority just like we did two years ago, we can’t afford any slowdown in our grassroots momentum. ➡️ Senate Republicans have to flip just one seat this November to retake the majority. That means holding on to every single Senate seat is absolutely critical — including Mazie’s. ➡️ Mazie is leading the charge for accountability and transparency at the Supreme Court. After the Court announced its disastrous Dobbs decision overturning Roe v. Wade , reporting revealed that Justices Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito have cozied up to conservative billionaires with interests before the Court. Mazie is one of the only Senators consistently speaking out against this outrageous misconduct. ➡️ In 2022, dark money super PACs spent over $1 million in Hawaii. That’s mere pocket change to right-wing billionaires who’d like nothing more than to put an end to Mazie’s progressive agenda for working families — so we have to be prepared for whatever they throw our way this year. ➡️ Mazie is the only immigrant serving in the Senate. While we’ve made plenty of progress, Washington still doesn’t represent the incredible diversity of the American people. We need to ensure Mazie can continue bringing her unique perspective and lived experience to shape policies that affect millions of people across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ****=** = | **=** = | | **=** = | **=** = | | **=** = | **=** =** Thank you, Team Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

Fellow Patriots, **This is an extremely important update.** Last week, we released bombshell documents unearthed through our lawsuit against the censorship arm of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security, the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA). **These never-before-seen documents make it clear that the Deep State apparatus fully understood the risks of mass mail voting and engaged in a concerted effort to hide the truth** _**- **censoring these legitimate criticisms as "disinformation" with no basis in fact._ Once again America First Legal has exposed shocking and serious Deep State wrongdoing... President Trump was a top target of this effort, and they went after several prominent conservative pundits and activists as well. _**It 's vital that we continue to expose the truth, demand accountability, and ensure that leftist election interference schemes are SHUT DOWN ahead of our 2024 elections.**_ [**_Please make a_** _**_special contribution_**_** _to fuel our fight at AFL >>_**](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0710ac7b846045f2954c6e0225549465&_e=dYb7GdZt8DRYHMImRXrdOYOiZlSPegMVNKP4AVMWXyxI0BW8GyKKBZneCFi38WBf3S6voHRRDRdG9VtTTkQUxR1HeXDQ9bJipCQN92U45Z7dM3R-jXVaV-QMy-E0Z8oaDFLvu_ylqpblNr1SPkadabgVWR8fLipM_SdFPIo4yStF8QSgXAYRjAvH3KI6raRT1XTfUklDj-58XxfyLxp8mux5AOPd5fErfcTNHDds9UlE7c9GXaQXif6N_KOhber4kXxzWkpjmwAH4mFsXlNjXMbmPUT6_DmWGeEqd4gzKwvg3YjV2InoZWhKivszQUPIfXEcWWhV5xd9XKd39RhqNKwJ0jwaNRTaeElRJW8cAZa80Op2fKwUKz9mEPOqSCR3s7jvHZh6JBAuXngTKy51G2xGHPw8nfSTMsrcaXPZEQzRh-xdPn8cuIYrp9MzuC_u) _Thank you so much for all your support,_ _Stephen Miller _ _President, America First Legal _ [_**RUSH YOUR SUPPORT HERE**_** >>**](http://links.classicconservatives.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0710ac7b846045f2954c6e0225549465&_e=dYb7GdZt8DRYHMImRXrdOYOiZlSPegMVNKP4AVMWXyxI0BW8GyKKBZneCFi38WBf3S6voHRRDRdG9VtTTkQUxR1HeXDQ9bJipCQN92U45Z7dM3R-jXVaV-QMy-E0Z8oaDFLvu_ylqpblNr1SPkadabgVWR8fLipM_SdFPIo4yStF8QSgXAYRjAvH3KI6raRT1XTfUklDj-58XxfyLxp8mux5AOPd5fErfcTNHDds9UlE7c9GXaQXif6N_KOhber4kXxzWkpjmwAH4mFsXlNjXC7DqNLIcLQpfMZivCdk3uvIMmU0RZeFM1ViVmOFlkNAeW-v8xtFcHdcmD0XUCb6grgAAm10E-YKKBjM-IOMHQll_noI5WCX4FURS9IzpFzaJvylB1zEmAelgAmWTVM2b4XwhQKxEo9Gkbj-Ng6dCrDXjDlEiCyTc10Z9V1dNka8)

clean_body: | = Friend, it’s Greg. If you’re pressed for time tonight, here’s what I need you to know: As of 5 pm, we need just a few more grassroots contributions to help meet our mid-month goal and prove we have what it takes to defend OH-01 this November. = | = I’m proud to say that this campaign doesn’t accept a dime of corporate PAC money. But that means I’m counting on folks like you to chip in what you can. It’s going to take all of us working together to win this race for the working families of Southwest Ohio, but I know we can do it. That’s why deadlines like these are so important. With the election rapidly approaching, meeting our fundraising goals at every stage from here on out will be critical. = = Thank you, Greg | | Paid for by Landsman for Congress P.O. This week, a series of negative articles were published about True the Vote, with headlines like [‘True the Vote Tells Court It Has No Records To Back Up Georgia Fraud Claims](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlsRMsfC-2PTsr_wiNivxO0t3xsuMd_V1KA98MXBcafKx7J8itZw2uv-qIB5b34lWqa3WhIUERclqk1kIc-EryrsZ1qUPS4PYlltbu9z1Xj0vqaxZp5l5dOiqiHJpkDUjAt6fudXhvX2Nro75RlaUDcxcszqj77P_HNu1Xzq6Aiu3svlUqxU5uyKMIcyRSahcERuLLkTOJKAwbQU6QG6QD6pNfrNbrSzUpEU4yzvjiedh9LArzONlqmwGf-q0sCC1gUa-E7KOj_I0c01MbmwTQw5yJZoW7IYKNvnO5hT3k80Y3D2YTj63c5yPEPjezd_usKPnZK8zCoA6gLG-DkwhuGuI/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h2/PyUH_2kXBPnbI4E7xjS2q6YxQ1MXl-f8qAy-8Zvt8J8), from the Atlanta Journal Constitution,[ ‘The Final Repudiation of 2000 Mules’, ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/Qvk83lMrxpyahZ2UDrJlseXB9juev8ljqb6RY41RcvIm1NnVDfdVIuL0WvEjExPBIqoRKb5HxOC5mynrXZVbaAZGlhnN7EpOHhOKhvG39W6cbCS8gmHrsTIeJR5BC0ByKSyFfgxEKYexpV36suiJyrVj_7Pab7RiMu_DTyhhzFcTFeWFA6LNAtieKLZH5Uo_RGZOMTtEsAFquM4i0QUG0pxH1h1hnPhrvWCDFDSYElfO71HP0h_gkXHd8EFaS30DZA7p5ee1p7sEpRQqBlI7b5Dmo23ngdWSqAS7NS5SHKGg4pQlE_B5S75tZIAuXKHZ/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h3/VqJ7vKIhHq449fGqnkQvVDJ2iAm12-SL4_0goZiLCGo)from the Washington Post, [‘Conservative Group Tells Judge It Has No Evidence To Back Its Claims of GA Ballot Stuffing’ ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/4xkviejVe2bcNHdbmWFEFgOmGlRoLj5Wgf0D17XRTSeAP_tz4IPZO6lWmigOZoJ09xokfKvSIPKcTTdjLAj0ZyXKaskBuGS06JkXYY8ReEgPUl-iwcNQW3FPJGvfN3wblb8sWUcgTvy4L9nKDk36vgAgVxLT3-kOw5K0zVk3rnB52OXjZ2Qqw-0skhxo6WmZCZb2GSLHqF89RVrcPsot-8sTGMAKYV-G0mOvqVy-SmrWNXxmaa52YEHTNwIpfP42xhnHEQsBY7nUC_EeAgxkmwNo1W2fnAPbSrqo_AJhzQ5ivp7M9Hn2qjwW1tKBMYRd1Ebylb0O4YAeQlVFNRtayw/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h4/PI681cmqqtgWUBCea4IV_qZd56H1DFFwpR4vX-flevc)from the Associated Press .... the list goes on and on.
What you are seeing is an organized hit. Propagandist media outlets synchronized for the strike took a single court document filed by TTV in December of 2023, found a useful angle, twisted it entirely out of context, and spun it into an explosively negative narrative. With no outreach to True the Vote for comment, they published their prewritten parroting in a massive coordinated drop.
But that’s only the press. They’re just one tactic used in an orchestrated strike. Other tactics, which we are very accustomed to but don’t often talk about, involve obscene, threatening emails, texts, and calls to True the Vote and directly to me, a barrage of negative social media, attacks on our websites, and attacks on my homestead that I’ll not describe here at this time.
Why? There are various reasons: to distract from the spectacle of Fani Willis’ testimony, and this week’s ethics committee hearing in Georgia on the abysmal state of their voter rolls, and GA Sec of State Raffensberger’s professional failures and newfound alignment with the Left, and the [Georgia 2020- 2023 timeline we published on Open.Ink](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p4w9q4kcfxEupY3zPTrxQE9FQPQ9Bcy9Dp9cmEWyOsQ5e2OT1PujbTTO8zXVDO1H8oULhf04gPNLRr5ImOShBjrIIsJ7Ez348Zh1BL7XVjs3-OMiLedTcEcST9lNgFzvOIib-4_m3nT5d8osravMFnSOy5-uwLY0kdTxB_U3lo6jbqx3u253RrU2oPSsfoia5hgaSIEq4eEtp908855aZdmwVjxyfx7KdJieu1qD7Hu6/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h5/NTrqvjpiob-NdKLIgrmY6RD3pNBOo4ihnlZl3xG0ToQ), and our recent victory over Fair Fight, and because we are continuing to expose election subversion and continuing to fight in defense of election integrity, and because of our 2024 plans, and because our work supports voters’ rights and helps We the People, not the machine. So be it.
True the Vote stands firmly behind our assertions regarding mail-in ballot exploitation in Georgia and nationwide. And that makes us dangerous to the authoritarian architects who want no challenges, no free speech, no honest debate.
[Click here to read our complete statement on this matter.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HbGw_pIZaLN4CoU4iViYrA-BMLyS0_1iVKL_QX-YL2Eat6T3QRff8hgi-8pVVQlxV8ctJvcH5CC-n0OlSjVLOp2VK1bzwb2AcSA1Bi-W4Qex75zPmRDnHnJwOnD1BpIoNrAgNrGTQMpq7BRw8vd2AOHofsfuRo25N7wK-ASV8wCdz2kcgssReJYX3LbIl6stX-4uF97cy43tlE-F1b_hwzxFZDPTl_uNDhFsqRKu__yXeiIOIoMTYFzHSJI_3SHw4e29DnFMYH939qGEbxrvt_Y/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h6/RFn1C4URZjerxtnmiVowSxlT7XeL4HlfI2LrOxSugQk)
It’s hard to fathom just how bad the propaganda really is. And our situation pales in comparison to those of so many others, including J6 political prisoners and the Donald J. Trump family. The assaults are unprecedented.
On this Monday's Onward Live podcast, we'll discuss the mechanics behind a political hit. I will describe what fueled scores of nearly identical fake national news stories against us, what else was going on behind the scenes, and why the enemies of liberty needed it to happen last week.
We’ll deconstruct it all, piece by piece: how and why hits like these are orchestrated against us and others, how to read between the lines, how to find the truth, and how to mentally armor up for the coming months because the hits will keep coming and will get worse.
The podcast will be live on [onward.locals.com](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p2oOGAlqq8ZSgwZKXPLrfecXOzhe6qy98O3U5GKq5orFqDX3ePr-SyDro-VUHC9nQ_yPd6fODHw1bromGrK1fHEKN-y-zngu0YPa55K3LpMYTy18w--9lljEny5UPVUIl6MlDy65doBcSkKp2hvdP51HnHn_2RzQlxQyc00V0VOUJ6afQWqqn4o1CWa4dqyDlEw4gKU7pKotL_UnbXuaWD0/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h7/qkDPysrzcvgR67ggek3LPalFMmIYCzUcydQxjPA7pas) Monday, February 9th, at 7:00p et. [Arizona's HB 2785](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/X7_31DvCkE0bBlLUKmCHEI06Ngf1MHmLs3YTDs5ZZBNX_0cIPSl66MfXRtWAFF92GHwEVCdnkCPJq_r8ZSUpBvmweAdkBHIsFmJF-cX1CqFdOy4IS107qVGc67ESncH_2rgUc0s6gDHGd5HRkGCH3L0REPm-eo5Qv8UPQ-ud0PIWqpyDAJJDKOCr8VdLrNNxlnG4YBtSCNaSN96ZCaSXL9VKbvW-dlUP919AdNgA5Q49bwzUsm8_CUKyxXKg297n/43x/6cuL1pL7Qqilr24T9tsQxg/h10/JINcYSPwfcoNj6ev1jQdAPqCwf2qFV7nwX4Eaw1M2uU) recently passed as a "Bipartisan Election Integrity Bill." Initially, the bill seemed well intentioned, and we were given assurances by local lawmakers that it aligned with the mission of TTV and other pro-integrity advocates. Unfortunately, further analysis revealed that promised corrections were not made and certain loopholes in language were left unaddressed, creating future processing challenges for critical components like signature verification. Come the general election, we will be working with citizens and activists across the state to anticipate coming issues and preempt them. Forewarned is forearmed.
Lastly, we’ve uncovered a troubling obstacle to ensuring accurate voter rolls in Texas. Other tactics, which we are very accustomed to but don’t often talk about, involve obscene, threatening emails, texts, and calls to True the Vote and directly to me, a barrage of negative social media, attacks on our websites, and attacks on my homestead that I’ll not describe here at this time. Why? There are various reasons: to distract from the spectacle of Fani Willis’ testimony, and this week’s ethics committee hearing in Georgia on the abysmal state of their voter rolls, and GA Sec of State Raffensberger’s professional failures and newfound alignment with the Left, and the , and our recent victory over Fair Fight, and because we are continuing to expose election subversion and continuing to fight in defense of election integrity, and because of our 2024 plans, and because our work supports voters’ rights and helps We the People, not the machine. So be it. True the Vote stands firmly behind our assertions regarding mail-in ballot exploitation in Georgia and nationwide. And that makes us dangerous to the authoritarian architects who want no challenges, no free speech, no honest debate. It’s hard to fathom just how bad the propaganda really is. And our situation pales in comparison to those of so many others, including J6 political prisoners and the Donald J. Trump family. The assaults are unprecedented. On this Monday's Onward Live podcast, we'll discuss the mechanics behind a political hit. I will describe what fueled scores of nearly identical fake national news stories against us, what else was going on behind the scenes, and why the enemies of liberty needed it to happen last week. We’ll deconstruct it all, piece by piece: how and why hits like these are orchestrated against us and others, how to read between the lines, how to find the truth, and how to mentally armor up for the coming months because the hits will keep coming and will get worse. The podcast will be live on Monday, February 9th, at 7:00p et. Please invite your friends to listen in, too. Note: We’ve run into a few tech glitches the past few Mondays. To avoid that, we may also stream on Rumble and other platforms. If that happens, we’ll send an email with any new information. | In other news, continues to gain momentum! This innovative tool is now available to empower you to take control of your voter registration. With simple steps - Scan your state, Check your registration, and Protect your vote by ensuring you're removed from rolls in states where you no longer reside - we're making it easier to prevent fraud and protect your vote. recently passed as a "Bipartisan Election Integrity Bill." Initially, the bill seemed well intentioned, and we were given assurances by local lawmakers that it aligned with the mission of TTV and other pro-integrity advocates. Unfortunately, further analysis revealed that promised corrections were not made and certain loopholes in language were left unaddressed, creating future processing challenges for critical components like signature verification. Come the general election, we will be working with citizens and activists across the state to anticipate coming issues and preempt them. Forewarned is forearmed. Lastly, we’ve uncovered a troubling obstacle to ensuring accurate voter rolls in Texas. It was widely reported that in 2019, the state aimed to identify noncitizens on the rolls, leading to significant findings. What was not as well known was the lawsuit that ensued and , limiting their ability to address noncitizen voter registration. True the Vote’s legal team is currently evaluating this and other issues related to the noncitizen voter registration crisis unfolding nationwide. More to come here. It’s true we are in difficult times. Nonetheless, opportunities abound. As Winston Churchill said, “A pessimist sees the difficulty in every opportunity; an optimist sees the opportunity in every difficulty.” Keep strong. We are winning. I know it may not always feel like it, but we are. With your and , we continue to move forward into 2024, stronger than ever. Faithful. Optimistic. Unafraid. Thank you for your steadfast commitment to the cause of trustworthy elections. Never quit. Ever onward- | | | P.S. On Monday’s podcast, I'll also share updates on the situation in Nicaragua, where efforts continue to save the thirteen imprisoned pastors and two American children caught in a nightmare of religious persecution and human rights violations, as prisoners of the Nicaraguan government. P.P.S. With the new programs, app launches, and coming legal challenges, our need for funding is escalating quickly. | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2024 True the Vote PO Box 3109 #19128 Houston, Texas 77253-3109, United States of America

name: Team Kennedy
subject: The Next Three Months:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.

|
---
| | | **[When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
The ruling elites in Washington want to ignore the humanitarian, public security, and economic nightmare that is America’ porous southern border.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the only presidential candidate who has a workable plan to solve our current crisis – which goes far beyond an uncontrolled border.
_If the Biden administration spent half as much effort stemming illegal immigration as it does trying to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, the problem would be solved._
If you agree with me that the safety, prosperity, and well-being of our country comes before politics, please help make sure my name is on the ballot – not only in your state, but in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
When an independent candidate is kept off the ballot, your freedom to choose is taken away.
To oppose the well-funded efforts to keep RFK, Jr. off the ballot, our campaign _needs to raise $20,000,000 over the next three months_.
[Your gift of $5, $10, $100, or even more is essential if you want to secure the border and undo the damage done by illegal immigration over the last several years.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $5 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=5&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=5)
[CONTRIBUTE $24 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=24&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=6)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=7)
[CONTRIBUTE $240 >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=8)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=9)
America’s open borders have created a flood of illegal immigrants that has overwhelmed the resources of cities and states across the country and caused a dire humanitarian crisis.
At the same time, ruthless cartels have woven drugs and human trafficking into a multibillion-dollar criminal empire, and violent terrorists are sneaking into our country.
We simply must reassert control over our border by rebuilding the technological and physical barriers dismantled by the Biden administration.
We have both the means and personnel to control the border. We just need to use them.
But we also need to realize that illegal immigration will not abate until we change the conditions that make so many people desperate to flee their homelands. Sadly, the United States has contributed to those conditions. That means America must be committed to...
| ➢ Ending the military adventurism that destabilizes other nations and generates millions of refugees.
---
➢ Holding despotic governments, juntas, and other repressive regimes that trample on basic human rights accountable.
➢ Cooperating with Mexico and Central American nations to improve their economies so people will be able to prosper in their home countries.
With your help, we will make all of this a reality. We will end the immigration crisis the Biden administration has chosen to ignore. But to do it, RFK, Jr. must first be on the ballot in all 50 states and the District of Columbia.
[So please contribute what you can to help our campaign raise the $20,000,000 needed to make sure that your freedom to choose is not taken away.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=10)
Thank you for your support.
Team Kennedy
[TeamKennedy.com](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=three_months_2_17_24_em1_nd1&n=11)

Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House!

name: President Trump
subject: They can’t keep me off stage!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J

name: Colin Allred
subject: new poll just released →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I'll cut right to it, friend: After a recent poll showed us cutting Ted Cruz's lead to just 2 points, we've had a massive wave of momentum. **That's why this is so huge – a brand-new poll out this morning now shows our race TIED, 44-44!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62211?t=6&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_) This came after CNN called Ted Cruz the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country, and experts at Roll Call agree that this is our best shot to win in Texas! **It couldn't be more clear, friend – we can win this race.**

But now, Republican extremists are ready to spend millions to prop up Ted Cruz. They know just how vulnerable Cruz is, and they'll spare no expense to reelect him and take back the Senate Majority.

**That's why it's so important that we hit tonight's fundraising goal of $300,000 to keep this momentum going:** [Please, will you rush $10, $20, or whatever you can spare to help me and the Voter Protection Project defeat Ted Cruz? →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62211?t=7&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62212?t=8&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/62211?t=12&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_)
I know we can win this thing, fire Ted Cruz, and give Texans the leadership we deserve. Thank you.

Colin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13012%2E878179%2E60plA_).**

name: Senator Kennedy
subject: Not Quantum Physics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
But They Make It Seem That Way

| [](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=97b52efa2add48d6a00f53ace5ae299c&_e=D_oo9jFrjol7m17_Nu1sAY9aI_nKMtahd5GAhs1IaQNMEgEK-CBAHPs7jnm7M4hgW2EsKm4lDsipbxXeCZCEBqVqpjQFvGt2VX6RUQd5ox8DcQM0j4quxcR2eXOBHyc4LSM034jcvoMse0MwLDYB1mB_i6sVf6Gsc6OP9Z2JBEu054u3xo7fyMwewdc5KcuWoNZU1ARhV7y23p1x914nXCJxyIyTmy08HfzmC5DvWD8IzD2lpmnMif4qBcROEDwT8QG1BpB0d_mA2X8qFrS-J5nQ8o5KWI5zoS5VLNMmYi7ajFGBtlm39MrRNl2_OrxCllUFlKIqbWy6I4n70ZnoOWpCPmGfkX4h5pIy8fszCLQKhqQBbLbPlr8RkicwG8Wqz2AAT9FU6wriOSOWxSS9zg%3D%3D)
---
Folks, **Securing the border isn 't quantum physics. _We 've done it before._**

But President Biden keeps fighting us every step of the way.
It's no secret that Biden has fallen short of his responsibilities as president to keep our country secure and safe.

Instead of prioritizing the American people, he seems to be more concerned with appeasing the Mexican Government.

_It 's concerning._

**[We cannot stand idly by while our nation's security is compromised for the benefit of a corrupt cartel-run government.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=97b52efa2add48d6a00f53ace5ae299c&_e=D_oo9jFrjol7m17_Nu1sAY9aI_nKMtahd5GAhs1IaQNMEgEK-CBAHPs7jnm7M4hgW2EsKm4lDsipbxXeCZCEBqVqpjQFvGt2VX6RUQd5ox8DcQM0j4quxcR2eXOBHyc4LSM034jcvoMse0MwLDYB1mB_i6sVf6Gsc6OP9Z2JBEu054u3xo7fyMwewdc5KcuWgXNW9SqtG4mtqSOhoaRqUbiAmlye1B2IeU1iJr3xQ4vHIoepuPmsP2UGSQKF-Z6wBLVm8lT7iwhYty3Ci68yCyyp0SSWoLEU8AG-ANP92Ams7aUym3oc3mAUm5NUmHYxbhSAJokmr0pit8YTOQ8Ya1-iw__-G60nSwh3_cvXgAMaG9YyH_nBr4q2V2R4i_UP)**
I've always pledged to you to protect our national security, and I won't let you down - I need your support more than ever to fight against this attack on the security of our nation.

name: Bob Casey
subject: Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)
Peter, in a moment, I’m going to share why I’m running for re-election, but first I am asking:
[**Can you chip in $5 or more to build a winning campaign capable of taking on my billionaire-backed opponent?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-2&refcode2=2026_552475_2lTTAJ&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)
**[Chip In ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-2?refcode=em20240217-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2026_552475_2lTTAJ&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)**
Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be.
It’s where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family.
It’s also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-2&refcode2=2026_552475_2lTTAJ&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)
I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family, too.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-2&refcode2=2026_552475_2lTTAJ&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)
Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I’m proud of the fights we’ve won together.
I’m running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women’s rights, and workers’ rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240217-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240217-2&refcode2=2026_552475_2lTTAJ&akid=2026%2E552475%2E2lTTAJ)
The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another “yes” vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the Senate. **That’s why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat me and flip this seat.**
This is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Nation, and we have to be ready to fight back against millions upon millions in outside spending if we’re going to win.
**[With the Senate majority hinging on this seat, your support is more important than ever. So what do you say? clean_body: Peter, in a moment, I’m going to share why I’m running for re-election, but first I am asking: Pennsylvania is my home, and it always will be. It’s where I was born, where I grew up, and where Terese and I raised our family. It’s also where I started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families. I chose to make Scranton my home because of the people. I enjoy that in Scranton, saying “hello” or “how’s it going?” in the grocery store checkout line always leads to an engaging conversation. Neighbors don’t just say “hello” back and go on with their day. They’re going to tell you about what they’re buying and about their family — and they’ll ask you about what you’re buying and about your family, too. Serving the people of our Commonwealth has been my great honor, and I’m proud of the fights we’ve won together. I’m running for re-election because there are fights we still must win together – like the fight for voting rights, women’s rights, and workers’ rights; the fight to lower costs for working families; and the fight for our children, seniors, veterans, and people with disabilities. The reality is, this is going to be my toughest race yet. My opponent is worth hundreds of millions of dollars and will be another “yes” vote for big corporations and the ultra-wealthy like him in the Senate. That’s why Wall Street billionaires are trying so hard to defeat me and flip this seat. This is going to be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Nation, and we have to be ready to fight back against millions upon millions in outside spending if we’re going to win. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. With gratitude, Bob Casey

clean_body: President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders to statehouses is critical to building a better future, but state legislatures are consistently underfunded and overlooked. | | | | | ---|--- Our records show your DLCC February donor status is inactive. | | FEBRUARY DONOR RECORD | 02.17.24 Supporter: Representing: Local Democrats Donor Status: Inactive Suggested Gift: $7 President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders to statehouses is critical to building a better future, but state legislatures are consistently underfunded and overlooked. If we want to catapult Democrats across the finish line in states like Michigan and New Hampshire, we’re going to need all hands on deck. We’re relying on this grassroots team to help our party stay on track to elect Democrats through reliable, dedicated support. With your contribution, you’ll fuel the fight to defeat extreme Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and elect Democrats in states like yours. But with seven special elections next month, we’re losing time, so we’re asking you: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC.
